Operation management should conduct random on-site inspections and timely identify hazardous or improper behaviors.
重新安排仓库存储区域以确保安全操作。
制定明确的仓库管理工作指南，对仓库工作人员进行培训，确保他们充分理解。
运营管理部门应进行现场随机检查，及时发现危险或不正当行为。

Segregate the duties of physical stock management to the Warehousing team instead of the Production team. 
Record the stock quantities in the NC system and on the stock cards timely and accurately in line with the physical ones on site.
明确实物库存管理的职责属于运营部门的物流管理团队而不是生产团队。
在NC系统中和库存周转卡上及时准确地记录库存数量，使之与现场的实物数量保持一致

Modify the contract review process and update the checklist by firstly adding the checkpoint to compare contract prices with quotations; secondly adding the fitting price by item and respective discount level and compare with the quotations. Include the quotation approval form into the contract review reference documentation. Where the difference is detected, actions should be taken or reasons to accept contract price should be recorded and approved according to related policy.
改进合同审查程序，更新合同审阅检查表，首先增加检查点，将合同价格与报价进行比较；其次增加管件项目的价格比较。在合同审查的参考文件中附上报价审批表。如果发现有差异，应采取行动或记录接受合同价格的理由，并根据相关政策进行批准。

Organize joint meetings on management of slow-moving stocks among Sales, Sales Executive, and Operation teams to ensure action plans will be timely implemented and followed up.
在销售、销售执行和运营间组织呆滞库存管理的联席会议，确保行动计划得到及时落实和跟进。

Clarify the standards and documentation requirements of the vendor selection process, including the types of documents to be prepared and retained, the instructions on how to fill in respective documents, and the special approval process in case of emergencies or exceptions. 
Re-emphasis the standards of vendor selection to purchasing staff and members of the vendor evaluation group to make sure all vendor selections are made in a compliant, transparent, and traceable manner.
Assess and increase the current threshold of T CNY 5 for Quality and Price Comparison Form requirement, to reduce the bidding frequency and increase review efficiency.
明确供应商选择过程的标准和文件要求，包括需要准备和留存的文档类型，如何填写相关文件的说明，以及紧急情况或例外情况发生时的特别审批程序。
向采购人员和供应商评估小组成员再次强调供应商选择的标准，以确保所有供应商的选择都是以合规、透明和可追溯的方式进行的。
评估并提高目前需要进行比质比价的5,000元人民币的门槛，以减少比价频率，提高审批效率。

Implement a documented process to standardize the re-grinding process of scrapped products. This process should clearly stipulate how physical management should be performed both for scrapped pipes and finished re-grinded materials, and how the related documentation should be maintained.
Record re-grinded materials generation and consumption during daily operations and implement review control by Production Manager or Shift Leader to ensure the usage of re-grinded materials is eligible and compliant with related quality standards.
Quality inspection of re-grinded materials should be embedded with clear instructions covering roles and responsibilities, as well as documentation requirements.  
Include re-grinding equipment into the annual and monthly equipment maintenance plan and make sure these regular check and maintenance works are performed and documented.
形成书面流程，以规范报废管材的破碎过程。 该流程应明确规定如何对报废的管材和破碎完成的材料进行实物管理，以及规范如何维护过程中的文件记录。
在日常破碎操作中，记录回用料的产生和消耗，并由生产经理或生产班长进行审查，以确保回收材料的使用是被允许及符合相关质量标准的。
对破碎料的质量检查应有明确的指引，包括角色、责任以及文件记录要求。 
将破碎设备纳入年度和月度设备维护计划，确保这些定期检查和维护工作得到执行和记录。

Identify key positions, which should not be limited to department managers, but also positions with key information and know-how. Substitutes should be nominated and trained to take over the job in case of transfer or retirement of the key position staff. Review and update current HPE structure. HPE program is recommended to be run in parallel with key position substitute program to form the whole talent management process. 
确定关键岗位，关键岗位不应局限于部门经理，还包括拥有关键信息和知识的职位。同时应该提名和培训这些岗位的第二梯队，以便在关键职位的工作人员调离或退休时及时接管工作。审查和更新目前的高潜员工结构，高潜员工项目应与关键职位替代者项目同时进行，共同支持整个人才管理过程。

For employees inevitably working at height, safety measures should be set up to protect em-ployees from falling from height such as safety ropes.
Deliver training to concerned employees to raise awareness of the potential safety risks includ-ing working at height, wearing proper PPE like helmets and safety ropes.
Store lubricants on containment trays to mitigate leakage and contamination possibilities. Rec-ord each in- and outbound transaction on the tracking list.
对于不可避免要进行高空作业的员工，应制定安全措施，防止高处坠落，如配备安全绳。
对相关员工进行培训，提高他们对潜在安全风险的认识，包括高空作业、佩戴适当的个人防护设备（如安全帽及安全绳）。
在地面上为润滑油设置适当的隔离层，以减少泄漏和污染的可能，并在追踪清单上记录每一笔进出库。

Implement regular counting for spare parts and maintain counting reports. Specific analysis should also be performed and action plans should be made in case of significant differences. Molds shall be included in the fixed asset count scope. For the discontinued spare parts, Pro-duction Department should make a systematic review of potential risks and prepare a documented plan to address the risk.
执行备品备件的定期盘点，并生成盘点报告。同时还应进行差异分析，在出现重大差异的情况下，应制定行动计划。建议将模具纳入固定资产盘点范围。同时，对于已停产的备件，生产部门应系统审查潜在的风险，并准备一个正式的应急计划来应对风险。

Incorporate the DoA requirements into the local directive and the Office Automation (OA) approval strategy in terms of the payment process and carry out the unbudgeted payment proposals accordingly.
在付款流程方面，将市政事业部的审批要求纳入公司制度汇编和OA审批策略中，并据此执行预算外付款申请。

Incorporate the contract review policy of Chinaust Group into the local directive and follow the requirements in the contract review process.
将亚大集团的合同审查政策纳入当地的政策汇编中，在未来的合同审查过程中遵循这些标准。

Define criteria for using this one-time vendor account (e.g. setting a threshold of T CNY 50 and estimated frequency), and who should initiate the creation of a new vendor account if the aforementioned criteria are met. In case of any inevitable cases exceeding the threshold with-out vendor creation, proper approval should be obtained and further documented.
Implement a quarterly review control on the transactions of the one-time vendor account to en-sure internal usage compliance and mitigate any duplicated payment risks.

定义使用该一次性供应商账户的标准（例如，设定5万元人民币作为创建新供应商的交易额度限制，结合预计的与该供应商交易的频率）以及如果这些标准满足了，谁负责发起创建一个新的供应商账户的请求。在特殊情况下，如果超过设定金额而没有必要建立新供应商，应获得适当的批准并进一步记录。
对一次性供应商账户的交易实施季度审查控制，以确保内部使用的合规性，并减少任何重复支付的可能。

The Safety Committee, together with Finance, is suggested to set up instructions on usage of Production Safety accrual and deliver trainings to other related staff. Finance should perform checks to ensure Capex purchases are following the rules defined when processing for ac-counting treatment.
建议安全生产委员会与财务部门一起制定安全生产费的使用规则，并对其他相关人员进行培训。财务部应进行检查，以确保进行资本投资项目的采购时遵循正确的会计处理。

Carry out a review on the current operation process and define clear roles and responsibilities in performing NC entries among the relevant departments. Standardize the procedures regarding when to perform such duties in the system, e.g. after each shift or each day.
Deliver training to concerned staff according to the agreed standard procedures and raise awareness of the importance of data accuracy and timeliness.
Perform regular checks on sampled work orders, inbound and outbound transactions to mitigate delays in posting in the ERP system.
对目前的操作流程进行审查，明确相关部门在进行NC录入时的角色和责任，以及在系统中执行此类职责的标准程序, 例如，每一班次后或每天。
根据商定的标准程序对相关工作人员进行培训，提高对数据准确性和及时性重要性的认识。
对工单状态更新、入库和出库记录进行定期抽样检查，以减少在ERP系统中的延迟录入的情况。

Request approval from GF for any customer consignment stock as per DoA. 
Follow the internal instructions and contractual requirements thereafter, such as monthly reconciliations and insurance cost sharing.
根据DoA的规定，向GF申请在客户处寄售的批准。
遵循内部指示和合同要求，如每月对账和保险费用的分摊。

Define employee satisfaction survey template and roll out the annual survey to all existing employees at Chinaust in an anonymous approach. 
For items in low score results, analyze the root causes and define action plans to improve the situation based on reasonable costs. 
Report the annual employee survey result to both Chinaust HQ and GF.
定义员工满意度调查方式和模板，以匿名方式向所有亚大现有员工执行年度调研。
对于得分较低的项目，分析其根本原因，并确定行动计划，在合理成本的基础上加以改进。
向亚大总部和GF报告年度员工调研的结果。

Conduct the credit review required by the contract management policy and maintain documentation for future reference. Use the Anticorruption Questionnaire (Annex 1 of CI 1061) to con-duct due diligence assessment.
进行亚大集团合同管理政策所要求的信用审查，并保存文件供未来参考。使用《反腐败调查表》（CI 1061附件1）进行尽职调查。

Execute compliant and detailed credit overrun review during daily work, make sure order re-lease is based on accurate information and valid justification. 
In the annual credit review, document and let all participants sign on the review sheet to agree on the reasons for credit adjustments.
在日常工作中执行合规、详细的信用超额审查，确保订单释放是基于准确的信息和明确的理由。
年度信用审查时，记录信用调整的原因，并让所有参与者签字认可。

Define a clear stock take procedure with roles and responsibilities such as who should justify and record the count adjustments, and who should analyze the differences. In case of inevitable count differences of raw materials during production, actual count results should be filled out instead of copying the quantities from NC untruthfully.
Document the sample test result and the actual situation of the aged stock as required by the stock count report for proper monitoring and analysis.
Based on the sales forecast, search in the market for a proper external warehouse supplier, and store the excessive materials under more suitable conditions.
定义一个明确的盘点程序，规定角色和责任，如谁应该证明和记录盘点调整，谁应该分析差异。如果在生产过程中不可避免地出现原材料的清点差异，应填写实际盘点结果，而不是直接抄录NC系统数字。
按照库存盘点报告的要求，记录抽样检验结果和陈旧库存的实际情况，以便进行适当的监控和分析。
根据销售预测，在市场上寻找合适的外库供应商，并将过量的存货储存在更为合适的条件下。

Apply quotation review and approval process for customers who sign contracts directly without going through bidding process to ensure all contracts are negotiated based on an approved quotation and margin.
对不通过招标程序而直接签订合同的客户使用报价审查和批准程序，以确保所有合同都是在批准的报价和毛利率的基础上谈判的。

Update the IT policy by excluding unsuitable requirements and adding new controls needed for newly applied systems such as OA. Chinaust Group IT policy (Ver. 2020-6-26) can be incorporated with regard to relevant content. 
Evaluate options for embedding administrative access control and network traffic control on user computers and implement accordingly.
Include IT trainings into the annual training plan. In the meantime, update the employee on-boarding process, make IT security training a mandatory step, or at least prepare training materials for new employees to study and sign off.
更新IT政策，删除不符合业务实际需求的管理要求，同时增加新引入的系统（例如OA）所需的新控制。亚大集团IT政策（2020-6-26版本）可以参考并纳入适用的内容。
评估在用户电脑上实施管理员权限控制和网络流量控制的方案，并相应实施。
将IT培训纳入年度培训计划。同时，更新员工入职流程，将IT安全培训作为必经步骤，或者至少准备好培训材料，供新员工学习和签收。
Use the Anticorruption Questionnaire (Annex 1) to conduct due diligence on all existing and future intermediaries.

Establish processes to gather data necessary to fulfill health and safety expenses and investments reporting requirements in SIS. Ensure the audit trail from the reported KPIs to supporting evidences (i.e. invoices) is in place.

Develop and communicate a comprehensive stock taking guideline defining the stock taking methodology, frequency, process, roles and responsibilities, minimum documentation requirements, differences handling and approval procedures. Implement the stock taking procedures as defined in the stock taking guideline.
Update / complete the missing re-calibration dates in SAP QM for test equipment where applicable. Re-calibrate all overdue test equipment timely.
Define a Delegation of Authorities that incorporates business decisions and transactions applicable to the company and its representatives.
Get in touch with Corporate Treasury and Corporate Legal to determine which options are available to terminate / cancel the contract performance bond with the bank.

Adapt the E-Banking setup to enable system enforced preventive control in bank payments. Joint approvals must be required for all E-Banking users including the administrator for all payment transactions as well as creating or amending existing user profiles.

Reclassify the figures on forms KB13 and KA31 to the correct respective category in the next reporting period. We recommend a refresher training for the Financial Controller on COGNOS reporting in order to correct and avoid similar errors going forward.

Seek refresher training from BU Controlling regarding financial reporting requirements. Track and report the percentage of products sold with 2nd year warranty and percentage of warranty issues occurring in the first warranty year in order to calculate second year warranty provision correctly. Book the warranty provision accordingly in the ERP system and report it in COGNOS.

Liaise with ADP in establishing the proper process to calculate and display holiday balances for employees.
Clarify the exact legal obligations for the employer regarding unconsumed holiday entitlements from previous years. Implement an effective process to calculate and book holiday accruals.

Implement the credit assessment processes in accordance with the GFMS Credit Policy. Enter the credit limits in the ERP system and use them to enforce effective credit risk control, e.g. via automatic order and delivery blocks.
Obtain training for employees on the payment proposal functionality of the ERP system. Use this functionality to reduce potential error and increase efficiency in the vendor payment cycle.

Utilize a standard ERP report to record and monitor all revenues and costs related to each machine sold in order to derive the actual gross margin. In addition, the expected margin as shown on the cost sheet for the respective machine should be recorded in this standard report in order to enable the comparison between actual versus expected gross margin. In case of major discrepancies, further investigation should be made to identify and rectify the root causes.
Strictly follow the requirements of the GFMS Credit Policy going forward. Any exceptional payment conditions should be approved before machine delivery.
Work with the GFMS US Team in adapting the configuration in TeamNet in order to restrict the level of permissible discounts according to the applicable Delegation of Authorities.

Obtain training from the ERP super user in order to close open service calls that do not require billing. The remaining unbilled service calls should be monitored and followed up regularly and billed as soon as the service is completed.

Update the Operation Methods Sheet (OMS) with the most up-to-date activity durations of all assembly and testing activities that have been measured in late 2020.
Apply for more electronic tablets used for assembling and testing processes. If not feasible, put paper OMS on each operation position so that the employees could easily get access to them.

Follow the GFMS Division Directive in updating the lead-time twice a year. 
Update the lead-time in the safety stock calculation sheet every month before the regular review.
Deliver training to the concerned employees on how and when to update the distribution status to ensure OMS and Protocol timely distributed to the Assembly Operators without omission.

Finance should communicate the requirements of the travel and entertainment expenses to all employees in a formal manner and make sure to embed and execute the checkpoints when processing reimbursements. Accommodation reimbursements should be submitted together with details provided by the respective hotels, exceptions should be supported with valid explanations and necessary documentation. 
In case of the requirements in the guideline not fully suitable to the actual business scenario, the respective requirements should be adjusted or eliminated accordingly.

Reinforce the awareness and the importance of timely analysis and stock status changes for materials in SAP Sloc 7561. Implement monthly review controls on the stocks in the Sloc to ensure no long-lasting cases without settlement.
Reconsider the requirement of processing the stocks in the Sloc within 24 hours and if not feasible, then put emphasis only on the critical stocks and modify the internal procedure accordingly.
Inform and consult GF Corporate Lawyer in China first and find a solution to deregister the two branch companies in a cost-efficient approach.

Sort out existing suppliers without the required Code and NDA agreements and initiate the signing process, especially for the preferred vendors with high annual spending. 
A review process should also be established to identify suppliers without the required agreements and follow up accordingly.
Replace the outdated version of the Supplier Code with the updated Code for Business Partners, and establish an effective communication channel with the Corporate Functions to get information on document updates in time.

Arrange joint meetings between the Finance and R&D departments to standardize the communication process of budget allocation to respective gates, and how to ensure the timely budget updates from R&D to Finance department, e.g. kick-off meeting upon project start. 
Allocate the approved budget to respective project phases (not necessary per gate but based on best-controlling perspective) from day one in the manual tracking list.
Ensure regular monitoring and communication between both parties to avoid manual errors.

Reconsider the critical spare parts list with corresponding safe stock levels based on cost, lead-time and significance on production and follow the safety stock level accordingly, i.e. raise purchase requests in a timely manner.

Define a detailed sampling methodology for inbound inspection based on material criticality, batch quantity, and inbound frequency. In terms of the inspection method change, use a more comparable percentage criterion instead of the current absolute criterion. 
Contact GFMS SAP Team to provide solutions in configuring the detailed specifications in the SAP Quality module to realize system automation of the inbound inspection, where sampling size and change criteria could be rolled up systematically by SAP. If not feasible, then reconsider and standardize the sampling methodology in SOP and deliver training to employees to follow the SOP.

Clear up long-pending NCRs with confirmed actual closure or untraceable status to avoid a large amount of aging data currently in the report. 
For the pending items after 2018, review to align the SAP status with the actual situation. It is also suggested to embed a documented process standardizing when and how to perform regular reviews on the NCR status and take follow-up actions.

BAC is suggested to contact with GFMS IP Officer to make clear what is expected in filing for patents and utility models. As already stated in the GF Machining Solutions Intellectual Property Guideline (issued in 2018), BAC is allowed to work out and file utility models for small inventions with a local Chinese agent, but the local IP Officer should inform the Corporate Patent and Trademark department (CPTD) about the filing of any utility model, and also transmits all relevant data to CPTD; for patent applications, BAC shall inform the CPTD by means of the Invention Disclosure Form and provide an English translation of the application draft. 
Therefore, it is suggested that BAC should form an internal guideline or working instruction in agreement with GFMS IP Officer and CPTD to differentiate interaction processes for patents application and utility model application. The processes should specify what kind of information/data and when BAC is expected to report to CPTD.
Ensure a specific job description is available for every employee. Such job description should be signed by the respective employee and retained in the personnel file.
Consult with GFMS Division Controlling and obtain an exception approval if no other solution can be found to calculate the stock provision according to the GFMS Stock Directive.
Adapt internal procedures to ensure purchase order and goods receipt verification cannot be performed by the same employee.
Ensure expense claims are only reimbursed after required approvals are obtained.
Ensure written approvals are obtained according to the DoA before proceeding with low margin machine sales.
Ensure expected margin is compared with achieved margin for each machine sale. In case of deviations, investigate and document the root causes in order to trigger corrective actions.
Adapt local procedures in the delivery of salary statements according to the requirements of applicable regulations.
Timely implement all transfer price updates in the local ERP system.

Implement additional statuses for quotations in the ERP system to allow distinction of rejected or expired quotations from those that are still open and require follow up.

Modify the quotation validity text appropriately to mitigate the risk of unexpected losses.
Service Manager shall conduct a documented review of all warranty service orders created or modified by the CS Assistant on a monthly basis.
Implement a process for goodwill deliveries that results in documented approvals. Adapt internal goods issuance process to enable the easy identification of goodwill cases for efficient monitoring.

Implement a monthly margin review process for all sales orders based on pre-defined margin tolerance levels for each type of services and products sold. Responsible sales staff should be required to provide written comment on sales orders with gross margins outside of the expected tolerance levels.

Establish reason codes in the ERP system for each spare parts issued free of charge to cus-tomers in order to allow correct reporting of warranty costs and selling costs.

Timely follow up the missing CNs from Hub and the spare parts not yet returned.

Compare the current DoA included in DI 7320 with the Divisional one and make sure they fully are aligned with each other. Revise DI 7323 and 7324 to ensure the aforementioned procurement standards / controls are included.

Analyze the functionalities of ASTRAS and check which functionality not yet used could increase the efficiency of the procurement processes. Prepare a concept / project plan and define next steps for the further proceeding. Make sure, all data in ASTRAS are correct and up-to-date.
Make sure, the actions and their status are documented in a way they can easily be followed up. Implement a systematic follow-up process of the open actions.

Define appropriate supplier audit standard outlining criteria, thresholds (e.g. performance rating or risk assessment) and frequency for performing supplier audits. Ensure the aforementioned standard sets the audit report as mandatory requirement for classifying an audit as performed. Ensure that a regular monitoring of mitigating actions based on finding significance (e.g. mid to high) is available for the key suppliers.
In cooperation with Corporate Legal, review the template for award letters and adapt it accordingly. Make sure, the letter includes a clear reference to the GF General Purchase Conditions.
Use the latest divisional DoA as the basis to update the local DoA. Ensure all topics are aligned with the divisional DoA.

Use the engagement letter template published by Corporate Legal (Corporate Instruction 1070 Annex 2) in future engagements of external lawyers. This shall ensure responsibilities and fees are clarified and agreed in written form.
Increase efforts on the follow up of outstanding bank guarantees to prevent unnecessary interest payments. Corresponding status updates should be documented.

Based on the internal decision on whether or not to discontinue the Privilege Club program, implement a corresponding accounting process (i.e. revenue deferral) or a one-off provision for the remaining points balance until the program is officially terminated.

Collect from Sales Department and Service Department the data needed for calculating the 3 key figures required. Enter these key figures into BOARD BI in order to calculate and book the warranty provision correctly.

Liaise with Division Controlling and Coface in confirming whether the current practices fulfil the pre-requisite of coverage for self-insured credit limits. If necessary, adapt current practices in order to guarantee valid insurance coverage (e.g. request @rating credit limits from Coface for all active customers).

Maintain credit limits in SAP for all active customers according to either the credit limit granted by Coface or the self-insured credit limit. Implement a periodic reconciliation process for the credit limits shown in the Coface system and in SAP.

Introduce an internal documented review process before any AR write-off is executed in SAP. Strictly follow the DoA requirements, obtain required approvals, and retain evidence of consultation with and information to BU and Division Management.

Conduct the anti-corruption assessment for the two intermediaries. Ensure the machine dealer signs the GF compliance agreement. 
Consult Corporate Legal regarding the lack of an agency agreement with E. Wagner. Obtain an approval from the Market Region Head regarding the commission level according to the GFMS DoA.
Strictly follow the requirements of the GFMS Credit Policy going forward. Any exceptional payment conditions should be approved in advance.
Resume the review of expected versus actual gross margins on machines sold. Ensure the root causes and corrective actions of the differences are documented in such reviews going forward.
The approver of payroll payments should generate and review the change log on bank account numbers before releasing the payroll payment each month.

Conduct a clean-up exercise on aged open service notifications and service orders that are no longer relevant. Review service notifications and service orders aged above 3 months on a monthly basis, in addition to the existing weekly review on service notifications.

Extend the current management meeting minutes template for defined actions, due dates and a dedicated responsible. Use the previous management meeting minutes as basis for a status report of each department including the status quo of previously agreed actions.

Review the ICS documentation with respect to existing but undocumented controls or potential control gaps. Ensure that these controls are implemented and / or documented consistently and completely as part of the ICS.

Reconcile the local DoA with Divisional requirements. Adjust and update identified discrepancies accordingly in the local DoA and communicate the updated local DoA to all employees applicable. Make use of the standardized DoA template as provided by the Division.

Update the current headcount and FTE calculation according to the respective definitions by considering the contractually agreed activity rate. Implement a reconciliation between the head-count and FTE figures reported in Cognos and SIS. Ensure that employees on sick leave and / or maternity leave will be included in the reported headcount in Cognos.

Agree with Corporate and Division Controlling on the assumptions and the right approach to calculate the provision for anniversary payments. Record the calculated anniversary provision values according to the agreed on calculation method in the financial statements.
Update the current credit limit calculation according to Division Directive 22. Ensure that recalculated credit limits are updated in the local ERP System.
Define a process for a systematic monitoring of agreed delivery dates with suppliers to facilitate early indications of delayed material deliveries.

Determine an hourly rate for maintenance staff. Implement and define a timesheet for maintenance and repair employees on machine level. Track the times required for each repair and maintenance activity. Perform an overall cost and hours spend analysis on machine level.

Complete pending annual target agreement and confirmation processes. Define 3 to 5 objectives per employee adding up to 100%. Develop minimum documentation requirements for expected results in me@GF and communicate and apply those accordingly in me@GF.

Develop a material flow analysis including raw material, scrapped and cycle material compared to finished goods. Conduct this analysis regularly (i.e. quarterly). Derive actions and corrective measures for identified / unexplained differences and track their implementation accordingly.

Ensure that dedicated consignment stock agreements with customer Vibracoustic are in place. Conduct a stock take at all customer consignment stock locations at least annually to verify the stock balances.

Collect, track and calculate all necessary input figures during the quality processes to fulfill the Division accounting memo's requirements. The Finance department shall review and verify the Quality department's calculation before recording of the warranty provision quarterly.
Conduct a DoA refresher training for all parties involved in the credit note creation and approval process.
Analyze the current bank accounts set-up with the support of GF Corporate Treasury to develop an action plan for reducing the accounts with no usage.

Based on the aforementioned directives, put in place a list of key suppliers ("A suppliers") for all material categories including purchasing volume and annual performance ratings, to ensure a complete overview of key suppliers and status/coverage of performance ratings is available at a glance. Make also sure to classify suppliers in accordance with the 3 risk category groups defined in directive "E1 Risk Management" on an annual basis.
For key suppliers at least, put in place a monitoring list key contractual information with special regards to value, purpose, validity and renewal clauses are available at a glance.

Improve the current list of authorized vendors by including the vendor creation date as standard field, to ensure that eventual additions to the list can be monitored / tracked at a glance. Implement also the same control at GFMS BAC in order to achieve a standardized overview of the authorized suppliers operating in China. Ensure that an approved list of authorized supplier is available for every quarter.

Document the monthly stock count coverage and results and sign the counting results by both the counting staff and the supervisor. In case of any significant counting difference, root causes should also be analyzed and recorded. 
Review the current max. and min. quantity limits on a defined regular basis, e.g. quarterly or bi-annually, and update them accordingly.
记录每月的库存盘点范围和结果，并由实际盘点人员和主管签字。如果出现任何明显的数量差异，应分析并记录根本原因。
定期审查当前的最大和最小数量限制，例如每季度或每两年一次，并进行相应的更新。

Enhance the awareness of the relevant staff at CCAU to properly record the hours in the monthly operating reports based on the original files to ensure machine efficiency is correctly and timely reflected. 
Implement monthly or quarterly random checks by one independent individual to mitigate any possible manual errors.
提高长春亚大相关工作人员对根据原始档案在月度运营报告中正确记录工时的意识，以确保正确、及时地记录机器效率。
实行每月或每季度由一名独立人员进行抽查，以减少任何可能的人工错误。

Assign one employee as the responsible person of the overall scrapping analysis and follow up across all three sections. Maintain a list of all action plans defined in each month's scrap analysis, clarify the actions, responsible personnel and target completion date for each item. Save the list in the share drive and make sure all concerned employees have access to the file. Whenever an action is completed, the respective person should update the status and completion date. A periodic review should also be performed to identify and follow up on pending action plans. 
指定一名员工作为三个工段整体不合格品分析和跟进的负责人。维护一份在每个月不合格品分析中定义的所有行动计划的清单，明确每个项目的行动、负责人员和目标完成日期。将该清单保存在公共文件夹中，并确保所有相关员工都能访问该文件。每当一项行动完成后，相关人员应更新状态和完成日期。还应根据对这份清单进行定期审阅，以发现和跟进未完成的行动计划。

Enhance the awareness in defining, performing, and verifying the monthly closing checklist to clarify the standard procedures and avoid any manual mistakes. In terms of the HBI and HBII mapping and adjustment process, arrange meetings with GFPS responsible individuals, to correct the current methodologies to fully align with the standard HBII requirements.
加强对月度结账清单的定义、执行和核对的意识，以明确标准程序，避免任何人为错误。在HBI和HBII匹对过程中，组织与GFPS相关人员进行沟通，以纠正当前错误的方法，以完全符合HBII标准要求。

Establish a combined overview of all contracts signed across all departmens. Re-design the contract tracking list template to make a running contract tracking system. Make sure that the purchased material type, contract amount, payment term, payment method, cancelation and expiration date, potential covenants and whether the contract applies standard Chinaust contract template are included and filled in when conducting contract registration.
重新设计合同台账模板，使之成为一个永续的合同跟踪体系。确保采购物资类型、合同金额、付款条件、付款方式和是否使用亚大合同模板等信息都包含在这个模板中，并在登记台账时完整填写。

Review the stock take procedure and make it clear how to define the scope of bi-annual stock take. Include the consignment warehouses into the scope and analyze the differences as well. The stock take report should include all inventory count results analysis and action plans (if any). Set a tolerance rate for variance analysis on material level, for items with variance rate exceeding this tolerance, supporting documents should be obtained and kept with the stock take documentation. Ensure that resulting stock adjustments are booked with a separate movement type to clearly indicate them as such.
审查盘点程序，明确应当如何界定一年两次盘点的范围。将寄售仓库纳入该范围并分析其差异。盘点报告应包括所有的盘点结果分析和行动计划（如有）。同时建议为物料层面的差异分析设定一个容忍度，对于差异率超过这个容忍度的项目，应获取证明文件并与盘点资料一起保存。确保由此产生的库存调整以单独的库存移动类型入账，以明确表明它们的性质。

Based on the newly published DoA of Chinaust Business Segment Automobile, develop the local DoA and incorporate the local DoA in the Internal Control Guideline accordingly. In terms of the workflow, go through the Internal Control Guideline with respective department responsible persons and modify it according to the correct roles and responsibilities, standard procedures and required documentations.
根据新发布的亚大汽车事业部的DoA，制定本地DoA，并将本地DoA纳入内部控制指南。在工作流程方面，与各部门负责人一起重新审阅《内部控制指南》，并根据正确的角色和职责划分、标准程序和所需文件进行对应修改。

Enhance the awareness of safety standards of the concerned employees. 
Place corresponding pictograms either on the materials individually or on the specific storage areas of respective materials. Empty containers of hazardous substances are only reused, i.e., filled with other substances once they have been cleaned, rinsed, and labeled with the new content.
Place appropriate and functional first aid facilities depending on the stored substances in the nearby surrounding of the hazardous storage warehouse. 
Contact GF SIS responsible individuals to align the reporting categories of recycling income and costs with SIS requirements. Summarize and document the environmental investments and costs in a trace-back method to be fully compliant with the GF directive.
提高相关员工对安全标准的意识。
材料上单独放置相应的危险图标，或在各自材料的特定储存区放置相应的危险图标。防止过危险品的空容器只能在以下情况中重新使用：即在清洁、漂洗并贴上新内容的标签后再装入其他物质。根据储存的物料，在危险品储存仓库的附近，放置适当的、实用的急救设施。
联系GF的SIS负责人，使回收收入和成本的报告类别与SIS的要求一致。以可追溯的方法总结并记录环境相关的投资和成本，以完全符合GF对应公司指令的要求。

Understand the roles and their corresponding functionalities of the existing external software and online tools. 
Implement regular internal controls such as quarterly or bi-annual access review on the shared drives, NC system, Time Recording Systems, etc. to ensure full alignment with the segregation of duties principle and mitigate potential manual errors in user access configuration. Ensure that sensitive information (e.g., R&D and product-related data) is only accessible by a limited number of employees who require this access for their actual responsibilities.
了解各个外购软件和在线工具的角色及其对应的功能。
实施定期的内部控制检查，如每季度或每半年对共享盘、NC系统、考勤系统等进行权限审查，以确保完全符合职责分离原则和规避由人工错误导致的用户权设置问题。确保敏感信息（如研发和产品相关的数据）仅由数量有限的员工访问，且他们的实际职责需要这种访问权限。

Quality department should clarify the calculation methodology of cost of quality and communicate to all quality engineers on how the cost should be tracked. In the monthly Operation Meeting, the cost of quality calculated according to internal definition should be reviewed, it is also suggested to identify cases with high quality cost and define actions accordingly. 
质量部门应明确质量损失的计算方法，并向所有质量工程师传达应当如何跟踪质量损失的方法。在每月的运营会议上，应审阅根据内部定义正确计算的质量损失，我们也建议识别质量损失高的案例并确定相应的行动计划。

Even if CCAU doesn't need to submit formal investigation result to customer for informal complains, we still suggest Quality department to record, investigate, improve, and track the informal complains, especially the cases with high importance rating. Those actions defined for the quality issues that cannot be completed immediately should be monitored until proper completion. The root cause, actions performed for improvement should also be timely recorded into the tracking list for future reference. 
即使长春亚大不需要向客户提交非正式投诉的正式调查结果，我们仍然建议质量部门记录、调查、改进和跟踪非正式投诉，特别是具有高度重要性的案例。对质量问题所确定的行动方案，如果不能立即完成，应进行持续监督，直到适当完成。根本原因以及为改进而采取的行动也应及时记录在跟踪列表中，供将来参考。

It is suggested that Purchasing department should make it clear to all employees that are responsible for providing data source to supplier evaluation what to input and where to input them. A regular reconciliation between supplier evaluation and data source should also be performed to ensure no omissions of important information. 
建议采购部门向所有负责为供应商评估提供数据源的员工明确说明应输入哪些数据以及在哪里输入。还应定期核对供应商评估和数据源，以确保不遗漏重要信息。

Set up a quantified bonus calculation methodology as well as personal appraisal system. The annual employee appraisal should be conducted in a transparent manner with involvement of HR department to ensure the evaluation criteria and scoring basis across departments are equal and fair. Future bonus allocation should be calculated with reference to the personal appraisal for office based employees. For bonus adjustment of frontline operators, supporting documents or at least justifications should be provided and recorded. 
建立量化的奖金计算方法以及个人绩效考核制度。在人力资源部门的参与下，员工年度考核应以透明的方式进行，以确保各部门的评价标准和评分依据是平等和公平的。未来的奖金分配应参照管理类员工的个人考核结果来计算，对于一线操作人员的奖金调整，应提供证明文件或至少是理由，并记录在案。

Considering NC system does not have a supplier or customer master data module, it is suggested to have a centralized contract tracking list with payment term information maintained. Payment term should be utilized as an instrument for customer and supplier contract negotiation, and Finance should also be involved in the negotiation of payment terms, or at least set the limits or expectations. 
鉴于NC系统没有供应商或者客户主数据模块，建议建立一个集中的合同跟踪清单，并维护付款条件信息。付款条件应当被用作公司与客户和供应商合同管理的工具，财务部门应参与付款条件的重新谈判，或至少设定限制或期望。

Follow the internal credit review and Chinaust Group Legal review required by the Chinaust Contract Management Policy and maintain documentation and emails for future references.
For those suppliers providing components with the Chinaust logo, consult the Chinaust Group Legal whether the existing terms and conditions are sufficient or needed to be revised. For spe-cial contracts, such as for subcontracting businesses, confirm with GF regarding the reporting and adjustment criteria and perform it in a complete manner.
遵循亚大合同管理政策所要求的内部信用审查和集团法律审阅，并保留文件和电子邮件以备追溯参考。针对部分特殊商务关系的合同和财务处理，咨询集团法务现有条款是否需要增加以及咨询GF相关人员是否需要在外放报表上进行调整等。

Revise the internal guideline to explicitly determine the criteria and workflow (on the OA platform only with a limited alternative of hard copy under emergency situations), and align the approval requirements with to-be-implemented Delegation of Authorities (DoA) of Chinaust Business Segment Automobile. For instance, apart from defining the workflow of out-of-quota headcount, define the different approval routings for replacement and new additions.
修订内控指引，明确操作标准和工作流(线上OA平台作为唯一审批渠道，紧急情况下有限的使用线下审批)，使审批要求与亚大汽车事业部待实施的授权审批表（DoA）保持一致。例如，超过预算的人员审批，还可以定义替换人员和新增人员的不同审批流程。

The practice of asking new employees to sign such additional declaration should be stopped. 
Follow the labor laws and regulations to ensure full alignment and employee fair salary payments.
Reconsider alternatives in form of incentives to retain talents, such as recognition and rewards to top performers, offering development and learning opportunities, rather than through punitive approaches.
停止要求新员工签订此类不平等的额外申明书。遵循劳动法律和法规，以确保合规和员工合理工资的支付。重新考虑以奖励的形式来留住人才，如对表现优秀的人进行表彰和奖励，提供发展和学习机会，而不是通过惩戒的方式。

Collect the master data of equipment capacity for critical assembly machines based on their asset value and significance.
During the transition period from the manual sheet to the digital tool for production planning, simulate the comprehensive data in the Excel sheet first and further apply it to the digital tool. 
Incorporate the machine load data into the production KPI, i.e. OEE regular monitoring process.
根据设备的价值和重要性，收集装配上关键设备的设备负荷能力主数据。
在生产计划从手工表到数字化工具的过渡期间，先在手工Excel表中进行模拟数据搭建，然后进一步应用到数字工具中。
将负载数据纳入生产KPI，即OEE的日常监测过程。

Correct the identified classification deficiencies to fully align with the standard HBII requirements.
Enhance the collaboration with GF in clarifying the HBII mapping accounts and methodologies.
纠正已发现的财务报表分类问题，使之与标准的HBII要求完全一致。
与GF负责人员进行合作沟通，明确HBII的填列科目和方法。

Upon generating the monthly SNI report, analyze the aged items over one month with the latest follow-up status in a documented manner. 
Strengthen the monthly reconciliation process and clarify the roles and responsibilities between Chinaust Shanghai Auto as the internal supplier and other internal customers to ensure that aged SNI cases are analyzed and settled timely and correctly by invoicing the right customers with the right amounts. 
In case of any disputes and issues, clarify with the internal and external customers and follow up the cases in a proactive manner.
在生成月度出库未开票报告时，记录分析超过一个月的超期事项和最新的跟进状况。
加强月度对账程序，明确作为内部供应商的上海亚大汽车和其他内部亚大客户之间的分工和职责，以确保通过向正确的客户开具正确的金额和发票，及时正确分析和解决出库未开票情况。
如果出现任何争议和问题，与内部和外部客户进行沟通，并积极跟进事项的进展。

Clarify with the Auto Business Segment for the definition of "overrun" upon OA approval and make clear interpretations of the requirements stated in the Internal Control Guideline, especial-ly in which cases a project is deemed as "overrun".
While reviewing and approving CAPEX, purchase requests that are additional applications, de-partment managers and Finance should specifically check whether the total project amount has exceeded the budget and follow the correct approval workflows.
与亚大汽车事业部明确在OA 提交申请时如何定义预算超支的情况，并对内部控制手册中的要求做出明确的解释，特别是在哪些情况下项目会被视为 "预算超支"。在审查和批准额外的CAPEX 采购申请时，部门经理和财务部门应特别检查项目总金额是否超出预算，并遵循适当的审批工作流程。

Stop the practice to ensure all salaries paid are only related to employees with labor contracts signed and services rendered.
停止该项业务，以确保所有支付的员工薪酬只与实际提供劳务和签订劳动合同的雇员有关。

Establish a combined overview of all contracts signed across all departments. Re-design the contract tracking list template to make a running contract tracking system. Make sure that the purchased material type, contract amount, payment term, payment method, cancelation and expiration date, potential covenants and whether the contract applies standard Chinaust con-tract template are included and filled in when conducting contract registration.
Reinforce the importance of consulting Chinaust Group Legal in case of complicated and confidential clauses.
重新设计合同台账模板，使之成为一个永续的合同跟踪体系。确保采购物资类型、合同金额、付款条件、付款方式和是否使用亚大合同模板等信息都包含在这个模板中，并在登记台账时完整填写。
强调咨询亚大集团法务的重要性，如涉及复杂和敏感信息的合同条款。

Make sure the supplier master data is updated timely and reconciled on a regular basis. Finance Manager is suggested to perform a sample check on the accuracy of the master data by comparing the tracking list and actual contracts. The payment term tracking file should be protected and allow only concerned Finance employees to modify, a change log is also suggested to be added as a separate sheet with reference to related agreements. 
In the meantime, Finance should actively communicate with the Auto Business Segment on the potential automatic payment planning function in SRM and clarify the requirements, especially on the improvement of outstanding period calculation methodology.
确保供应商主数据得到及时更新，并定期进行核对。建议财务经理通过比较跟踪清单和实际合同，对主数据的准确性进行抽查。付款条件追踪表应受到保护，只允许相关的财务员工进行修改，同时建议将修改记录在单独的表格中记录并关联相关合同。
同时，财务部应积极与汽车事业部就SRM中可能的自动付款计划功能进行沟通，并明确相关要求，尤其是对账期的计算方法的优化。

Extract and retain the original excel sheets from the NC system on all inventory dates by the Finance department to ensure the SoD principle.
Adjust all the count results to one specific date so that completeness is ensured and goods movements in different count dates among different locations could be identified. In case of the stock locations with zero stock quantity, put remarks on the complete stock list rather than di-rectly deleting them from the original planning and the final report.
Match the corresponding inventory value to the stock take report and apply for approvals in accordance with the requirements of Chinaust Group and the Auto Business Segment.
财务部负责导出并保留在所有盘点日从NC系统中导出的原始表格。
核对不同盘点日和盘点位置间存货移动，以确保盘点的完整性在某一时间点是得以确保的，并核对该期间货物移动的合理性。
如果盘点当天有库位库存数量为零，则在完整的盘点计划和盘点报告上添加未盘点备注，而不是直接将其从初始计划和最终报告中直接删除。
将盘点差异部分的存货金额匹配到盘点报告中， 并按照亚大集团和事业部要求申请批准。

Finance department should sort out all information sources, completely collect and consider the information (incl. EOP materials and products) when calculating the stock provision. 
A regular meeting involving Finance, Logistic and Sales is also suggested to be held for smoother and timelier communication on stock status. 
财务部应整理出所有用于计算存货跌价准备的信息来源，确保完整地收集这些信息(包括已经EOP的原材料和产成品)，并在计算库存跌价时进行相应的考虑。
建议定期召开由财务部、物流部和销售部参加的会议，以便就库存状况进行更顺畅和及时的沟通。

Raise a request to the SRM provider to solve the current functionality issues of the system so that the open order monitoring mechanism could be implemented based on the reliable data extracted from the system. Extract the open order list from SRM on a timely basis and follow up on aged orders accordingly. For unfulfilled orders, reasons and updated status should be rec-orded and monitored continuously until goods receipt or order cancellation. The delays of deliv-ery should also be properly considered in the supplier's monthly and annual performance eval-uation.
Upon signing new and updated purchasing contracts, negotiate with the vendors to implement and clarify payment terms starting from the date of invoice receipts instead of goods receipts, which is easier to manage from an NC ERP perspective, more favorable to Chinaust Shanghai Auto cashflow management, and less legal disputes in case of GRNI situation.
向SRM系统供应商提出需求，以解决系统当前的功能性问题，以便根据从系统中提取的可靠数据实施未结订单的监控。及时从SRM系统中提取未结订单的清单，并对过期订单进行相应的跟踪。对于未完成的订单，应记录并持续监控其原因和最新状态，直至收到货物或取消订单。在供应商的月度和年度绩效评估中，也应适当考虑交货延迟的问题。
在签署新采购合同或更新原采购合同时，应与供应商协商，实施并明确从发票收取日而非货物到达日开始计算付款周期，从NC ERP的角度来看，这更易于管理，并有利于上海亚大的现金流情况，同时使得在出现GRNI情况时减少潜在的法律纠纷。

Consult Chinaust Group Legal to agree upon the most suitable terms regulating the working hour systems and compensation methods of employees in different positions.
Modify the standard labor contract template in use at Chinaust Shanghai Auto; replace the fixed clauses in the template with optional ones to add more flexibility in mitigating legal risks when signing employment contracts with individual employees.
咨询亚大集团法务部，以商定规范不同岗位员工的工时和薪酬制度的最适配条款。
修改上海亚大汽车使用的标准劳动合同模板，将模板中的固定条款改为可选条款，以便在与员工个人签订劳动合同时增加更多的灵活性来减轻法律风险。

Implement both preventive and detective controls in ERP user access management: 
Detective controls: understand the business needs for the existing NC ERP users by depart-ment and screen the potential existing violations of SoD across the key processes and existing NC users. Meanwhile, carry out a regular (either monthly or quarterly) review process to identify the SoD access non-compliance cases.
Preventive controls: in case of new NC access requests, verify its compliance with the SoD principle with the existing roles first and then consider granting individual transaction access rather than the entire role to the users to mitigate further conflicting issues.
在ERP用户权管理中实施预防性和检测性控制。
检测性控制：按部门了解现有NC ERP用户的业务需求，在关键流程和现有NC用户中筛查潜在的现有违背职责分离原则的情况。同时，开展定期（每月或每季度）审查工作，以识别不符合职责分离原则的权限案例。
预防性控制：对于新的NC权限请求，首先验证其与现有的角色权限是否符合职责分离原则，然后再考虑赋予用户个别操作权限，而不是直接授权整个角色，以减少进一步的权限冲突问题。

Quality department should extract the customer return list from OA on a regular basis and follow up on the returns caused by quality issues. The root cause, temporary solution, and ultimate solution should all be decided and tracked until the revealed quality issue is completely solved. In the meantime, the overall review and analysis to identify frequently occurred quality issues, follow-up on action plan list should be performed for quality issues revealed by both customer complaints, and customer returns. 
质量部门应定期从OA拉取客户退货清单，并对因质量问题引起的退货进行跟踪。根本原因、临时解决方案和最终解决方案都应该被制定和跟踪，直到暴露的质量问题被彻底解决。同时，对于客户投诉和客户退货所反映的质量问题，应进行总结性的回顾和分析，以确定经常发生的质量问题，并对行动计划清单进行跟踪。

Organize joint discussion among the Business Segment, Chinaust Group, and GFPS division to clarify the current expectations on sales margins as well as feasible quotation workflow and approval matrix to both ensure proper authorization while also increasing more flexibility. Based on historical as well as forecast gross margins, define the approval matrix resulting in a feasible control frequency for different approvers, or provide both expected and bottom-line margins in the first quotation calculation, etc. 
Add conditions for compulsory approvals from Chinaust Group level such as gross margin un-der 15% for new projects and annual price drop over 2% for existing projects, etc.
Amend the current guideline and matrix according to the final agreed terms among the three aforementioned stakeholders and distribute the two documents to all concerned Chinaust Auto entities. 
组织事业部、亚大集团和GFPS进行联合讨论，明确当前的销售毛利预期和可行的报价工作流程和审批矩阵，以确保在适当的授权的同时，增加更多的灵活性，例如根据历史和预期的毛利数据，按照不同审批任的控制频率需求设置审批矩阵，或在第一次报价中同时提供预期利润和底线利润等。
增加集团一级的审批条件，如新项目毛利低于15%，或现有项目年降超2%等。
根据上述方之间的最终达成的协议条款，修改现行准则和审批矩阵，并将这两份文件一同分发给所有相关的亚大汽车公司。

Summarize and document the environmental investments and costs in traceable manner to be fully compliant with the GF Directive.
以可追溯的方法总结并记录环境相关的投资和成本，以完全符合GF对应公司指令的要求。

Based on the functionalities offered by the digital tool MES, record all kinds of maintenance activities including external and internal, preventive and corrective ones in the system. This shall ensure  that data is holistic, traceable, standardized and easy for screening based on cer-tain criteria, which can be useful for CAPEX and OPEX decision making.
Define the R&M cost in a formal manner including at least spare parts, internal labor input, and external services., Potential loss caused by production interruption is also suggested to be considered. The hourly rate for maintenance staff should be determined in order to quantify man-hours in costs. The digital tool already implemented can be fully utilized to simplify the cost recording and summarizing process. For machines with high R&M costs, actions should be defined and followed up on for future improvement.
基于数字工具MES提供的功能，在系统中记录所有类型的维保活动，包括外部和内部、预防和纠正性维保，使数据具有整体性、可追溯性、标准化，便于根据某些标准进行筛选，有助于做出资本性投资项目和运营支出的决策。
正式定义维修和保养成本，至少包括备件消耗、内部人工投入和外部服务，也建议考虑生产中断造成的潜在损失。应确定维修人员的工时成本，以便将工时转化为成本。可以充分利用已经实施的MES系统来简化成本记录和总结过程。对于维保成本较高的机器，应确定行动计划并跟进，以利于未来的改进。

Improve the OMS configuration by maximizing the functions such as automatic reminder and list exporting. 
In terms of internal quality audits, confirm and solve the problems of the process implementa-tion in OMS system with the local IT, including creating accounts for all responsible stakehold-ers, sending automatic email to the concerned persons, setting up overdue reminders, etc. Meanwhile, provide proper training to relevant employees on the application of OMS tool and enhance their awareness in using the digital tool.
改善OMS的配置，优化自动提醒和列表导出等功能。
针对内部质量体系审计，与IT确认并解决该流程在OMS系统中执行的问题，包括创建负责人账号，发送自动邮件给负责人，逾期提醒等。同时，对相关负责人进行适用OMS的培训并加强对适用该系统的意识。

Extract and retain the original excel sheets from the NC system on all stock take dates by the Finance department to ensure the completeness of stock take scope and used as the basis of blind count difference calculation. Finance should also be the supervisor for all internal warehouses count to ensure SoD is properly implemented. 
Make sure to apply blind count method for all warehouses at least during the bi-annual full inventory count.
Use the correct variance adjustment account to process stock take differences.
财务部从NC系统中导出并保留所有盘点日期的原始EXCEL表，以确保盘点范围的完整性，并作为盲盘差异计算的基础。财务部也应该是所有内部仓库清点的监督者，以确保职责分离的正确实施。
确保至少在每半年一次的全面库存盘点中，对所有仓库采用盲盘法。
使用正确的差异调整账户来处理库存的差异。

Firstly, clarify the usage of one-time customer account and one-time vendor account. Define criteria for using this one-time vendor account (e.g. setting a threshold of T CNY 50 and estimated frequency of transactions), and who should initiate the creation of a new vendor account if the aforementioned criteria are met. In case of any inevitable cases exceeding the threshold without vendor creation, proper approval should be obtained and further documented.
Implement a quarterly review control on the transactions of the one-time vendor account to ensure internal usage compliance and mitigate any duplicated payment risks.
首先，明确一次性客户账户和一次性供应商账户的用法。界定使用这种一次性供应商账户的标准（例如，设定5万元人民币的门槛和预计交易频率），以及如果符合上述标准，谁应该发起创建一个新的供应商账户。如果出现任何不可避免的超过阈值而不创建供应商的情况，应获得适当的批准并进一步记录。
对一次性供应商账户的交易实施季度审查控制，以确保内部使用的合规性，减少任何重复支付的风险。

Strategic Procurement of Chinaust Auto Business Segment should lead the entire negotiation and contract signing process with common suppliers, streamline the most favorable conditions, not only the unit prices, but also payment terms (including term starting time points), payment methods, special clauses, etc. Only when the efforts are made jointly by the Strategic Procure-ment Department and evidenced in the final contracts in a closed cycle, the overall purchasing conditions could practically be improved in the end. 
Implement the reporting mechanism regarding condition changes from each legal entity to the Business Segment to ensure that in terms of any favorable changes, all the three Auto entities could benefit from them simultaneously.
亚大汽车事业部的战略采购部应主导三家亚大汽车子公司针对重合供应商的协商和合同签订流程，统一使用最有的付款条件，不单只包括单价、也包括其他采购条件如付款周期 (包括周期计算起始时间点)、付款方式、特殊条款等。只有当战略采购部对三家公司整体进行采购谈判，并在之后合同签订流程中以闭环的方式证明采购条款的最终落实，才能切实改善整体的采购条件。
实施各子公司向事业部报告采购条款变化的机制，以确保在任何有利采购条款发生变化时，所有三家汽车子公司都能同时从中受益。

1. Appoint one person to take overall responsibility for the MRP process. This "super user" should be able to understand the whole process, the information flow setting, and how key data entries work and affect the system outputs. Clear responsibilities should be determined and communicated to data feeding roles. 
2. The mindset of master data needs to be established for all users of the APS and SRM system. Regular reconciliation should be performed among digital tools sharing the same master data to timely identify possible synchronization failures and unauthorized manual modifications. 
3.  Perform regular review of master data by comparing with actual realized delivery cycles.
4. During the NCC preparation phase, discuss with the NCC vendor to fulfill the feasible functionalities so that the aforementioned workflow could be optimized, explanatory and possible for extraction.
1. 指定一个人对物料计划整个流程负责。这个 "超级用户 "应该能够理解整个流程，信息流的设置，以及关键的数据输入是如何工作和影响系统输出的。同时应该确定明确的责任，并传达给执行数据输入的岗位。
2. 需要为APS和SRM系统的所有用户建立主数据的思维方式。应在共享相同主数据的数字工具之间进行定期核对，以便及时发现可能的数据同步失败和未经授权的手工修改。
3. 通过与已实现的采购周期进行比较，对主数据进行定期审查。
4. 在NCC准备阶段，与NCC供应商讨论，以实现可行的功能，从而使上述工作流程能够得到优化、解释和可能的提取。

Minimize the usage of petty cash in employee rewards and other scenarios. Consider other incentive methods such as using a red package with amount stated, as a substitute for cash. If not feasible, then strengthen the OA approval control to make sure the process is clear and traceable; and that the approvers would   verify the attachments before approval.
尽量减少在员工奖励和实习生工资支付中使用零用金。考虑其他的激励方法，如使用标有金额的红包作为现金的替代品。如果不可行，则加强OA的审批控制，确保审批流程清晰并且可追溯，并且确保审批人在审批前核实附件。

During the NCC preparation phase, request the NCC provider to add the functionality in the updated ERP system to realize internal recording of actual delivery dates, so that the base data for OTIF deliveries are on hand for further analysis.
Standardize the procedures on delivery monitoring including clarifying the roles and responsibilities in data collection, defining the standards and rules on OTIF upon sales incoterm and customer requirements.
In terms of customer-provided monthly data sources such as Ford on its EDI platform, reconcile the internal and external data sources on a regular basis (quarterly or bi-annually) to ensure internal requirements align with the external ones.
在NCC准备阶段，要求NCC供应商在更新的ERP系统中增加功能，实现对实际交付日期的内部记录。这样，起码由交付的基础数据，用以便进一步分析。
规范销售订单交付监控的程序，包括明确数据收集的角色和责任，根据销售条款和客户的要求确定OTIF的标准和规则。
对于客户提供的月度数据源，如福特公司的EDI平台，定期（每季度或每半年）核对内部和外部数据源，以确保内部要求与外部要求一致。

For the employee for whom Chinaust Hebei Auto still pays social security, it is suggested to work with Group Legal and terminate the employment contract as soon as possible. 
In case the conclusion cannot be reached in a short period, a financial provision should be made accordingly to properly reflect the potential financial loss.
Set internal controls to trigger labor contract re-signing process in case of employee position changes to reflect the corresponding salary structures.
Integrate the signing of confidentiality agreement into the new employee onboarding process to make sure the employees are bound with a proper agreement before accessing confidential or sensitive data. Return one copy of the labor contract to respective employees when completing the sealing.
对于仍然为其缴纳社保的员工，建议与集团法务部合作，尽快解除劳动合同。
如果在短期内不能达成结论，则应相应进行财务预提，以适当反映潜在的财务损失。
设置内部控制，在员工职位变动的情况下触发劳动合同的重新签订程序，以反映相应的薪酬结构。
将签署保密协议纳入新员工入职流程，确保员工在访问机密或敏感数据之前受到适当的协议约束。在完成盖章后，将一份劳动合同返还给相关员工。

Discuss with GFPS HR Asia Director, Chinaust Group HR Director, and Chinaust Group Legal to clarify the overall compensation and penalty system of Chinaust Hebei Auto. All types of payroll deductions (e.g. customer complaints, AR collection, etc.) and discipline penalties (e.g. non-discipline parking, absence without notice, etc.) should be reviewed thoroughly for the management to understand whether, from a legal perspective, the company could deduct or receive which kind of penalties and under which method (payroll deduction or employee direct bank transfer). 
In terms of employee motivation, consider applying other alternatives such as canceling annual merit increases or reduce monthly performance bonuses to motivate employees in case of low performances instead of direct deduction in employee payroll. If not feasible, then arrange a formal Employee Representative Assembly meeting to discuss all the rules regarding employee rewards and penalties, and set the maximum deduction limit to employee monthly performance bonus.
Correct the current financial booking method upon receiving employee penalties, instead of booking directly into PnL, book the refundable penalties into Other Payables to employees.
与GFPS亚洲区人力资源总监、亚大集团人力资源总监和亚大集团法务部讨论，明确河北亚大汽车的整体激励和处罚制度，所有类型的工资扣除项（如客户投诉、应收账款回收等）和纪律处罚（如违纪停车、迟到早退等），都应当得到彻底的审阅，以便管理层了解从合法合规角度来看，公司是否可以扣除或要求员工支付哪种处罚，以及采用何种方式（工资扣款或员工直接银行转账）。
在员工激励方面，考虑采用其他替代方法，如取消年度加薪或减少月度绩效奖金，以激励表现不佳的员工，而不是直接从员工工资中扣除。如果不可行，就安排一个正式的职工代表大会，讨论所有关于员工奖惩的规则，并设定员工月度绩效奖金的最高扣减限额。
纠正目前收到员工罚金后的财务记账方法，不直接记入利润表，而是将可退还的罚金记入其他应付员工的款项。

In terms of the margin calculation of sales quotations, ensure that Sales apply the respective annual costs for the entire project lifetime according to the data provided by Finance. Meanwhile, the annual price reduction and sales rebates agreed with the customer during the quotation phase should also be consistently considered in the sales revenue section.
Compare the two costing methods and determine the most reliable one as the data quoted upon approval. If both data need to be provided, the data should be calculated by Finance, and the responsible Finance Staff should also be added in OA request workflow to ensure that data uploaded is verified.
在销售报价的利润率计算过程中，确保销售部按照财务部提供的成本数据分年度应用在整个项目周期中，同时，在报价阶段与客户达成的年降和销售返利也应在销售收入部分予以一致的考虑。
比较两种成本报价方式，确定适用最可靠的一种作为审批时报价的数据，若两项数据都需要提供，则由财务在提供数据给销售，且在OA审批中添加财务的负责同事，确保审批时上传的数据是经过核实的。

Discuss with the GFPS Finance team and define a standard accrual methodology applied for sales annual price drop and rebates. Define clear roles, responsibilities and standard proce-dures among all relevant departments to ensure that complete and accurate sales information could be timely transferred to Finance department, so that proper financial treatments could be booked in the right period and reflect the actual status. Meanwhile, regarding subsidiaries of the same group customer, issue the credit note in template with Chinaust favorable terms to miti-gate any potential legal risks.
与GFPS的相关财务人员进行沟通，确认销售年降和销售返利的预提方法。明确河北亚大汽车各相关部门的角色和责任，制定标准程序，确保完整准确的销售信息能够及时传递给财务部门，以便在正确的时期进行适当的财务处理，反映实际情况。同时，对于同一集团客户的子公司，应以对亚大有利的条款的模板签发贷项凭单，以尽可能规避不必要的潜在法律风险。
Review the thresholds defined in the Delegation of Authorities (DoA) for the approval of frame contracts and adapt if necessary. Make sure, frame contracts are signed according to the DoA.
Make sure all contracts deviating from the standard templates provided by Corporate Legal are reviewed by Corporate Legal accordingly before being signed.

Regulate the supplier audits in a procedural instruction. Create a risk model for the supplier audits and apply the risk model to the audit plan in order to determine an audit frequency based on the risk rating of the respective suppliers. Check whether the number of employees doing supplier audits according to the VDA 6.3 standard should be increased or external resources used.
Define and prepare a tool to report and track the escalation process in case of problems with supplier performance. Ensure that all local escalation processes are properly documented in the tool.

Prepare a concept for the implementation of supplier development, including the criteria for the identification of development projects, the type of services to be provided, the need of personnel skills / resources and a plan to realize the project.

Erstellung einer Übersicht aller aktuell gültigen Verträge welche die wesentlichen Vertragsver-pflichtungen beinhaltet, oder Ausbau der Nutzung von Astras.
Definition eines Verantwortlichen ("Contract Owner") für das Vertragsmanagement gemäss Divisionsweisung 30.

Gewährleistung der Vollständigkeit der Personalakten durch Kommunikation und Verteilung des GF Code of Conduct an die Arbeitnehmer. Erhalt des GF Code of Conducts durch Unterschrift bestätigen lassen und in der jeweiligen Personalakte ablegen.
Quartalsmässige Überprüfung der Rückstellungskalkulation auf Angemessenheit. Analyse der Notwendigkeit in Abstimmung mit lokaler Qualitäts- und Logistikabteilung.

Verwendung eines Standard-Inbetriebnahme- und Aktivierungsprotokolls am Standort Werdohl zur direkten Weitergabe an das SSC Leipzig zum Sicherstellen der zeitnahen Aktivierung des Anlagengutes durch den Finanzsachbearbeiter im SSC. 
Dokumentation der Entscheidungsfindung der gewählten Nutzungsdauern (z. B. durch Referen-zierung zur entsprechenden Kategorie im Nutzungsdauerkatalog der Divisionsweisung 41.
Durchführung von Wiegekontrollen für ein- und ausgehende Lkw's sowie eine Analyse, bei der die Wiegeergebnisse von GFCS Werdohl und dem Käufer verglichen werden können.

Bereinigung des Ersatzteillagers durch systematische Bestands- und Artikelanalyse und inklusive einer Ermittlung von Sicherheitsbeständen unter der Berücksichtigung von Wiederbeschaffungszeiträumen die den Fortlauf der Produktion gefährden könnten. Implementierung eines dokumentierten Ersatzteilentnahmeprozess. Neuordnung und klare Zuweisung fester Lagerplätze aller Ersatzteile unter Einhaltung gängiger Standards (5S).

Durchführung der jährlichen Zielvereinbarungsgespräche mit den in Frage kommenden Mitarbei-tenden. Anwendung des in Me@GF beschriebenen und implementierten Prozesses zur Verein-barung und Dokumentation der Jahresziele.

Physikalische und klare Trennung der Teile nach dem jeweiligen Status. Kennzeichnung der je-weiligen Lagerbereiche, um eine Unterscheidung auf einen Blick zu gewährleisten.
Keine Lagerung von Rohteilen und geblockten Teilen im Warenausgang.

Vertragliche Gestaltung der Rahmenbedingungen (insbesondere die Kostenübernahme im Falle von Inventurdifferenzen oder Schäden am Material) mit Fahrner GmbH. Überprüfung der Not-wendigkeit des externen Lagers.
Einbindung des strategischen Einkaufs in die Vertragsverhandlungen.
Sicherstellung, dass die im Rahmen der jährlichen Stichtagsinventur ermittelten Bestandsdiffe-renzen gemäss den Vorgaben der Delegation of Authorities genehmigt werden und plausibel sind.
Zeitnahe Einplanung eines Audits zur Rezertifizierung des lokalen Umweltmanagementsystems gemäss ISO 14001.

Überprüfung und Aktualisierung der Vertretungs- und Berechtigungsbefugnisse bei HSBC und Deutsche Bank. Zeitnahe Löschung der nicht aktiven Mitarbeitenden aus dem Befugnisverzeichnis bei HSBC und Deutsche Bank.
Use the Anticorruption Questionnaire (Annex 1) to conduct due diligence on all existing and future intermediaries and save evidences used in the assessments.
Update the current headcount and FTE calculation according to the respective definitions. Implement a reconciliation between the headcount and FTE figures reported in Cognos and SIS.

Establish processes to systematically identify, collect, consolidate, document, report and reconcile data necessary to fulfill SIS reporting requirements. Ensure the audit trail from the reported KPIs to supporting evidences is in place and available at-a-glance. Establish a common storage location for all supporting evidences utilized during the SIS reporting.

Develop a methodology (e.g. defined percentage or historical relevant events) to support the additional / discretional provision amount and ensure consistent application in future warranty provision calculations. Discuss and review the updated warranty provision calculation with Division Controlling.
Review the current provision for employee service awards and adjust the calculated provision value accordingly. Include payroll taxes in the PTO accrual calculation.

Based on DI 7323, define a procedure / template that outlines the minimum elements to include in the comparison of supplier quotations in order to enhance comparability and transparency in the supplier selection process.

Ensure available / accepted production material is placed in the appropriate shelf(s) only. Keep walkways between storage shelfs free from pallets / boxes of received components to avoid potential safety hazards (e.g. impaired access to emergency exits or ways).

Ensure that DoA review and approval requirements are complied with. Review the current au-thority levels in the SAP Inventory module and make sure they are consistent with Division and local DoA requirements. Define actions to further prevent reoccurrence of plastic resin contami-nation (e.g. increase size or number of test samples).
Reinforce a formalized review and approval process for exceptional conditions. Communicate the review and approval process to all levels concerned.

Remind employees of current DoA approval thresholds. Ensure that DoA requirements con-cerning credit notes are complied with. Consider to implement a SAP approval workflow that is consistent with DoA review and approval requirements.

Develop a skills matrix for the Quality department covering all necessary skills and knowledge areas applicable to GFPS CP Shawnee. Define target skills and knowledge, assess the Quality department employees as-is status and derive suitable training and / or action items.

Define roles and responsibilities for contract management at GFPS Harvel. Develop a contract overview file including all key criteria (i.e. start date, end date, potential covenants, notice periods, automatic renewal clauses etc.) from all contractual agreements currently in place with GFPS Harvel.

Establish processes to systematically identify, collect, consolidate, report and reconcile data necessary to fulfill environmental as well as health & safety expenses and investments reporting requirements in SIS. Ensure the audit trail from the reported KPIs to supporting evidences (i.e. invoices) is in place.

Assess the risks and benefits of the current business relationships with non-certified waste and recycling suppliers together with Division and Corporate Sustainability. Depending on the results, ensure that all suppliers have local permits, signed GF's Code for Business Partners and are ISO certified or alternative waste and recycling suppliers, meeting GF standards, will be selected.
Include the partially not covered "base business" warranty provision share in the total warranty provision calculation and report the total warrant provision in Cognos accordingly.

Perform profitability assessments for closed investment projects systematically and identify lessons learned. Ensure that identified lesson learned will be shared and considered during comparable future investments projects.

Based on DI 7323, define a procedure / template that outlines the minimum elements to include in the comparison of supplier quotations in order to enhance comparability and transparency in the supplier selection process.

Based on the last performed annual supplier audits, review the correspondent audit reports / check-lists and put in place a monitoring list detailing the audit results, remediation actions, due dates and actual status (e.g. resolved / open). Ensure that a regular follow-up of any eventual observation and remediation plan agreed with the suppliers is available at a glance.
Implement systematical (i.e. pre-defined sample sizes per lot) procedures to verify the quantities delivered.
Ensure that the spare parts storage location will by tidied-up and 5S principles will be followed consistently.

Put in place a preventive maintenance plan with a defined frequency (e.g. annual, quarterly, monthly) covering all production machines. Analyze which maintenance activities have been performed during the last two years to ensure that eventual backlog activities, that were canceled or not fully executed, are considered in the preventive maintenance plan and performed with priority.

Identify critical spare parts in the Easton and Bakersfield plants. Record (i.e. in "Fixx") and account for recorded spare parts accordingly (i.e. by analyzing the current spare parts inventory and determine the corresponding value). Develop and implement a systematical spare parts removal and recording process.

Ensure that the bi-annual spare parts counts performed in Little Rock are in accordance with the methodology required by Division Instruction 3437. Define a procedure for a systematic spare parts stock take for the Bakersfield and Easton plants. Make sure that the initial inventory, the counting sheets and the stock adjustment per part number is documented and retained and that the stock take is performed with the blind count methodology. Also, ensure that spare parts stock adjustments are reviewed and approved by the Plant Manager and escalated to the appropriate authority level in accordance with the DoA prior to the actual booking in the maintenance tool "Fixx".

Agree with Corporate, Division and Business Unit Controlling on the assumptions and the exact parameters to calculate the provision for employee service awards. Record the calculated provision value accordingly in the financial statements. Include payroll taxes in the vacation accrual calculation.
Complete pending annual target agreement and confirmation processes. Identify pending / open target agreements in me@GF timely and remind line managers accordingly.

Further investigate the reason for the unexplained part of the difference of the stock provision. Perform a full stock count and adjust the stock values accordingly. In cooperation with BU Controlling decide on how to account for the changes in the stock value and the stock provision. Re-calculate the stock provision after redesigning the Excel template for the calculation of the stock provision and implement it accordingly.

Renegotiate the SLA with GFPS UK and make sure, the tasks and duties of each party are defined and documented in detail. The procedures for physical stock takes and the coverage of costs in the event of inventory discrepancies should be regulated as well.

Make sure, the consignment stocks are fully counted at least every 3 years by GF employees.  In cooperation with Finance determine the frequency of the stock taking. In cooperation with the Sales and Customer Services prepare a plan for the stock taking of the consignment stock at customer sites by Sales or Field Service Engineers. Prepare and implement a tracking tool for the follow-up of the stock taking at customer sites in order to ensure, that no consignment stock gets forgotten.

Clarify the advantages and disadvantages of creating the invoices for prepayments in SAP and decide on the further proceeding accordingly.  Make sure that the prepayments received are reclassified to liabilities at the end of each peri-od and reported accordingly in Cognos.
Make sure that spare parts returned by the customers are sent back to the hub timely.
Make sure, order confirmations are issued systematically for all machine orders in order to avoid any misunderstandings or deviating assumptions on terms & conditions.

Make sure that the payroll preparation document signed by the MD is sent to GFPS UK together with the payroll preparation document on Excel. Include the reconciliation of these two documents as a mandatory task in the SLA with GFPS on HR and payroll services.
Make sure, the invoices date of machine sales and its revenue recognition corresponds to the transfer of risk according to the applied Incoterm.
Make sure that the warranty provision is reported correctly in Cognos. Investigate the high amount of warranty cost remaining on the accounts of GFMS UK and take action accordingly.

Check whether it would not be possible to systematically issue a notification for every schedule change of machine collection dates. Make sure, all TUs issue delivery schedule documents at least on a monthly basis. Add a column to the delivery schedule documents on Excel with the collection date on the former delivery schedule and mark the changed dates accordingly. Ensure that all TUs follow the same proceeding and use the same templates for notifications and delivery schedules.
Create a local records retention policy ensuring compliance with the requirements from Corporate Instruction 1026.

Communicate, discuss and analyze the identified pending legal cases with GF's Legal team as prescribed by Corporate Instruction 1070 and follow agreed next steps. Ensure reporting requirements from Corporate Instruction 1070 are known and followed.

Systematically collect the approvals from the Business Unit Head where necessary (i.e. where the Anticorruption Questionnaire results in a "No" answer). In addition and to fulfill the requirements of Annex 1 to CI 1061, save supporting evidences used to assess the intermediaries.
Populate the "Cyber Incident Response Binder" (CIRB) with all information required. Ensure that the populated CIRB will be accessible for the local Management team and made available to GF's CISO.

Develop a comprehensive closing checklist including all relevant monthly, quarterly and year-end accounting, controlling and reporting tasks. Review the checklist at the end of each closing period to ensure that all tasks have been completed accordingly.

Define roles and responsibilities for identification, review and analyzing shipments with critical Incoterms from a revenue recognition point of view (i.e. shipments with CFR Incoterms shipped before crucial cut-off dates like June 30th and December 31st). Improve the understanding of key applicable Incoterms (i.e. CFR) by conducting a training with all people involved in the rev-enue recognition analysis procedures during cut-off dates. Ensure that revenue is recognized in the correct accounting period and based on the agreed upon shipping terms.

Analyze and agree with Business Unit, Division and Corporate Controlling the best suitable approach to record a provision for all expected cashback gift related cost. This assessment should conclude whether the full amount of such cashback gifts should be provided for as soon as a sales campaign contract is signed or the cashback gift amounts should be incrementally provided for over the period of a sales campaign. Report all cashback gift cost as sales deductions in Cognos line items 708 / 808 (sales deductions).

Update the current warranty base provision calculation scheme in accordance with Division Instruction 3422 requirements. Ensure that all applicable elements are determined correctly and report the total warrant provision in Cognos accordingly.

Include domestic travel and entertainment expenses booked and invoiced via the travel agency in the travel and entertainment reimbursement form sent for review and approval to the respective line manager. Ensure that the reimbursement form shows a total amount for expenses reimbursable to the employee and a dedicated total for expenses directly paid by the company to avoid any double payout.
Involve the Procurement team in all CAPEX projects at an early stage. Update the local Procurement policy and communicate the updates accordingly.

Make sure, the planned delivery dates of the customer orders are kept up-to-date in the local ERP (IFS) timely. Clean up fulfilled purchase orders with delivery differences. Make sure that purchase orders which are not valid anymore will be cleaned in the system.

Add the planned start and finish dates of the work orders in the production schedule and keep the planned finish dates of the work orders and the planned delivery dates of the customer or-ders in IFS up-to-date. Assess the implementation of a production planning tool (Manufacturing Execution System) with graphical representation of the planning sequence of the work orders by machine.

Review the spare parts stock and define those spare parts to be kept on stock and their mini-mum stock quantity. Define and enter the necessary planning parameters into WMS / IFS in order to plan the spare parts by means of the material requirements planning function (MRP) of the ERP system (IFS).
Use the already existing payroll master data changes report form the local payroll application in the review process of the monthly payroll.

Define roles and responsibilities for contract management at GFMS US. Develop a contract overview file including all key criteria (i.e. start date, end date, potential covenants, notice periods, automatic renewal clauses etc.) from all contractual agreements currently in place with GFMS US.

Conduct due diligence activities for all intermediaries in scope. Save supporting evidences used for the Annex 1 assessments. Implement a process and define roles & responsibilities to ensure future intermediaries will be assessed accordingly. Document the implementation efforts and status concerning CI 1061 in one summary spreadsheet.
Agree with Division Management on the future handling of such approval requirements. Communicate the agreed upon approach to all employees concerned.

Implement a standard template to record the supporting calculations for all second hand machines including trade-in value, estimated fair market value, margin deduction and estimated refurbishment costs. Ensure the calculations are documented and made according to the GFMS Stock Directive.

Agree with Corporate and Division Controlling on the assumptions and the exact parameters to calculate the provision for employee service awards. Record the calculated provision value accordingly in the financial statements.
Include payroll taxes in the vacation accrual calculation.

Reconcile the approved insured credit limits tracked in the Excel spreadsheet with the decided credit limits saved in the local ERP periodically. For customer accounts where the current decided credit limit in the ERP is set to zero (even though a credit limit has been approved by Coface), ensure that those decided credit limits are updated in the ERP system.
