对生产人员进行培训，准确在MES系统中报告每个生产订单中产生的不合格产品数量并作为运营报告的数据基础。每月实施内部控制，以识别和分析MES中报告的不合格产品与回收料的线下记录清单之间的数量差异。
如果和事业部门确认，运营报告和MES系统中都不需要对大量的试制废料进行记录，则应当在现在的人工回收料记录中填写哪些是试制料哪些是正常订单的不合格报废，以确保可追溯性以及出现大量试制废料是否合理的评审。
与市政事业部讨论现有回收料的解决方案包括积压回收料的质量检测和重新投料要求。同时向市场上的潜在客户推广回收量添加比例要求低的水管项目，以保证毛利回报的同时解决现有库存压力。

Disable the Admin user rights for all the employees except for the IT Specialist and implement regular sample reviews on employees' PC to ensure proper software controls. 
Reconcile the Windows and Office licenses and remark the versions with the corresponding PC.
Differentiate the accesses of employees to the various files on the shared drive or implement password controls for certain sensitive files. 
Set password controls for the Wi-Fi connection on the production floor, to ensure network connection only accessible to those who need to perform or read activities on the mobile MES.
Place the flammable materials observed in the server room elsewhere and record the visits to the server room.
Deliver IT training to new hires upon on-boarding, including the usage of the back-up drive, the password change requirements, and other data protection requirements shared by GFPS, Lingyun Group, and Chinaust Group.
Emphasize the importance of storing files on the drive with automatic back-up functions for all concerned users and install firewall software on all the PCs.
解除除IT专员之外的所有员工的管理员用户权限或增加定期随机抽查流程以确保足够的软件控制。
将购买的Windows和Office许可证相应列示在现有的电脑清单上，同时列明具体版本。
区分不同员工对共享盘上各种文件的访问权限，或对某些敏感文件加以密码控制。
为生产车间的Wi-Fi连接实施密码控制，只能用以内部员工移动端MES操作。
移除在服务器机房中看到的易燃材料，并对机房的人员进出进行记录。
为新入职员工提供IT培训，包括培训如何使用具有自动备份功能的网盘、密码定期更改要求以及GFPS, 凌云和亚大集团共享的其他IT培训要求。
向员工强调将文件存储在自动备份盘上的重要性，并在所有PC端上安装防火墙软件。

Understand the category definition and data collection method of the aforementioned errors and use the correct methods for the 2022 annual SIS data reporting.
In case of any confusion, consult the GFPS SIS responsible person before finalizing the 2022 SIS annual reporting.
理解上述错误的类别定义和数据收集方法，并使用正确的方法进行2022年度SIS数据的报填报。
如有任何不确认的问题，在关闭2022 SIS年报前联系GPSP SIS的负责人进行咨询。

Deliver instructions on the adjustment for the monthly HBII COGNOS reporting to concerned Controllers of the Chinaust Utility entities.
Review the adjustments of the accumulative impacts (from January to October) in HBII COGNOS in October closing for all the concerned entities.
将每月需进行外方COGNOS报告的调整要求传达给亚大市政事业部各个公司的相关财务负责人。
审阅所有相关公司在10月关账时对外方COGNOS累积影响（从1月到10月）的调整是否正确。

Based on the annual price lists from various suppliers and other ad-hoc price updates, the Purchasing department should generate and maintain one price list, which could be used for both stock evaluation and routine invoice verification purposes.
Update the latest purchasing and sales prices quarterly, and correct the semi-finished goods NRV calculation method, to better reflect the NRV of such materials. 
Based on the most accurate NRV, compare it with the stock cost and consider if proper provi-sions should be made whenever necessary.
根据各个供应商的年度价格表和其他定期的价格更新，由采购部门生成一份价格表，可用于库存价值的评估和日常发票验证的流程。
季度更新存货价值评估表中的最新采购和销售价格，更正半成品可变现净值的计算方法，以更好地反映此类材料的实际市场价值。
根据最准确的可变现净值，将其与库存成本进行比较，并考虑是否应在必要时做出适当的存货减值准备。

The monthly meeting participated by Finance, Operation, Sales, and potentially Technical department (in case BOM requires an adjustment after analysis) should be held every month. During these meetings, root causes should be identified, and actions should be made and agreed on. Meeting minutes need to be maintained to record the actions for continuous follow-up as well. In addition, as for the content of the margin analysis, not only negative margins should be reported, but low margins, such as margins below 10%, should also be highlighted and acted on.
由财务、运营、销售和可能的技术部门参加的月度会议（如果出现 BOM 在分析后需要调整）应按月举行。在这些会议期间，应确定根本原因，并应采取行动并达成一致意见。需要维护会议记录以记录持续跟进的行动。此外，对于毛利分析的内容，不仅要分析毛利，低毛利，例如10%以下，也需要列示并采取行动。

Set up an annual control in comparing the internal variable costs and outsourcing costs to weigh the benefits and potential compliance risks in outsourcing certain manufacturing processes.
建立年度控制程序，比较内部制造变动成本和外包费用，以衡量将某些内部生产流程转为外包的收益和可能带来的合规风险。

A process should be established to firstly regulate how the annual assessment of credit limits shall be made and approved. Whenever new customers are introduced between the annual reviews, the credit limit of the customer should be separately assessed and approved. Once a reasonable credit limit list is in place, sales order delivery control should be implemented accordingly. Clear reasons should be documented, reviewed, and approved for the orders delivered when credit limits are exceeded.
Implement the automatic notification control by the new ERP system NCC (in the "Credit Management" module) based on the credit limits aligned.
应建立流程，首先规范年度授信额度评估的制定和审批方式。在年度审核期间，每当引入新客户时，应单独评估和批准客户的信用额度。一旦制定了合理的信用额度清单，应相应实施销售订单发货控制。应记录、审查和批准处于信用风险中的订单的明确原因。
通过新的ERP系统NCC（“信用管理”模块中）基于核定的信用实现自动通知控制。

Vendor master data should be established jointly by Purchasing and Finance departments used for manual verification. In case of any urgent payments prior to the due date, approval and rationale should be obtained.
In launching the NCC ERP system, configure the vendor master data as a database to enable automatic payment runs based on invoice dates.
During the transition period before NCC implementation, an independent review of payment terms should be enforced by the Finance department based on the master data on hand. Upon individual payment request, payment term could be further optimized per week based on the contractual term.
由采购和财务部门共同建立供应商主数据，用于增加发票核对环节的有效性。如在到期日前有任何紧急付款需求，应获得批准和理由解释。
在NCC ERP系统上线时，录入供应商主数据用以自动按发票日期计算付款日。
在NCC系统尚未投入使用的过渡阶段，财务部门应根据现有的主数据对付款期限进行独立审查。根据每一笔单独的付款请求，根据合同条款按周优化付款期限。

Based on the existing and approved annual CAPEX list, create an additional sheet for new projects (out-of-budget) with the application status and the authorized investment limits.
Meanwhile, add associated NC fixed assets or AuC codes (actual costs) to the CAPEX project list for better transparency in the overall CAPEX controlling. 
Upon asset capitalization, break down the project into individual fixed assets which could be solely recognized and depreciated, rather than group them in one asset number. 
While reviewing the individual asset application, Finance Manager should trace back to the approved annual CAPEX list and check if it is included or not, and if the total amount exceeds the approved limit, and request approval from the proper authorities.
根据现有和批准的年度资本预算清单，为新的预算外项目创建一个附加表，其中包含批复状态和授权的投资额度。
同时，将相关的NC固定资产或在建工程编号（实际成本）添加到投资项目清单中，以提高整体投资预算控制的透明度。
在项目资本化时，将项目拆分至可单独使用和折旧的合理资产单元入账，而不是打包计入一个资产编号。
财务经理在审核单项资产申请时，应追溯到批准的年度资本预算清单，检查其是否包括在内，总金额是否超过批准的额度等，并按DoA申请相关部门批准。

It is suggested that the HR department delivers training to all department managers in terms of how to perform and document the development interviews for defined high-potential employees. If there are no actions needed for arranging training while on-job development is preferred, it is suggested to specify the areas or projects for the employee to lead/participate in. 
From the HR side, HR should collect and summarize all the actions defined and perform regular tracking for the completion status, if certain topics (such as English skills) are repeatedly raised, internal training should be arranged, or external training should be considered.
建议人力资源部门对所有部门经理进行培训，了解如何对已定义的高潜员工进行发展访谈及如何记录在表中。 如果不需要安排培训而是更倾向于在职学习，建议明确员工预计领导或参与的工作领域或项目。
在人力资源方面，应收集和总结所有定下的培养计划，并定期跟踪完成情况，如果某些话题（如英语技能）反复提出，则应安排集中内部培训或考虑外部培训。

Understand the category definition and data collection method of the aforementioned errors and use the correct methods for 2022 annual SIS data reporting.
In case of any confusion, consult the GFPS SIS responsible person before finalizing the 2022 SIS annual reporting.
理解上述错误的类别定义和数据收集方法，并使用正确的方法进行2022年度SIS数据的报填报。
如有任何不确认的问题，在关闭2022 SIS年报前联系GPSP SIS的负责人进行咨询。

Consult Chinaust Legal to incorporate certain clauses in the contract for scrap sales to keep unqualified products out of the marketplace.
Define a standard scrapping procedure to ensure that the functionalities of the products are fully damaged to eliminate any possibility of resale.
Require the packaging suppliers to correct the logo printed on the packages as soon as possible and return the incorrect ones on stock to the suppliers for replacement.
咨询亚大法务，在废品销售合同中加入特定条款，以防止不合格产品进入市场。
定义一套报废标准流程，以确保产品的功能被完全损坏以杜绝任何再次销售的可能性。
要求包装供应商尽快纠正包装上印刷的标识，将库存中不正确标识的包装物退给供应商进行更换。

Check the completeness of the current critical spare parts list and define safety stock levels for those applicable to multiple machines, with long lead-time, and of high importance. 
Purchase approval could be made on the safety stock list, which could support subsequent purchase requests as justification.
Monitor the stock level of critical spare parts regularly to ensure timely replenishment.
If there is a shortage of professionals in charge of spare parts management, apply to Chinaust Group to supplement the current personnel to ensure the existing maintenance tasks could be fulfilled, while there are sufficient employees responsible for spare parts management.
检查当前关键备件清单的完整性，并为交付周期长、重要性高、适用机器台数多的备件定义安全库存水平。
可在安全库存清单上进行采购批准，用以作为正当理由支持后续采购请求。
定期监控关键备件的库存水平，确保及时采购补充。
若负责备件的专业人员不足，向集团申请补充人员以确保在现有维修任务完成的情况下，也有足够负责备件管理的同事。

The DoA should be clarified in terms of what kind of contracts/orders should go through the review and approval process. Customer orders that are actually used as contract should also follow the review process, and if the order template stays the same for subsequent orders, no repeated approval is needed. Additionally, it needs to be ensured that the contract must be signed after proper approval has been obtained.
DoA应明确何种合同或订单应经过审查和批准流程。实际用作合同的客户订单也应经过审核流程，如后续订单的订单模板保持不变，则无需重复审批。此外需确保在获得适当批准后才能签署合同。

An authorization matrix should be established to provide clear guidance on the discount thresholds allocated to different authority levels. 
In the meantime, the definition of large and small-scale sales should be differentiated so that it is clear to the Sales department in which cases a sales margin must be calculated upfront and in which cases discount approval is enough.
应建立授权矩阵，为分配给不同授权级别的折扣限制提供明确的指引。
同时，要区分大、小规模销售的定义，让销售部门清楚哪些情况需要预先计算销售毛利，哪些情况下可以直接采取折扣审批的形式。

Chinaust Utility Business Segment should issue a directive, regulating clearly in different cases, how the gross margin of fitting products should be calculated and approved. 
Whenever the price is set to be below the inter-company price, the gross margin should be calculated following a defined and consistent methodology and approved properly.
亚大市政事业部应发布指引，明确规定不同情况下管件产品毛利率的计算和审批方式。 
每当价格设定为低于公司内部价格时，毛利率应按照既定和一致的方法计算并适当批准。

Disable the Administrator user rights for all the employees except for the IT staff and implement regular sample reviews on employees' PCs to ensure proper software controls before an automatic solution is introduced. Set system-enforced password change requirements every three months for both Windows and software user accounts.
除 IT 人员外，禁用所有员工的管理员用户权限，并定期对员工的个人电脑进行抽样检查，以确保在引入自动解决方案前对软件下载进行适当控制。
为 Windows 和软件用户账户设置系统强制密码更改要求，每三个月更改一次。

Limit the identified user access in the ERP NC system and its new version NCC to their actual function.
Review the current NC user access to eliminate any other shared accounts in use within or across departments.
将ERP NC系统及其新版本 NCC 系统中已确定的用户访问权限限制在其实际职位功能范围内。
审查当前的 NC 用户访问权限，杜绝部门内部或跨部门使用的任何其他共享NC账户。

When performing the reconciliation confirmations of fixed assets at subcontractors as the alternative to physical count, the Finance department should provide the count sheets extracted from the ERP system NC, to ensure completeness. Meanwhile, the count sheets should be divided by storage location, which is more pragmatic for the counting staff and could improve effectiveness.
After obtaining the count results, perform reconciliation between the count result and the fixed asset register instead of sheets from the Production department or even the subcontractors.
In terms of assets identified with incorrect locations, this should be counted as the differences in the count report, analyzed for root cause, and corrected promptly.
在对外协加工商处的固定资产进行对账确认以替代实物清点时，财务部门应提供从NC 系统中导出完整盘点表，以确保完整性。同时，盘点表应按存放地点划分，这对盘点人员来说更便于操作，也更能体现盘点的有效性。
在获得盘点结果后，应将盘点结果与财务的资产登记表进行核对，而不是使用生产部门甚至外协加工商的表单。
对于清点出的位置不正确的资产，应计入整体盘点报告中的差异，分析其根本原因并及时纠正。

Reinforce the bidding process for subcontracting services by delivering training to the concerned employees to comply with the internal process requirements upon contract renewal.
加强外协加工商的招投标程序，在续签合同时也对相关员工进行培训以遵守相关流程要求。

Reinforce the importance of proper traceability and transparency of the internal controls on vendor bidding and selection processes to the local team.
Regarding the vendor assessment, deliver training to the concerned department managers to ensure the results are delivered based on the same standards and methods.
向当地团队强调供应商招投标过程中内部控制的可追溯性和透明度的重要性。
在供应商评估方面，对相关部门经理进行培训，确保根据相同的标准和方法提供评估结果。

Procurement should include staffing agencies in the scope of supplier periodic review and maintain review documentation for continuous supplier performance improvement.
Clarify the defined evaluation methods of the subcontracting and logistics suppliers to the concerned employees to ensure the data accuracy and completeness of the evaluation results.
采购部门应将人事代理机构纳入供应商定期评估，并保存审查文件，以便持续改进供应商的绩效。
向相关员工明确外协加工商和物流供应商的既定评估方法，确保评估结果数据的准确性和完整性。

Obtain legal advice for a specific consignment agreement template to reduce the chances of errors and misunderstandings while clearly outlining the rights and obligations of each party, such as insurance requirements to the vendors for the stocks consigned.
获取特定委托协议模板的法律建议，以减少出现错误和误解的机会，同时明确概述各方的权利和义务，例如对供应商的寄售库存的投保要求。

After interfacing the three systems (NCC, APS, and MES) with each other, perform regular order fulfillment checks to ensure OTIF as per customer requirements, and major root causes are analyzed and solved, such as the operational issues by the employees, the data transfer issues by the configuration, etc.
将三个系统（NCC、APS 和 MES）相互对接后，定期检查订单执行情况，确保符合客户及时交付的要求，并分析和解决主要的根本原因，如员工的操作问题、配置的数据传输问题等。

Work with the external application provider on possible automated solutions for the reconciliation process between the SCADA and MES systems.
If not feasible, then manually document the testing results of the samples inspected in the MES system or a tracking list.
与外部应用程序提供商合作，为 SCADA 和 MES 系统之间的调节过程提供可能的自动解决方案。如果不可行，则在 MES 系统或跟踪清单中手动记录检测样品的检测结果。

Incorporate all the quality costs arising from internal operations into the calculation method of the internal quality costs. 
In case of any special reasons, mark the rationale behind, and define action plans whenever necessary after analysis.
将内部运营产生的所有质量成本纳入内部质量成本的计算方法中。
如有特殊原因，应在分析后标明原因并在必要时制定整改计划。

Define an internal procedure for stocktaking of tooling, molds, and prototypes, including planning, execution and documentation aspects.
Counting sheets should be generated from the internal system MES instead of obtained from the vendors, which should include the storage location, count date and be signed by the ones performing and supervising the count.
Replace the current paper labels on some of the tooling and molds with metal ones to facilitate the stocktaking process.
确定工装、模具和样件库存盘点的内部程序，包括计划、执行和记录等方面。
清点单应由内部系统 MES 生成，而不是从外协供应商处获得，盘点单据应包括存放地点、清点日期，并由盘点人员和监督人员的签字。
用金属标签取代部分工装和模具上的纸质标签，以方便识别和盘点的工作。

Perform regular reviews of the open cases reported in MES regarding defective products to ensure transparent and traceable tracking of analysis and further proceedings by the Quality department.
定期审查 MES 系统中报告的有关缺陷产品的未结案例，确保对质量部门的分析和进一步程序进行透明和可追踪的跟踪。

Based on current internal labor capacity, customer sales forecasts, and market trends, discuss with Chinaust Group and Chinaust Business Unit Automotive to balance out the current three labor sources among FTE, contractors and outsourced activities. 
After agreement, the schedule should be defined and phased over the coming months and years with adjustments needed based on the latest market changes, in order to comply with or at least get closer to the local regulations step by step.
根据当前的内部劳动力能力、客户销售预测和市场趋势，与亚大集团和亚大汽车事业部讨论如何在全职员工、承包商和外包活动中平衡当前的三个劳动力来源。
达成一致意见后，应确定时间表，并在未来数月或数年内分阶段实施，同时根据最新的市场变化进行必要调整，以逐步符合或至少接近当地法规。

Prepare a checklist of the monthly payroll preparation and validation processes, of which all the newcomers and leavers should be individually checked and reviewed before payment.
Reinforce the validation process and retain all the review trails in a documented manner.
指定一份月度工资单的编制和验证的流程核对表，其中针对所有新入职人员和离职人员都应在付款前进行逐一检查和审查。
加强验证过程，并以文件形式保留所有核对的记录。

Incorporate all the payroll types in the file to be validated by the local Managing Director, to ensure control completeness. 
Put the local General Manager in a copy of the Email sent to the HR Manager of Chinaust Shanghai Auto for payroll processing so that the monthly payroll data validated by both parties is the same.
将所有薪资类型纳入由分公司总经理审批的文件中，以确保控制的完整性。将发送给上海亚大汽车人事经理的薪资电子邮件抄送给分公司总经理，确保双方审批的月度薪资数据相同。

Develop handling rules for customer invitations in line with the requirements from Corporate Instruction 1061. Add these rules to the local employee handbook and local travel and entertainment policy. Ensure that employees claiming expenses for invitations document the names, levels and number of guest on the corresponding receipts and / or in the Excel reimbursement template.

Establish processes to systematically identify and collect data necessary to fulfill SIS reporting requirements. Develop a comprehensive Excel overview as well as a corresponding folder structure on the local share drive to consolidate reporting relevant data. Ensure that the audit trail from reported KPIs to supporting evidences (i.e. invoices) is in place.

Where possible, re-negotiate unfavorable Incoterms (i.e. CPT customer destination) to more favorable ones (i.e. EXW or FCA). Define roles and responsibilities for identification, review and analyzing shipments with critical Incoterms from a revenue recognition point of view (i.e. shipments shipped before crucial cut-off dates like June 30th and December 31st).

Develop a calculation methodology with elements that are comparable with other entities or exception scenarios within the Division to support the additional / discretional provision amount.
Discuss and review the updated warranty provision calculation methodology with Business Unit, Division and Corporate Controlling. 
Ensure consistent application in future warranty provision calculations.
Review the current vacation accrual calculation and adjust the calculated accrual value accordingly with the actual vacation balances per employee.

Put in place stock management review and classification procedures in accordance with DI 5896 methodology. Perform the review at least twice a year as required by the aforementioned Division Instruction.

Define suitable logistic KPIs (i.e. with the support of the Division Logistics team) to measure the service quality systematically. Conduct the analysis regularly (i.e. annually) and derive suitable actions to improve the service quality or utilize the KPIs in price negotiations.

Implement a process that addresses sales orders ready for fulfilment with the responsible Sales Managers timely. Ensure that shipping confirmations are either collected timely from customers by the responsible Sales Managers or that the order processing team can agree / arrange shipments bilaterally with customers.
Ensure the various operational teams eliminate the safety hazards identified. All issues identified in the future should be treated with high attention and immediate corrective actions.

Record manually tracked time spent and spare parts used systematically in SAP. Perform an overall cost and hours spent analysis on machine level and derive corresponding actions and corrective measures.

Identify critical spare parts in the already existing Excel spreadsheet. Add the spare parts values to the already existing spare parts inventory file and account for spare parts accordingly by applying an agreed on (i.e. with BU, Division and Corporate Controlling) threshold. Consult with the SAP team to assess the possibility of implementing the SAP Preventive Maintenance (SAP PM) module to record and account for spare parts.

Ensure that Division Instruction 3423 will be updated and aligned with the definitions from the Finance manual. Communicate the updated Division Instruction to all relevant employees. Update the current headcount calculation according to the respective definitions. Ensure that the updated figures are reported accordingly in Cognos and SIS.
Re-assess the current target bonus appraisal model and consider a higher overall cap to foster employee motivation (i.e. during the planned implementation of functional levels by Division HR).
Update the current strategy with topics related to Sustainabilty aligned to Coproate and Divisional expectations.

Develop a contract overview including all key criteria from all local supplier contractual agree-ments currently in place with GFPS UK.
Consider using GFPS Global Procurement's software solution "Astras" to upload all contracts to monitor them properly.

Put a focus on the collection of a singed version of the Compliance and Distributor Agreement for the intermediaries with the highest sales volume. If an intermediary does not cooperate with the necessary signature on GF's Compliance and Distributor Agreement, forward the communica-tion with the intermediary to the Corporate Compliance Officer for further instructions. Make sure, supporting documentation is retained for each non-cooperative intermediary.

Reduce the total petty cash balance to an appropriate level based on a quarterly cash demand review. Check if petty cash funds can be closed and transferred to the checking accounts.
Exchange the not recognized petty cash fund into a major currency and transfer it to the check-ing accounts.

Consider reducing the number of one-time customer accounts to only one. Define a policy to define with what volume (i.e. only below GBP 1000) and / or numbers of transactions (i.e. maxi-mum 2 per year per customer) a new customer has to be created in the system.

Timely recording of the returned and defective items in the dedicated overview. 
Ensure the proper storage of quarantined items in the dedicated area and process the cases in a timely manner.

Ensure distributors with consignment stocks adhere to the agreements regarding inventory count. Assign a dedicated GFPS UK employee to particiapte in the counts. Document the results appropriately. Implement a follow up process (i. e. friendly reminders via Email) if the consignees do not share the information voluntarily as mentioned in the contract.

Perform a margin analysis on a project level taking all cost and rebates in consideration after a prefabrication project is finished. With the implementation of SAP MTO by the end of December 2022, establish a report to compare the planned margin with the actual margin in the system.
Ensure the various operational teams eliminate the safety hazards identified. All issues identified in the future should be treated with high attention and immediate corrective actions.

Develop handling rules for invitations and gifts in line with the requirements from Corporate Instruction 1061. Add these rules to the local travel and entertainment policy. Communicate the new requirements to all employees concerned.

Put a focus on the collection of a signed version of the GF Compliance Agreement for the in-termediaries with the highest sales volume. If intermediaries refuse to sign the GF Compliance Agreement, consult the Corporate Compliance Officer to discuss further proceedings and / or consider to discontinue business relationships.

Establish processes to systematically identify and collect data necessary to fulfill SIS reporting requirements. Develop a comprehensive Excel overview as well as a corresponding folder structure on the local share drive to consolidate health, safety and environmental cost and investments relevant data in a single place. Ensure that the audit trail from reported KPIs to supporting evidences (i.e. invoices) is in place.
Implement a review process concerning manual journal entries that ensures that the 4-eyes principle is complied with (i.e. either on local level or with the support of the SSC or BU Controlling).
Resolve all aged quality cases. Implement a transparent process and reporting to timely detect aged cases in the future.

Put in place an agreement with the external logistics provider covering key elements like insurance coverage and stock differences. Consult with Corporate Legal during the agreement drafting phase where necessary.

Define suitable logistic KPIs to measure the service quality systematically. Conduct the analysis regularly (i.e. annually) and derive suitable actions to improve the service quality or utilize the KPIs in price negotiations.

Assess the possibility to implement the already existing Division CRM solution (MS Dynamics 365). In case the existing Division CRM solution will not be implemented, ensure that customer specific knowledge will be documented and accessible.

Define suitable criteria to assess and compare the performance of each intermediary. Consider to discontinue business relationships with intermediaries where the generated margins and revenue do not offset the administrative and maintenance effort.

Develop sales margin analysis on product group, customer and sales order level (i.e. for pre-fabrication orders). Establish a report to compare the planned margin with the actual margin and derive corrective actions where necessary.

Remind employees of current DoA approval requirements concerning free-of-charge deliveries. Establish internal processes (i.e. SAP delivery block) to ensure that requirements from the DoA concerning free-of-charge deliveries are complied with.

Implement a process to systematically follow-up on customer quotations (i.e. after a pre-defined period). Define suitable sales efficiency KPIs like the hit rate and derive corresponding action items.

Make sure to keep all contracts in electronic form in one place. Prepare and keep up-to-date a list of contracts including information about contract title, purpose, expiry date, notice period, responsible person, and physical location of the paper version of the contract.

Review the job profile of the HSE Officer and make sure it includes all relevant tasks, such as:

Knowing the Corporate and Divisional standards on sustainability and applying them to GFPS Indonesia. 

Defining sustainability targets (in cooperation with the management of GFPS Indonesia and the Corporate and Divisional sustainability departments).

Defining a sustainability monitoring system in line with SIS-reporting.

Perform the SIS reporting.

Lead / coordinate sustainability related projects.

Assess the skills of the HSE Officer and make sure he gets the necessary trainings to fill the gaps uncovered in the assessment.

Establish processes to systematically identify and collect data necessary to fulfill SIS reporting requirements. Develop a comprehensive Excel overview as well as a corresponding folder structure on the local share drive to consolidate reporting relevant data. Ensure that the audit trail from reported KPIs to supporting evidences (i.e. invoices) is in place.

Make sure that the values reported in Cognos related to the statutory statement (HB I) are the same as being used for local statutory reporting according to the IFRS standard. Report the differences to Swiss GAAP FER (HB II) accordingly in the Cognos tables K8HB and K9HB.
Make sure that the formal signatory rights of the former MD on the bank accounts are withdrawn as quickly as possible.

Analyze the rental pool and identify the machines needed. Decide on the further proceeding (scrapping, selling, allocation to fabrication) for machines sorted out.

Consider selling the rental machines from the production company to the trading company.

Re-allocate all the machines not belonging to the rental pool to the respective asset class.

Review the standard operating procedure (SOP) for the machine rental process and make sure that all relevant process steps are properly documented. Add flowcharts where adequate.
Consider incentivizing sales employees on timely cash collection by defining respective targets linked to the individual employee's STI.

Define and follow clear rules, when a customer will be blocked from credit sales if he does not settle the already overdue balances in time. Define and follow clear rules for taking legal actions for customers refusing to pay overdue balances.

For travel, entertainment and gifts define approval levels depending on the type and amount of the expenses. Prepare a local regulation for travel, entertainment and gifts. Make sure, it is in line with Corporate Instruction 1061. Communicate the regulation accordingly.

Make sure that comparison tables are created to support purchasing decisions with several suppliers and that the tables also include commercial parameters (e.g. payment terms) and technical specifications where applicable. Document the requirement to create comparison tables in the standard operating procedure (SOP) "Requisition and Purchase Goods" accordingly.

Identify the overaged articles on stock and decide on the further proceeding by article (keeping it on stock, selling it on discount, selling to other GF companies, shipping back to the DCS, scrapping). 

Define a policy on which articles to be kept on stock and implement it accordingly.

Have the contract template in Indonesian checked by a local attorney and adapt it to local requirements where legally needed. Specify the missing information on Short Term Incentives in the employment contracts. Roll out the changed contracts accordingly.

In cooperation with the CSSC review the process of capitalization of tangible and intangible assets in order to make sure that assets are capitalized timely.

In cooperation with Division and Corporate Controlling define rules of how to ensure a timely and / or partial transfer of assets from assets under construction to the respective asset category considering the operational start-up of specific asset components (especially for large projects).

Define and implement a process for regular monitoring and clean-up of aged GR/IR positions (i.e. ensuring that matching positions are cleaned up timely). In cooperation with the SAP Team, optimize the SAP transaction F.13 in order to increase the number of open GR/IR positions automatically offset.

When performing the fixed asset take, ensure that assets are counted and recorded completely. Apply the 4-eyes-principle to achieve required assurance on the counting result. Consider to perform the fixed asset take only every 3 to 5 years instead of annually.

Check the implementation of a barcode tagging system for the tangible fixed assets by putting a tag with a barcode on each asset, adding the tag ID to the respective asset position in SAP and doing the asset takes by means of a mobile bar code scanner.

Instruct the sales companies on SAP to enter their sales orders wherever possible directly in SAP instead of sending them in form of Excel or pdf documents.

Check with the SAP Team the possibilities to enter the sales orders from the sales company in India automatically and without the need of releasing them one-by-one. Implement the solution accordingly in cooperation with the sales company in India.

Amend the local expense reporting policy by a paragraph regulating the granting and accepting of gifts and entertainment expenses. Make sure, the local regulation is in line with Corporate Instruction 1061. Communicate the regulation accordingly. Add the respective approval limits to the local DoA accordingly.

In order to achieve a higher completion rate of all CI 1061 requirements, develop a risk-based prioritization scheme together with Corporate Compliance. According to the results of the agreed on scheme, ask the intermediaries to sign the GF Compliance Agreement. In case of refusal, agree next steps with Corporate Compliance.

Prepare a concept of how to optimize the warehouse situation including an analysis of the current situation, the risks involved, the possible options including their costs and the actions to be taken. Consider the need for space for possible insourcing of the outsourced customization / assembly works for the domestic market.
Make sure the stock counting lists do not include the stock quantities recorded in SAP.

Perform the material requirement planning with support from SAP MRP. Set and maintain the planning parameters in the material master on SAP accordingly. Make sure, the respective staff of GFPS Japan gets proper training of the corresponding SAP functionalities.
Nominate substitutes for each function of GFMS Japan, document them accordingly in the job / function descriptions and (cross) train the workforce accordingly.

In coordination with the BU APAC and the local representatives of GFPS and GFCS prepare a project concept for the improvement of the premises situation of GFMS Japan including possible solutions and their cost. Present the concept to the GFMS Division Management and decide on the further proceeding in cooperation with Division Management, BU APAC as well as the Divisions GFPS and GFCS.

Define approval levels depending on the type and amount of the expenses for entertainment and gifts. Amend the domestic travel policy with a regulation for entertainment and gifts. Make sure, it is in line with Corporate Instruction 1061. Communicate the regulation accordingly and ensure sufficient awareness among the employees.

Identify the customers operating as intermediaries. Assess the intermediaries' compliance related risks according to a scheme to be agreed with Corporate Compliance. For the intermediaries meeting the agreed requirements perform the compliance assessment according to Annex 1 of Corporate Instruction 1061 and ask them to sign the GF Compliance Agreement according to Annex 2 of Corporate Instruction 1061. In case of refusal, first check on the availability of a code of conduct comparable to the GF Compliance Agreement on customer side. If such a code of conduct is not available, agree on the next steps with Corporate Compliance.
Develop a procedure to ensure a timely and accurate reporting of the required key figures in SIS. Make sure, the reported values are covered by calculations and backed by evidencing documents.
Make sure the stock taking is performed according to the blind counting method, i.e. that the counting lists do not include the stock balance values recorded in iScala.
Clean up the open purchase orders in iScala by reviewing the order entries older than 6 months and cancel the orders no longer valid.

Evaluate the reasons for the low NPS and prepare a concept of how to improve the situation in short- and mid-term. Define corresponding actions and implement them accordingly.

Make sure that the hotline is always operated by a qualified person by defining a schedule for the hotline service. Make sure that the customers are called back by a technical specialist in due time. Measure and report the 1st callback times according to the rules defined by the Division.
On a quarterly basis check the impact of the exchange rate USD - JPY on the margin of the spare parts and adapt the spare part prices to the new exchange rate accordingly.

On a quarterly basis, identify the wire positions on stock and take action for the materials close the expiry (try to send them back to the supplier for replacement, sell them with discount or mark them for scrapping).

Liaise with GFMS and GF Central IT in setting up a professional server room that is individually climate controlled with dual air-conditioning units. Appropriate fire and water protection should be installed. The server room should have restricted access to authorized personnel only.

Include introduction to Corporate Instructions in the standard onboarding process for new hires. Instruct employees to familiarize themselves with the policies that need to be closely followed during their daily work based on their role. For existing employees, make a one-time communica-tion to highlight the same topic.
Liaise with the Corporate CISO to implement the CIRB at GFMS Microlution.

Ensure all figures entered in SIS are supported by a traceable underlying calculation and related invoices or equivalent documents. Enter figures by copying and pasting figures from underlying spreadsheets instead of manually typing in the numbers to reduce data entry errors. Apply a four-eyes checking before submitting final figures wherever possible.

Define a standard set of materials to be kept in consultation with a professional supplier of work-place first aid kits. Periodically inspect, refill or replace materials in the kits, for example through an external service provider.
Ensure manual journal entries made by the Financial Controller are subject to a documented re-view by the Managing Director.
Book the missing depreciation for the stock machines and ensure all future machines are depreciated according to the applicable divisional directive.

Agree with Division and Corporate Controlling on the assumptions and the exact parameters to calculate the provision for employee service awards. Record the calculated provision value accordingly in the financial statements.
Work with GF lawyer in the US to draft and sign a contract with the warehouse service provider including clear liability definitions.
Ensure cycle counting is conducted consistently to reach the minimum coverage of 80% of inventory value by year-end.
Obtain written approval for all scrapped inventory according to the applicable DoA.

For high value spare parts above a certain internally defined value, ensure a proper consignment agreement is signed with the customer regardless of whether the spare parts will be subject to a rental fee. For the remaining spare parts of lower value, consider applying the billing first process that is already applied by the GFMS Hub.
Create work instructions for the most frequently sold machine types as and when more resources become available in the Industrial Engineering team.
Follow the purchase requisition and purchase order process for external maintenance services to ensure proper documented approval before service delivery.
Define and train a local employee to be responsible for maintaining the management system doc-umentation in MS2 for GFMS Microlution.
Define standardized quality inspection plans including exact measurements or tests to be taken for each incoming material requiring inspection.
Liaise with Corporate Legal in defining a suitable solution to secure intellectual property rights for GF.

Perform an analysis of the differences between the standard cost and the transfer prices on quarterly basis and adapt the standard cost where applicable, i.e. in the cases where the difference is higher than 10%.
Make sure the actually received quantities are booked to stock. Book the remaining differences on the GR/IR account accordingly on a monthly basis.

Perform an analysis comparing local (i.e. American and Canadian) applicable records retention periods and those prescribed in Corporate Instruction 1026. Develop a local records retention policy derived from the results of the aforementioned comparison.

With the support of the local ERP team, develop a monthly, automated download and matching process of GFMS US' customer and supplier master data against the sanction lists in AEB Compliance Xpress. Ensure that identified matches are resolved timely.

Identify suitable enhancement projects for the currently uncovered focus areas from GF's Sus-tainability Framework. Develop a comprehensive target controlling / progress reporting that co-vers all open, on-going and closed enhancement projects across all focus areas.

Ensure that identical KPIs such as headcount and FTE figures reconcile in all reporting applications such as Cognos and SIS. Consider to implement a 4-eyes-principle review for key KPIs reported in SIS.

Establish a process to systematically identify and collect data concerning the above mentioned areas and report these figures in SIS accordingly. Ensure that the audit trail from reported KPIs to supporting evidences (i.e. invoices) is in place.

Review and agree the redemption rate and value / cost in USD per point calculation with Divi-sion and Corporate Controlling. Decide whether or not to discontinue the Privilege Club pro-gram. In case the program is deemed to be discontinued, account for a one-off provision for the remaining points balance until the program is officially terminated.
Disable or do not use the "unlimited" function in the customer master data in order to ensure that credit checks are performed for deliveries exceeding the defined credit limits.

Ensure that uncollectible customer invoices are identified timely (i.e. 30 days) before the credit insurer's reporting due date. Timely report uncollectible customer invoices to the credit insurer instead of making use of an external collection agency.

Communicate DoA review and approval requirements among all personnel involved in the scrapping process (i.e. Procurement team, Finance team etc.). Ensure that DoA review and approval requirements are complied with before inventory is scrapped.

Ensure compliance with the approval requirements defined in the DoA. Consider to analyze the volume of FoC deliveries on a regular basis (i.e. quarterly) and cross check the availability of necessary approvals.

Review the list of service calls and identify those which do not represent a relevant request an-ymore and consider to delete them. For the future, ensure that service calls are processed in a timely manner to avoid dissatisfaction on customer side.

Implement a reliable process ensuring that set-up protocols (iPDFs) are timely submitted to the plants. Consider to implement regular (i.e. monthly) review procedures on the accuracy of the data stored in GreatPlains. Train and empower installation engineers for a timely submission of set-up protocols (iPDFs) according to the new process.

Update the current quotation and order confirmations templates in GreatPlains with a reference to the local General Terms and Conditions of Sales. Consider moving the entire quotation process to Sales Pad.

Include additional sourcing costs such as freight etc.in the gross margin calculation (i.e. by adjusting the commission calculation manually) before releasing commission payments to sales representatives. Check with the local GreatPlains administrator if it is possible to add additional sourcing cost such as freight etc. to the system generated gross margin calculation scheme.

Increase effort and consistently document the follow-up activities performed on outstanding bank guarantees. Discuss and align with the bank and Corporate Treasury on how to handle cases where original bank guarantee documentation is no longer recoverable.
Conduct a complete review of the items in the rental pool and insert the calibration due date of each item in the database. Items that do not require calibration should be indicated accordingly.
Correct the identified errors in the next reporting period. Ensure correct splitting and reporting of financial figures on the corresponding category line.
Re-emphasize the approval requirements amongst the Internal Sales department regarding free-of-charge deliveries. Conduct periodic review on the proper adherence to the prescribed process.
Conduct periodic sample reviews on the adherence of credit note approval requirement to ensure the DoA is fully complied with.
Review all open positions already in the recruitment process and seek approval from the Head of Division HR where required, before hiring any further candidate.

Reach out to GFMS Strategic Procurement to see whether GFMS Vietnam can directly utilize the shared contract management solution. If not, establish a contract tracking system to include the entire contracts signed, the necessary information such as business nature, contract amount, business partner, payment term and validity period have to be recorded. 
Report to GF Legal regarding the external legal firm in use and renew the outdated contract based  on GF Legal instructions. Align the record retention requirements with CI 1026 and form a documented policy for future reference.

Deliver training to the concerned employees on how to collect the correct plant and customer warranty start dates and record them in the machine database.
Set up controls on a monthly or quarterly basis to identify the three types of data inaccuracy.
Collaborate with the GFMS supplying plants on the identified unreasonable plant warranty dates and correct the data whenever necessary.

Implement the credit assessment processes in accordance with the GFMS Credit Policy. Enter the credit limits in the ERP system and use them to enforce effective credit risk control, e.g. via automatic order and delivery blocks. The credit limit in iScala specifically set for non-machine business can be utilized to realize differentiated management of machines and non-machine sales. 
Calculate and report the bad debt provision according to the GFMS bad debt directive.

Seek refresher training from the Division or BU Controlling regarding the GFMS financial reporting requirements. 
Track and report the three percentages of products sold with warranty periods, to calculate warranty provision correctly in BOARD BI.
Based on its result in BOARD BI, book the provision accordingly in the ERP iScala system and COGNOS reports.

Organize joint meetings to discuss the current controls for PMC and AMC sales among concerned departments, i.e. Managing Director, Customer Services, and Finance Controller. The controls should at least include alignment checks of the two contracts before sending them to the customers, maintaining a tracking list of all such PMC and AMC contracts, and proper analysis on the realized margins for the next pricing set-up as well as sales discount control.

Re-design the current order tracking template to include at least the PO date, expected received date at GFMS Vietnam, and the latest expected delivery date to customers. Perform a regular review on the tracking sheet and follow-up accordingly to communicate with hub and the customers.
It is also suggested to starting monitoring for returns to ensure parts are returned timely to the hub and get the credit notes without omissions.

Update the local T&E policy referring to Corporate Instruction 1061. The following content should be included: types of entertainment activities that can be performed, the threshold per participant and per event of entertainment activities, scenarios in which pre-approvals or higher approvals are required.
Update the entertainment expense reimbursement application for applicants to fill in names of participates and purpose of the entertainment.

Conduct the Anti-Corruption Assessment for all existing distributors and ask the distributors to sign the Compliance Agreement as soon as possible. 
In case of renewing the sales contracts or entering business with new intermediaries, use the GFMS standard intermediary contract template. If rejected by the distributors, consult Corporate Legal for the mitigation measures of using a standard sales agreement template for distribution sales.

Request for proper approval from the GFCS Customer Service Head for the pricing strategy of the special consumable category "Wire B - Brass" to concerned customers.
Document the monthly pricelist with supporting of the supplying prices as well as the mark-up rates per customer approved by local Managing Director and CS Head according to the GFMS DoA.

Refresh the 4DX training, review the current 2022 Lead Measures, and reset them if they are no longer connected to achieving the WIGs or the measure itself is unachievable.
Define actions on the low-performing measures and monitor the action implementation in a regular manner, i.e. weekly or monthly.

Contact GFMS IP Officer to clarify what is expected in filing for patents and utility models, vendor selection according to the GFMS Intellectual Property Guideline released in July 2021.
For the on-going IP applications in 2022, follow the required GFMS IP Management step procedure accordingly.

Procurement department should establish a formal definition of key suppliers that specifies the criteria to be applied. For example, material category, annual spending amount, and special considerations (such as HSE suppliers). 
Any addition and elimination to the key supplier list should be supported with written justification as well.

Understand the category definition and data collection method for “Types of mobile fuel used by Company cars", "E-Mobility", as well as the "Fuel use for internal transportation (trucks, forklifts …)" to report the 2022 SIS data correctly.

In the current SAP as well as the new SAP system to be launched in 2023, either set special status or create new storage locations for IMPC materials with quality issues and sent back to vendors so that all material inbound and outbound could be systematically monitored in SAP instead of any offline manual tracking.

Arrange a joint meeting involving After Sales, Purchasing and Quality to clarify the roles and responsibilities in carrying out the three CRR steps, and document the follow-ups.
In case of some returns that are not necessary for analysis, approval or at least joint decision among Quality, After Sales and Purchasing departments should be documented for proper transparency.

Update the outdated "Incoming Sampling Inspection Instruction" or create a new guideline based on the various quality checklists currently in use to summarize the inspection methodology (i.e. sampling size and sampling characters) as an overarching guideline.
In terms of IMPC Quality, who is still using the outdated instruction, discuss the current inspection method together with IMPC Production, Product Engineer, and Quality to conclude whether the old instruction is still effective and efficient for IMPC inbound materials or needs to be re-placed according to the current IMPC requirements and needs.
Clarify the material classification per material code with Purchasing department, and apply material group or material code rather than a generic material name to the overall quality inspection process, including the guideline and the operational procedure. 
Align the offline inspection instruction with the online SAP setups in terms of sampling size, sampling quality characters and update the operational procedure accordingly.

The Procurement department, together with Finance department are suggested to contact Business Unit Controller to understand the risk and requirement of this specific DoA item, for example, whether the approval from TU Head is still necessary with the usage of GF standard consignment contract template. 
If the approval is confirmed to be a must, it is suggested to send all the current consignment agreement to the head of TU for review and complete actions that might arise from the review comments. In the meantime, make sure any new consignment in future is approved before signing.

For special or emergency cases of supplier introduction, special approval should be sought and the justification should be documented in detail with follow-up actions defined and responsible person appointed. Procedures and documentation of concession receipt of purchase orders can be referenced. The vendor should only be added into AVL with a fully approved FAI. In the meantime,
The inbound inspection sample size for such suppliers should be increased.
Add one reference column either in the customer complaint list or the 8D tracking sheet to link the two reports and avoid potential oversight. Meanwhile, if personal judgment needs to be considered on whether or not an 8D report should be requested, proper approval should be obtained to skip the 8D report.

Firstly, the SCM Manager is suggested to reach out to the Division responsible person for the DCC report and confirm the calculation logic of RLT, especially whether the RLT considers a reasonable length of period to form an actual meaningful value to be benchmarked. If yes, a regular review of RLT should be implemented to identify and investigate significant deviations between RLT and master data. The review result should be documented as well for future reference if needed.

It is suggested to perform a review on the current inbound quality inspection sampling methodology and understand how the SAP configuration works. Enter the correct sampling methodology based on China National Standard GB2828 and make sure this is configured to apply to the RSCN plants.

The maintenance team should review and update the safety stock level of critical spare parts regularly, based on which the actual stock level should also be reviewed to identify the parts for timely replenishment. 
In terms of maintenance, maintenance costs should be formally defined, for example, the purchase of external services and the consumption of spare parts. The cost should be further analyzed and allocated to respective production lines for the timely identification of replacement needs.

Figure out the rationale of the differences among the three data sources and ensure alignment starting from the 2022 Q3 SIS reporting, based on the most accurate reporting methodology.
Fine-tune the estimated FTE reported in Cognos PHCD quarterly to avoid a big gap at year-end or relocation project closing.
Based on the methodology suggested by the SIS guideline and the working hours reported for leased employees, report the FTE of leased employees in the SIS 2022 annual report accordingly.

Timely adjust the quantity difference upon identification instead of relocating the quantity difference into the special SAP location. For example, in terms of receipt shortage which is identified later, post negative receipt quantity on the PO level for correction.

Based on the asset historical data and the asset appraisal, recalculate the remaining useful life of the transferred fixed assets together with Corporate and Division Controlling teams.
Based on the remaining useful life, mass upload the correct useful life master data in SAP for automatic depreciation calculation and correct the past depreciation if needed.

GFPS China should firstly clarify and made necessary remarks, even guidance on how to understand and apply the DoA, especially on how to differentiate project sales and regular stock sales. 
Clear regulation on what kind of actions are to be taken for the "Responsible, Accountable, Consulted" marks in the DoA should be established as well. Wherever multiple marks appear for the same item, alignment should be reached in terms of whether the actions are expected to be taken for each or either of the reviewers/approvers.
Use the specific sub-contracting contract template and sign the contracts with the four suppliers, in which the processing loss tolerance should be specified and agreed upon.

Align with Corporate Controlling on the best approach on when and how much to book the accruals, both on the methodology in quantifying the amount and the timing of such bookings, for both internal justification and external audit.
Either document the SteerCo meeting memo or get the approval via Email from BU Asia for any accrual of the same nature and over CNY 1.4 mio.

Sales should review the current version of the market support policy and revise/delete the clauses that are no longer applicable. In addition, according to the updated policy, the Sales and MarCom departments should align on the entitlement, reimbursement requirements, and documentation of each type of market expense.

A change log control needs to be set up for the parameter sheet. Every update should be recorded on the sheet, with the signature of the Process Engineer and the defined approver, e.g. Head of Production. 
The effective date and change details must be stated on the change log.
Add the change of password in the employee exit checklist so that the IT staff need to  reset the user password before pass the PC and user data to the managers.

Summarize the application forms and document the analysis of the stock adjustments already performed and to be performed related to the relocation project.
Request corresponding approvals and consultations from the proper authorities as per GFPS DoA requirements.
Use and implement the CIRB template provided by the Corporate CISO accordingly at GFPS Denmark. In case of uncertainties, consult the Corporate IT for support.

Create a local records retention policy to ensure compliance with requirements from Corporate Instruction 1026. Lock the entrance to the archive area for unauthorized access. Grant access to this area for Management and the Finance Department only.

Inform all employees about the requirements mentioned in CI 1061 by implementing the applica-ble requirements for the business model of GFPS Denmark to the employee's handbook and / or the local T&E policy.

Ensure all intermediary business relationships are governed by the distributor agreement template provided by GF's Corporate Legal Department.
Provide all current contracts with distributors to Corporate Legal for a proper review and approval.

Update the calculation for the vacation accrual with the appropriate vacation days on a quarterly basis.
Report the updated results from the calculation in the quarterly financial reporting (i.e. Cognos).

Get in touch with the Global Authorization Administrator to remove the execution authorization for SAP transaction VKM1 and VKM3 from the Managing Director and the local Sales Manager. Dis-cuss and find an appropriate approach (i.e. form for exception from financial regulation stand-ards) in collaboration with BU Controlling.

Create and communicate to all employees a local travel and entertainment policy with clearly de-fined expense limits. Ensure the local travel and entertainment policy complies with CI 1063 and CI 1061.
Consult Corporate Travel Management to install limitations and a proper approval process for bookings in "Egencia". Consult Corporate Travel Management if access to "Egencia" can be pro-vided to all Sales Representatives.

Create a written guideline of the stock taking process aligned with DI 3437. Ensure the applica-tion of the blind count methodology during stock taking. Request the quantities of inventory stored with the Sales Representatives pro-actively.

Implement a process to systematically follow-up on customer quotations (i.e. after a pre-defined period). Add a reference to GFPS's Standard Terms of Conditions in the official quotation to the customer.

Define a sufficient contractual agreement with Visma covering all key elements such as services, handling of sensitive data (according to GDPR), prices etc. and consult Corporate Legal to ensure compliance to GF business standards.
Consult Corporate Legal for a review and approval, if a contract will be provided by Visma. 
Remove the rights for direct debiting for the service invoices from Visma. Ensure that for every invoice submitted by Visma the standardized approval process in Xflow is applied.

Apply a systematic approach on an annual basis that ensures sufficient identification and as-sessment of risks on local level. Transfer the gained information to the ERM accordingly. Based on this information, derive appropriate mitigating actions, responsibles and proper due dates for the implementation of the actions. Before submitting the ERM-report to the Division, implement a local review process.

Ensure that for all reported information in SIS the underlying evidence (i.e. invoices) is made available to facilitate a proper audit trail. Set up a reconciliation overview for SIS reporting that improves reliability and transparency in future periods. Ensure the calculation of social and en-vironmental KPIs are in line with the SIS reporting manual. Assign the responsibility for the SIS reporting to one designated employee to centralize the data entry and verification.
Review the requirements for provisions on a monthly basis. Release the provision accordingly in a timely manner if the corresponding case is resolved or the risk exposure is no longer existent.
Implement a regular monitoring and follow up process on open GR/IR items aged over 3 months.

Transfer the respective assets under construction as soon as they are ready to be used in pro-duction and start the corresponding depreciation accordingly.
Define a pro-active communication on a quarterly basis, between CSSC and GFPS Seewis to ensure a proper and timely transfer of fixed assets and their start of depreciation.

Implement a proper process for the stock taking on the shop floor. Ensure the consideration of used parts in the production process if permanent stock taking is applied. Document the results on dedicated counting sheets. Store and archive all stock taking documents in compliance with DI 3437 and CI 1026. Consider to review stock taking procedures and the underlying physical conditions are leading to unjustified stock differences and repeated inefficient adjustments of the inventory.

Use the "Tetys" functionality to review and assess the cycle times for each product on an annu-al basis. Adjust the cycle times based on the analysis in SAP and "Tetys" accordingly. For new products in the ramp up phase, consider the results of production of the last 3 months to deter-mine accurate cycle times. Adjust the cycle times in "Tetys" and SAP accordingly. Revise the results 3 months after the first assessment.
Revise the tasks and cycle times on assembly table T04 and add the manual work to the rout-ing accordingly.

Ensure employee specific job descriptions are drafted and signed by the employees. Such signed document should be kept in the employee's personnel record. It is recommendable to document the deputies of key positions in writing, e.g. on the organizational chart.

Include introduction to Corporate Instructions in the standard onboarding process for new hires. Instruct employees to familiarize themselves with the policies that need to be closely followed during their daily work based on their role. For existing employees, make a one-time communication to highlight the same topic.

Review and rectify the Iron Mountain archive directory regarding the boxes missing content description and destruction review date. Review existing archives onsite to produce at least a high-level directory of document type and year of origin in order to assess and ensure compliance with Corporate Instruction 1026.
Ensure the standard costs for purchase materials include the customs and freight surcharge. Establish specific tariff for each production cell/group and update production routings.
Ensure documented four-eyes principle on bank reconciliations and manual journal entries to reduce potential errors.

Work with ADP to correct the mistakes in the data files used for booking accruals for bonus. For accruals for unused vacation, investigate whether ADP could implement the payroll taxes factor in their data file, otherwise, implement a process to manually increase the accrual to cover the payroll taxes.

Ensure fixed asset disposals are approved according to the DoA in a documented way. According to Swiss GAAP FER, assets should be activated as soon as they are installed and operational regardless of actual usage. Book missed depreciation retroactively. Retain supporting document to justify asset activation date going forward.

Increase the frequency of management review on the adherence to the local Purchasing Standard Work procedures. Ensure past due POs and confirmed delivery dates are updated based on the follow-up communications with suppliers.

Review pending non-conforming materials based on the records in SAP.
Implement a standard process in the purchasing team to ensure materials returned to vendor are followed up until a credit note is received in case no replacement shipment will be sent.

Perform a full inventory count latest by the end of December 2022. Improve the cycle counting process by ensuring a coverage ratio of at least 80% of total inventory if a full count will not be executed annually.
Complete the root cause analysis on the stock shortage case and implement corrective measures to address the root causes.

Obtain approval from the Division President for the existing private label relationships. Cooperate with Corporate Legal to set up appropriate private label agreements and subcontractor agreements with the existing suppliers.
Ensure production plan for the machining workshop is documented with a reasonable planning horizon to allow advance personnel planning and visualization of available machine capacity.
Recover the backlog of crucial overdue maintenance tasks by re-distributing internal resources. If still infeasible, consider engaging external support.

Implement a spare part management process including definition of critical spare parts that should be kept on hand and the inventory management of spare parts that tracks the usage and triggers the replenishment of spare parts. Update the ICS description to reflect actual practice.

Whenever the costs of R&D projects are expected to exceed the granted budget by more than 10%, a supplementary application should be made in good time to seek approval for the project to continue in light of the higher expected costs.

For the Hawksbill project, monitor the manufacturing cost of the four underlying product variants on a more frequent basis (ideally bi-monthly) until project completion. For all future hardware development projects, ensure frequent monitoring of manufacturing cost, ideally using the standard Project Report template from GFPS R&D PMO.
Review payroll change report to ensure all pay relevant changes are justified before approving the payroll as a standard process.
Implement a process to reconcile the ADP payroll invoices with the payroll report of each pay period. The HR Manager should routinely receive the ADP payroll invoices to conduct this reconciliation.

Obtain the sale agreements related to this divestment and review for appropriateness and completeness of the accounting treatments made to date. Ensure agreements for future investment or divestment deals are on hand and thoroughly reviewed before making journal entries.
Follow up with the responsible parties at GF Corporate and GFCS to ascertain the collectability of the outstanding receivables for insurance premium invoices and the earn-out receivables. Ensure appropriate allowances are made if receivables are or become doubtful.

Along with the launch of Single Sign On (SSO) in September 2022, send reminders to the local Finance Controllers, to timely disable the leaver's Active Dictionary account (AD) or change the AD password upon exit to block his/her TIS access.
Reach out to Corporate IT and re-initiate efforts to set up Single Sign-On for TIS and ensure that a clear timeline is defined for its implementation.

Enable the email notifications of the identified four exceptional cases, to the concerned user groups including both the Approvers as well as Payment Initiators to ensure proper and timely collaboration.

Establish a regular (monthly or quarterly) control by Corporate Treasury to monitor the ratio of manual payments and payments outside of TIS at the legal entity level. 
Based on such information, follow up on the entities with a relatively high manual payment level, together with SAP Specialists to achieve a higher TIS implementation level.
During the TIS kick-off and follow-up meetings with respective entity users, reinforce the importance of the automatic payment runs and their implicit control effectiveness. 
Incorporate more payment types or scenarios for User Acceptance Test (UAT) by the local users in the development module.
Consider launching the TIS "Partner Master Data" module as one compensating control on manual payments. With such module enabled, only double-confirmed vendor beneficiary data could be selected, while no manual entry of sensitive data is allowed.

Collaborate with GF Information Security team to achieve full compliance with the latest requirements for SaaS providers like TIS due to its long lifecycle with evolving challenges on in-formation security.
Request the penetration test results from the TIS service provider based on a proper frequency suggested by CISO. Meanwhile, penetration tests should also be performed on the application itself and not only on the configuration or network settings.
Request for TIS's confirmation on timely remediation of the reported issues with a dedicated focus on those rated as high, critical, severe, etc.
Partner up with GF CISO Specialist to go through the Information Security Assessment together and solve the vulnerabilities if any.

Based on the current and predicted ratio of TIS manual payment at the GF Group level, perform an analysis of the costs and benefits of implementing this function for all entities. With support from Corporate Purchasing whenever possible, request TIS to provide the quotation of the optional partner feature. If the final decision is not to launch the function, encourage the local entities to process automatic TIS payments and avoid manual payments whenever possible.
Remind entity users of the control weakness and associated risks linked to the creation and modification of access to the partner beneficiary.

Implement MFA control for all kinds of users at least upon their login to TIS. 
Considering the software token requires phone connection, use MFA with a landline telephone if employees do not want to have it on their private mobile phones.

Ausarbeitung einer überarbeiteten lokalen Kompetenzregelung basierend auf den Vorgaben (Form und Inhalt) der divisionsweiten Kompetenzregelung damit Verflechtungen transparent dargestellt sind. Kommunikation und Implementierung der neuen lokalen Kompetenzregelung an alle relevanten Mitarbeitenden.

Erarbeitung einer Regelung (z.B. Betriebsvereinbarung) welche die Vergabe von Geschenken definiert oder alternativ auf die Vorgaben der Konzernweisung 1061 verweist. Kommunikation der neuen Regelung an alle relevanten Mitarbeitenden. Sicherstellung der Einhaltung der neuen Reglung (z.B. im Rahmen der Prüfung von Reisekosten durch das SSC).
Sicherstellung, dass die erwähnten Kennzahlen exakt ermittelt werden und vollständig in SIS berichtet werden.

Abstimmung zwischen den zuständigen Mitarbeitenden des SSC in Herzogenburg und des zentralen Vertriebsinnendienstes um die derzeitig gültigen Kreditlimits je Kunden (Zentral- und Filialkunden) in SAP sicherzustellen.

Ergänzung der bestehenden Reisekostenrichtlinie, dass Bewirtungsaufwendungen stets vom ranghöchsten Teilnehmer zu begleichen sind. Kommunikation der aktualisierten Regelung an alle relevanten Mitarbeitenden. Sicherstellung der Einhaltung bzw. Vorliegen entsprechender Freigaben im Rahmen der Prüfung von Reisekosten durch das SSC.

Ausbuchung oder Umgliederung des betriebsbereiten Equipments aus den Anlagen im Bau. Abstimmung mit dem Divisions- und Konzerncontrolling sowie dem externen Wirtschaftsprüfer hinsichtlich der Notwendigkeit die individuellen Sachanlagen der bereits gebildeten Bewertungseinheiten gesondert zu aktivieren.

Ergänzung der bereits bestehenden Materialflussrechnung um wesentliche Durchflusskompo-nenten (z.B. Abbrand und Kreislaufmaterial) und Gegenüberstellung der Materialeinbringungs-menge versus der Ausbringungsmenge. Vertiefte Analyse von unerwartet hohen Abweichungen (z.B. >10%) und Einleitung entsprechender Gegenmassnahmen.
Sicherstellen, dass Kundengutschriften gemäss den Vorgaben der divisionsweiten Kompetenz-regelung freigegeben werden oder Abstimmung und schriftliche Dokumentation einer Ausnah-meregelung.

Review the ICS documentation and ensure the reported information reflects the actual control situation. De-activate controls that are not applicable to the entity. Conduct a regular review of the ICS matrix.

Ensure that underlying evidence (i.e. invoices) are available for all reported information in SIS to facilitate a proper audit trail. Set up a reconciliation overview for SIS reporting that improves reliability and transparency in future periods. Ensure the calculation of social and environmental KPIs are in line with the SIS reporting manual. Implement an alignment process for social KPI's between the SSC and the local Financial Controller before entering final figures in SIS and Cognos.
Review the time needed for each work step in production. Consider using the results from the OLE reporting defined in PowerBI dashboards after verifying the underlying data of time gate.
Consider to review if the negative consumption of one material that resulted in an increased pro-vision was a one-off mistake, or if such postings have occurred more often even due to other reasons.
Implement a process with a dedicated team to ensure a timely review of all non-conformity parts and the reduction of the current backlog. Consider creating an incentive for involved employees.

Ensure the Segregation of Duties by applying the same counting policy for ad-hoc counting, as applied during the bi-annual inventory count with external audit. Have the Head of Logistics or Financial Controller record inventory differences in SAP.
Ensure compliance with the divisional guideline for the next salary adjustments. Re-emphasize the requirements within the published divisional HR process amongst the HR SSC payroll team.

Chinaust Haining Plastics should immediately pay back the amount that the Sales Representative paid before. In the meantime, proactively follow-up on the progress of mediation and truthfully reflect the outstanding AR financially.
海宁亚大应立即偿还销售代表之前支付的款项。同时，积极跟进调解进展，如实反映未偿应收账款。

The equipment administrator and the production teams of both PE and PP products should jointly review all the machines and centrally manage the maintenance tasks of these machines, to ensure all production related machines are covered and reduce of complexity of maintenance work.
The daily check strategy of production lines should also be updated to align with the actual practice. Once done, the daily check tasks should be timely completed, documented and signed off like the annual plan tasks.
PE和PP产品的设备管理员和生产团队应共同审查所有机器，并集中管理这些机器的维护任务，以确保覆盖所有生产相关机器，降低维护工作的复杂性。
生产线的日点检策略也应更新，与实际做法保持一致，日检任务一旦做好，应像年度计划任务一样及时完成、记录和签字。

A process should be established to standardize the monitoring process of PP production. The process is expected to cover the collection of first line data, the KPIs to be calculated, the calculation methodology, and the reporting and reviewing frequency.
During monthly management meetings, the recorded figures and calculated KPIs beyond expectation must be highlighted, discussed and analyzed for root cause with actions defined.
应建立PP生产监控标准化流程，流程应涵盖一线数据收集、计算KPI、计算方法、报告审月频次。
在每月的管理会议上，必须识别、讨论和分析超出预期的记录数据和计算的KPI，并定义行动的根本原因。

The agent should be defined as one kind of intermediaries and should be reviewed according to the compliance policy with the compliance checklist completed. In case of any red flags, the checklist should be further submitted to Chinaust Group CEO for review and final approval. 
In the meantime, it is suggested to review and update the intermediary's management policy and clearly regulate the limit of commission rate and payment of agent commissions. In case of high commission or commission paid before end customer payment or even contract, sufficient risk evaluation should be performed, and authorization should be obtained. The agent agree-ment can only be signed after the OA approval is fully completed, and any payment of commis-sion must be supported by a valid agent agreement signed before the business occurs. 
In practice, the payment of agent commission should be strictly controlled following the agent agreement.
居间商应被定义为一种中介机构，并应根据合规政策进行审查，并填写合规检查表。如果出现任何警示信号，检查表应进一步提交给亚大集团总裁进行审查和最终批准。 
同时，建议审阅和更新非最终用户和居间商的管理政策，明确规范佣金率的限制和居间佣金的支付条件，如果出现高佣金比例或在最终客户付款甚至销售合同签订前支付佣金的情况，应进行充分的风险评估，并获得授权。此外，也应确保居间合同在OA审批完成之后才能签署，且居间费用的支付有业务发生之前即签署的居间合同作为支持。
在实际工作中，工厂本身应严格按照居间协议的约定控制佣金的支付。

Firstly, the Production Manager should clarify and address to the first line employees to report the machine failures centrally and consistently in the MES Heihu. It is also suggested to make an analysis on a regular basis to identify frequently occurred failure types, or frequently repaired machines/equipment. While reviewing the above, actions should be defined, assigned with responsible people, and followed up on in subsequent management meetings.

It is suggested that Finance department performs a training to the Production and Operation departments to address the difference between fixed asset capitalization and issuing ac-ceptance confirmation to the vendor. Once the machine/equipment has been installed and is operational ready, the capitalization must be made, while the acceptance confirmation to the vendor can be pended until all the issues (not affecting normal production and sales) are fixed together with the supplier.
建议财务部门对生产和运营部门进行培训，明确固定资产资本化和向供应商出具验收确认之间的区别。一旦机器/设备安装并正常运行，就必须资本化；而对供应商的验收确认可以等到所有问题（不影响正常生产和销售）与供应商一起解决完成。

Finance department should form a guideline on how to use the one-time vendor account. The vendors with potential repeated payments should be managed with a specific vendor account. It is also suggested to set a limitation of transaction amount when using this account, high amount transactions, or purchase of assets or inventories should also be managed with the respective vendor account.
财务部门应就如何使用一次性供应商账户制定指导文件。有可能重复付款的供应商应使用专门的供应商账户进行管理。同时也建议在使用该账户时设置金额限制，大额交易、资产或存货的购买也应使用相应的供应商账户进行管理。

The supplier authorization and evaluation process should be standardized. The authorized supplier list is expected to include all the suppliers that provide materials with level A importance. In the meantime, suppliers with high purchased amount are also suggested to be considered. A calculation methodology to determine supplier performance should be established. The evaluation must contain the input of relevant departments (Quality and Supply Chain Management), and the raw data for calculation must be retained as well, such as number of supplier complaints, receipt with concession, and on-time delivery records for each purchase order.
供应商授权和评估过程应标准化。合格供应商名单应包括所有提供A级重要性物资的供应商。同时，还建议考虑采购量高的供应商。应建立确定供应商绩效的计算方法。供应商评估必须包含相关部门（质量和供应链管理）的输入，还须保留计算的原始数据，如供应商投诉数量、让步接收的数量和每个采购订单的准时交货记录。

It is suggested that a dedicated purchasing policy be established for PP raw material purchase, it does not have to follow the PE material purchase process but should be adjusted to apply to the different situation of PP material. However, the process should at least ensure a proper introduction and the formal approval and documentation of each purchasing decisions. The purchasing contracts should be properly and sufficiently reviewed and approved as well.
建议对聚丙烯原材料采购制定专门的采购政策，不必一定遵循聚乙烯材料采购流程，而是可以根据聚丙烯材料的不同情况进行调整。然而，这一过程至少应确保每个供应商都进行了充分的引入程序，采购决策经过正式批准和留档。采购合同也应得到适当和充分的审查和批准。

The batch and production date information should not be removed and re-printed on the products. A process should be established to make sure that stock adjustment in NC is supported with valid reasons and approvals. 
As for the modification of ring stiffness, the original testing report must be submitted, checked and filed to prove that the original testing result did support the modification.
