批次和生产日期信息不应去除并重新打印在产品上。应建立一个流程，以确保NC的库存调整得到有效的理由支持和批准。 
至于环刚度的修改，必须提交原始测试报告，检查并归档，以证明原始测试结果确实支持对应的修改。

A process should be established to regulate how basic salary adjustment should be conducted. Four-Eyes principle must be followed for every adjustment with documentation.
应建立一个程序来规范如何进行基本工资调整。每一次留档调整都必须遵循四眼原则。

A pricing review and approval process must be established for PE water and PP drainage prod-ucts. If the bottom price methodology is expected to be continued. The price has to be reviewed again for the gross margins to proceed and the review should be performed whenever the price is adjusted. In case the offered price is lower than the bottom price, a review and approval pro-cess must be implemented as well. The justification should be stated clearly, and all related documentation should be properly retained for future references.
As for the target and incentive scheme for Sales department, firstly, PE water and PP drainage business must be considered separately for Chinaust Haining Plastics and the Sales depart-ment. Secondly, the incentive basis should be determined primary on the sales margin; other factors such as sales volume and Days Sales Outstanding (DSO) are suggested to be consid-ered as well. Finally, when calculating the annual incentive, another department (other than Sales, either HR or Finance) should be actually calculating the incentive strictly following the approved policy, meaning, rewards and penalties must both be considered and calculated.
PE水管和PP排水产品必须建立价格审查和批准程序。如果底价表将继续作为定价的依据，则必须计算并审阅底价对应的毛利率，并在每次底价调整时重新进行计算和审查。如果报价低于底价，还必须实施额外的审查和批准程序，应明确说明理由，并妥善保留所有相关留档以备将来参考。
对于销售部门的目标设定和激励方案，首先，必须将PE水管和PP排水业务单独作为海宁亚大销售部门的目标；其次，销售毛利率应作为销售考核的首要标准，数量和回款周期也建议进行考量；最后，在计算年度激励时，应由独立的部门（除销售部门外，人力资源部或财务部门）严格按照批准的政策进行实际核算，奖惩必须同时考虑和计算。

Immediate measures should be taken to set up protection for the PP pipes stored outdoor. In the meantime, controls must be implemented to make sure that the additional testing for aged products are sufficiently performed, documented and filed for future reference.
应立即采取措施，为存放在室外的聚丙烯管材安装防护装置。与此同时，必须实施控制措施，以确保对长库龄产品的额外测试得到充分执行、记录并归档以备将来参考。

It is suggested to submit the welding service contract to Chinaust Group for legal review and approval, in the meantime, consider changing the payment condition and obtain the confirmation of service from the end customers as the supporting for service fee. 
In addition, when negotiating the new price with end customers next year, the additional welding service fee must be sufficiently considered for gross margin calculation.
建议将焊接服务合同提交亚大集团法务审查批准，同时考虑变更支付条件，获得最终客户的服务确认作为服务费的支持。 
此外，在明年与终端客户协商新价格时，必须充分考虑额外的焊接服务费以进行毛利率计算。

The annual credit limit should be calculated based on a defined calculation methodology and executed strictly in the sales order processing. Order release with credit exposure must be reviewed, justified and documented to ensure a sufficient risk control.

Update the contract register including the missing contracts and reference numbers and rein-force the timeliness in providing contracts to Finance across all departments. Make sure that all the relevant documents are archived together with the contract for the following new cases, including the bidding and contract review application.
Apply for the creation of NC vendor master data for all service suppliers including the specific subcontractor and book accruals of the services according to the monthly bill in the corresponding month.
更新台账中缺少的合同并记录相应合同编号，向所有涉及的部门重申需及时提供合同给财务部。
确保所有合同相关文件与在之后新合同签订时一起归档，包括比价表和合同审查表。
申请创建包括该外协加工商在内的所有服务供应商的NC供应商主数据，并根据相应月份的账单预提服务的费用。

Arrange a joint meeting among Supplier Quality Engineers (SQE), Production Process Leaders as well as Purchasing department to clarify the definition and communication approach of sup-plier non-conformity cases.
Once agreed upon, incorporate the data in the monthly vendor evaluation and require those unqualified vendors to provide corrective measures or restart the vendor selection process if needed. For internal suppliers, an 8D report should be requested for future follow-ups and proper transparency.
组织供应商质量工程师（SQE）、生产工艺负责人和采购部一同参加会议，讨论明确由供应商导致的不符项的定义和及时沟通的方法。
一旦达成一致，将数据纳入月度供应商评估，并要求不合格供应商制定行动计划，或在需要时重新启动重新供应商选择流程。而对于内部供应商，应要求其提交正式8D报告，以便未来跟进和确保流程透明。

Incorporate all the storage locations and the blind count method in the stocktaking guideline to avoid any possible oversight and enhance stocktaking completeness and assurance.
Deliver training to concerned employees regarding the updated stocktaking guideline and clarify the roles and responsibilities in the stocktaking guideline to ensure proper Segregation of Duties.
将所有仓储位置和盲计的盘点方法纳入盘点规范，以避免任何可能的疏忽，并提高盘点的完整性和可靠性。向相关员工提供有关最新盘点规范的培训，并说明规范中具体的职责划分，以确保职责的适当分离。

Understand the methodology of setting reorder points and safety stock levels in the MRP run, and based on the stock optimization and material demands, either modify the guideline when-ever necessary to reduce the requirement on safety stock levels or follow the guideline in up-dating the reorder points per material actual lead time and add up the quota for safety stock re-serves.
Before rolling out the APS (Advanced Production System) MRP system, clear the potential er-rors in the offline master data of vendor lead-time, to ensure data accuracy.
Set up a regular evaluation process to assess the lead-time accuracy based on actual material deliveries and correct major gaps whenever necessary.
了解物料需求计划（MRP）运行中设置再订购点和安全库存水平设置的方法，并根据库存优化和供应需求，在必要时修改采购指引以降低安全库存的要求，或按照指南更新每项材料实际交付周期及其再订购点，并加上用作安全库存储备的配额。
在上线APS（高级生产系统）MRP系统之前，清除供应商提前期离线主数据中的潜在错误，以更好地确保数据准确性。
建立定期评估流程，根据实际材料交付情况评估交付周期的准确性，并在必要时纠正主要差距。

Clarify the standards and documentation requirements of the bidding, selection, contracting, and evaluation processes for service suppliers in the local purchasing guideline, including the roles and responsibilities, types of documents to be prepared and retained, and the special le-gal review or approval process in case of exceptions. 
Re-emphasize the standards of vendor selection to purchasing staff and buyers of various departments to improve transparency, traceability, and compliance in the local vendor selection process.
在本地采购指引中明确服务供应商的招标、选择、签订合同和评估流程的标准和相关文件要求，包括角色和职责、需要留档保存的文件类型，以及例外情况下的特殊法务审查及批准过程。
向各部门的采购人员和采购部门重新强调供应商的选择标准，以提高当地供应商选择过程的透明度、可追溯性和合规性。

Apply for new OA templates from Chinaust Group for all kinds of sales quotation approvals according to the DoA criteria, e.g., annual markdowns, rebates, and margins.
Maintain the tracking list of participated sales bidding projects and their latest status.
根据DoA要求，向亚大集团申请新OA模板用于执行各种销售报价的审批，如年降、折扣和利润。
维护参与过销售投标项目的跟踪清单，以及相对应项目竞标的最新状态。

Set up a proper vendor bidding, selection, and evaluation process for subcontracting services and consult Chinaust Legal in contract review especially on the purchasing commitments, quality requirements, and tolerance rates to avoid potential financial loss or contractual clauses unfavorable to Chinaust Auto Foshan Branch.
对委外加工服务建立适当的供应商询价，选择和评估流程，并针对保底采购条款，质量要求及供货缺损率等在拟定合同前咨询亚大集团法务，避免潜在的损失或对亚大佛山分公司不利的合同条款。

Based on the machine list, recheck if there are missing machines needed for preventive maintenance and conduct the necessary PM accordingly. 
Deliver training to employees on the importance of analyzing the root causes of machine failures, defining and following up the corrective actions to avoid potential recurring issues
根据生产部的设备台账确认所有需要维保却没有定义维保项目的机器并进行定期进行维保。 
向员工提供培训，说明分析机械故障的根本原因、定义和追踪纠正措施以尽可能避免潜在的重复性机器故障的重要性。

Ask the supplier to complete the installation and calibration of the existing equipment to realize internal quality inspection on all kinds of PA quality performance.
In the transition period, deliver samples to Chinaust Changchun Auto for testing.
要求供应商完成现有设备的安装调试和校准工作，以实现内部测量所有尼龙原材料的质量测试项。
在过渡期内，将样品送至亚大长春汽车有限公司进行测试。

Require employees to provide supporting documents (e.g., social security payment records, labor contract, exit confirmation, etc.) on the length of service and grant the annual leave quota per employee accordingly and updated on an annual basis.
让员工提供关于工龄的证明文件（如社保缴费记录、劳动合同、离职证明等），并相应授予每位员工相应得年假额度，并每年更新一次。

Include the introduction of Corporate and Divisional Instructions in the standard onboarding process for new hires. Instruct employees to familiarize themselves with the policies that need to be closely followed during their daily work based on their position. For existing employees, make a one-time communication to highlight the same topic.

Put a focus on the collection of a signed version of the Compliance and Distributor Agreement for the intermediaries with the highest sales volume. If intermediaries refuse to enter Distributor Agreements or to sign the GF Compliance Agreement, consult the Corporate Compliance Officer for a discussion of further proceedings. 
Update the overview of the intermediary agreement in a timely manner and keep it up to date.

Implement the checklist provided by Divisional Controlling for the monthly and quarterly closing. Ensure a proper documentation in the checklist of each employee involved in the closing process. Consider a review process of the checklist for the local Financial Controller before submit-ting the report to ensure completeness of all closing activities.

Ensure compliance to CI 1079 by informig the Divisoinal CFO, Divisonal Head of Human Ressources and the Divisional Head of Sustainability prior to a combustion engine vehicle leases / purchase . Train and familiarize the local fleet responsibles with the requirements in CI 1079.
Consider closing one of the Euro account with one of the Banks. Change / update the bank information on the invoices in order to transfer the operational banking business to the cash pooling account.

Define and transfer all rental machine identified in standard inventory as a fixed assets and link it to the appropriate account. Apply the straight-line depreciation methodology with the appropriate useful lifetime as mentioned in DI 3440. To ensure a proper execution of the requirements in DI 3440, consider contacting the Business Unit Controller EMEA.

Agree with Division and Corporate Controlling on the assumptions and the exact parameters to calculate the provision for employee service awards. Record the calculated provision value  in the financial statements accordingly. 
Consider updating the current employee's handbook with the entitlement of a service reward after 25 years in the amount of the current gross salary at that time.

Update the internal stock taking procedure to require blind counting during the full inventory counts. Ensure counting sheets do not show the system quantity. Assigned GFPS Belgium personell to conduct or supervise the stock taking at the supplier. Make sure inventory differences are approved by the Managing Director in accordance to the local Delegation of Authorities.

As it is technically not possible to implement an approval workflow in "SDWorx", consider to implemented a detective control for the salary review on a monthly basis. Provide an overview of the last two payroll periods and the actual payroll with all details to the Managing Director for a proper plausibility check. Document the review properly with a signature. Decide internally, for which person the changing rights in the system should be removed (i. e. Managing Director).

A process should be clarified to ensure that the contract administrator captures all contracts timely and register accordingly. A regular reconciliation could be performed between the contract register and the OA process to identify missing contracts. 
The payment term check should be included in the contract approval process to identify incorrect or improper payment terms.
应定义一个过程，以确保合同管理员及时获取所有合同并相应地进行登记。可以在合同登记台账和OA申请单之间进行定期核对，以发现遗漏的合同。 
付款条件的检查应包括在合同批准过程中，以识别不正确或不适当的付款条款。

Firstly, IT should work with HR to maximize the employee exit process to ensure the system access is removed timely. Secondly, the IT Specialist should maintain a list of users of the share folder and give clear instructions on how to protect the shared files if they are not supposed to be accessed by everyone. The administrator account control is suggested to be implemented to prevent unauthorized applications to be installed and the original version of MS Office is suggested to be purchased if necessary.
The above instructions could be clarified in a dedicated IT training material, which should be used to perform the on-boarding trainings.
首先，IT部门应与人力资源部门合作优化员工离职流程，以确保及时删除系统访问。其次，IT专员应维护共享文件夹的用户列表，并明确说明如何保护共享文件。建议实施管理员帐户控制，以防止安装未经授权的应用程序，并建议在必要时购买MS Office的正版软件。
上述说明可以在专门的信息技术培训材料中得到澄清，该材料应用于执行入职培训。

It is suggested to have an official bidding process and sign a contract with the suppliers who are expected to be in long term cooperation with the company, in the contract, agree on a price list of frequently occurred services and purchased items.
In addition, it must be ensured that the price and quality comparison should be performed wherever applicable. In addition, the comparison and the contract must be performed and signed before the occurrence of actual services.
建议对预计进行长期合作的供应商实施正式的比质比价流程并签订合同，约定经常发生的服务和采购项目的价目表。
同时，公司应确保在所有适用的情况下进行比质比价流程。此外，必须在实际服务发生之前进行比质比价和签署合同。

The blind count method must be applied for at least the bi-annual full scope stock count. On the day of the count, a stock overview listing the stock balance of each warehouse code should be extracted and filed with the stock count documentation afterwards. All the warehouse code should be included in the counting scope. For the customer provided parts, the quarterly reconciliation with customers should be retained as replacement of physical count. 
It is also suggested to set a tolerance rate for the counting variance and perform an analysis for variance exceeding the tolerance.
半年度的全范围库存清点必须采用盲盘法，盘点当日应导出一份库存概览，列出各仓库代码的库存余额，并在事后和盘点原始文件共同存档，所有仓库代码均应纳入盘点范围，对于客户提供的零件，应保留与客户的季度对账，作为实物盘点的替代控制。 
还建议对盘点差异率设定容忍范围，并对超过容忍范围的差异率进行分析。

Refer to the calculation methodology of KVP savings provided by Lingyun and determine an internal methodology. In case of disagreements on the saving amounts, there has to be a way to make a decision and proceed. For example, a vote of the review committee or the General Manager has to determine on the rewarding basis of discussed KVPs.
可以参考凌云提供的合理化建议降本计算方法，确定适用于公司的计算。如果对金额有分歧，必须有一个方法来做出决定并继续进行。例如，审查委员会必须投票决定或总经理决定最终的合理化建议奖励基础。

A reconciliation process should be established to make sure that the machine shutdowns are supported with details of failures and all the failures are captured by the R&M history form. In the meantime, a regular review should be implemented as well to analyze the failures by machine and by failure type, actions should be defined for improvement with responsible person appointed.
应建立一个核对流程，以确保机器停机有故障卡提供的细节支持，并且所有故障都被履历表记录下来。同时，还应实施定期审查，按机器和故障类型分析故障，确定改进措施，并指定行动负责人。

The stock counts documentation should be retained and properly filed for spare parts, including the original counting sheets, the stock count report, and the details for stock adjustments. Finance should participate in the stock count as well to ensure four-eye principle.
备件盘点的原始文件应妥善归档，包括原始盘点单、存货盘点报告、存货调整明细，财务也要参与盘点，确保四眼原则。

A process should be established to enter all the supplier-accountable penalties so that the supplier performance is sufficiently evaluated. 
The internal supplier complaints should also be entered into the SRM completely on a timely basis.
应建立一个流程来录入所有供应商责任导致的客户处罚，以便充分评估供应商的绩效。 
内部发生的供应商投诉也应及时并完整地输入SRM。

The annual leave per employee must be calculated and recorded in formal documentation. The leave balance should be tracked and communicated to the department managers and the employees themselves on a regular basis. If the annual leave is not used up for the year, it should be rolled to next year.
每名员工的年假必须计算并记录且正式留档，年假余额应定期跟踪并传达给部门经理和员工本人。如果当年年假没有用完，应滚动留存到次年。

The entrance and exit checklists should be designed and implemented to ensure the new employees are properly equipped during the on-boarding process. In the meantime, the usage of exit checklist should facilitate a timely return of company properties when employees leave. 
It is also suggested to retain the documentation for exit interviews for future reference.
应设计和实施入离职检查表，以确保新员工在入职过程中获得所需物资。与此同时，应使用离职检查表来确保员工离开时及时归还公司财产。 
还建议保留离职面谈的留档，以备将来参考。

The Finance Manager should contact the bank for solutions on the payroll disbursement step. The General Manager must be able to see and check the details to ensure 4-eyes principle implementation. 
In the meantime, any adjustment on the basic salary should be specifically approved and the approval must be retained and traceable.
财务经理应与银行取得联系，寻求工资支付流程的解决方案。总经理必须能够看到并检查工资支付细节，以确保四眼原则的实施。 
与此同时，对基本工资的任何调整都应得到专门批准，而且批准必须保留和可追溯。

Document the local Strategy in the Division standard template and ensure alignment with Corporate, Divisional and Business Unit expectations. Review of the documented local Strategy with Business Unit and Division management.

Compare local Israeli records retention rules with those prescribed by CI 1026. If gaps are identified, develop a local records retention policy ensuring compliance with GF's CI 1026 and communicate the local records retention policy to the local external office and financial services firm.

Ensure that due diligence assessments (i.e. Annex 1 of CI 1061) are conducted before the commencement of a business relationship with an intermediary. Increase the overall coverage of completion for CI 1061 elements by prioritizing high turnover intermediaries. Consult with GF's Chief Compliance Officer to determine a sufficient degree of coverage.

Include the branch offices of GFPS International in the SIS reporting. Ensure that identical KPIs such as headcount and FTE figures reconcile in all reporting applications such as Cognos and SIS. Consider to implement a 4-eyes-principle review for key KPIs reported in SIS.

As part of the half-year and year-end financial reporting, define the process of obtaining proof of delivery for transactions which were sold at DPP or DAP incoterms and ensure that revenue will be deferred where applicable.

Assess the lease arrangements with GF's lease classification tool, determine the appropriate classification between finance and operating lease and aligned the accounting treatment with Corporate, Division and Business Unit Controlling.
For operating leases, apply the straight-line depreciation methodology using the appropriate use-ful lives as indicated in DI 3440 and adjust the financial statements accordingly. 
Conduct a periodic review of the tracking file against the machines in stock or rented, and ensure that that the file is kept up to date.
Based on the historical performance of the customer calculate the average payout rates and apply these rates to the current year sales of the customer.

Define approval levels for delivery block releases in the local Delegation of Authorities. Establish a process, which ensures that delivery block releases are reviewed and approved by those governed with accountability according to the local Delegation of Authorities.
Include all detail from the Israeli receivables in the bad debt calculation and KA31 reporting in Cognos.

Conduct stock takes during December of each year in order to ensure sufficient time to clarify identified differences. Ensure that differences are accounted for accordingly in the year-end financial reporting according to GF's group reporting schedule.

Ensure that mandatory input fields in MS CRM 365 are populated accordingly or data sets are cleaned up properly or deleted if not needed anymore. Implement a periodic review of MS CRM 365 master data for key data (and mandatory input fields).

Mitigate the currency risk by either assessing the possibility of amending the contractual conditions with the intermediary to bear (or at least share) the exchange rates fluctuations or passing them on to customers. In addition, evaluate options to change the billing currency from CHF to NOK to allow Corporate Treasury to gain transparency for potential hedging activities and to prevent customer requests for such exchange rebates in general. 
Consult with Division Controlling and Corporate Treasury on how to structure such agreements more favorable for GFPS JRG as part of the upcoming mid-year conditions review with the intermediary. Ensure that such exchange rebate agreements are only put in place with the consultation or approval of Division Controlling.
Record the rebates and currency support accrual in the appropriate accounts as prescribed by the Finance Manual. Adjust the accrual calculation for 2023, and reclassify the amount related to the accrual release from other receivables to other liabilities and implement a review process that ensures compliance with the 4-eyes principle.
Compile an overview for all waste vendors and ensure that all vendors have disposal certifications and permits for handling / recycling hazardous goods.
Implement and document a review process of manual journal entries which ensures compliance with the 4-eyes principle.
Reclassify the amount related to the rinsing solvent from prepaid expenses to the respective inventory account and assign a proper SAP material code to the consumable.

Adjust the financial records to accurately account for loans to employees and the corresponding expenses. Record salary advances in a dedicated other receivables account at the individual employee level. In case differences between salary advance bookings in SAP and the clearing are identified, perform a timely investigation.

Review the material master data to ensure no instances of multiple goods / services exist under a single SAP material number. Create a separate code for regrinding services and regrinded material other than the code used for the raw material "Werkstoff_Cu CC499K", so that accurate calculation of the stock provision can be achieved through YRFI0077.
Establish a process for calculating and accruing for the freight cost at the half-year and year-end closing.

Take a decision on retrospective correction or not. Conduct an awareness training concerning operating vs. finance lease assessment with key employees involved (i.e. Procurement department, CSSC team and first line management). Implement a properly documented operating vs. finance lease assessment procedure by using Corporate Controlling's Leasing template available in We@GF.
Develop a review and verification process for BOM changes. Communicate the process to all applicable employees and ensure that the process is complied with accordingly.

Develop an overview of all agreements currently in place with external maintenance service providers. Assess the existing business relationships with external maintenance service providers by considering service response times and cost benefits. Put in place service agreements where deemed suitable.

Account for spare parts accordingly by applying an agreed on (i.e. with BU, Division and Corporate Controlling) threshold. Implement a periodic review process for the minimum stock levels in MyExpert.

Ensure sufficient identification and assessment of local risks for the annual risk-reporting re-quirement by implementing a systematic approach. Input the gained information to the ERM-tool accordingly. Derive appropriate mitigating actions, responsibles and proper due dates for the implementation of the actions. Ensure a proper status update of the defined actions. To ensure completeness and accuracy of the ERM-report, implement a local review process before the final submission to the Division takes place.

Ensure the calculations of social and environmental KPIs are in line with the SIS reporting manual. Calculate the external recycling credits and costs to ensure a proper presentation of the recycling income and costs.

Train key personnel on timely reclassification and start of depreciation of assets. Together with the project managers and the CSSC, define an internal policy to ensure the timely (partial) trans-fer from assets under construction to the respective assets class. Provide validated reasons for a longer lifetime period of heavy IMMs and inform Corporate Controlling about the planned adjustments accordingly.

Assess the possibility to define a dedicated storage location for the "Pufferlager" in SAP to en-sure the existence, completeness and correctness of the stored material. Train the operational employees at the warehouse to record the material with the appropriate material data or assess the option to implement an interface that transfers data (semi)automatically.
Analyze the possibility for a full review of the "Pufferlager" to determine the existence, quantities and condition of the stored material. Dispose unnecessary material accordingly, to free storage space.

Define a stock taking process aligned with DI 3437. Analyze the possibility with GFPS Logistics, to leverage their (annual) stock taking from the DC Schaffhausen to GFPS Schaffhausen. Con-sult Corporate Controlling and Divisional Controlling to determine the extent of the stock taking requirement.
Implement cross-departmental 5S audits or safety walks. Address observations in the weekly shopfloor meeting and define responsible employees for corrective actions.

Review / weigh all products in production as part of a standard quality check and document and share the results with the Production Planning department to adjust the material consumption in the BOM accordingly.

Review and analyze the contractual relationship with Remondis and request the current pricelist. Implement a documentation process / sheet for the picked up scrapped material. Provide the in-formation to the Head of Injection Molding for a verification purpose in the invoicing process. For any future decision regarding these activities, consider costs and benefits before putting them in place.

Inform and train operational employees and supervisors on the importance of material separation. Define and communicate consequences to the employees if material separation is not followed properly. Ensure the correct separation of scrap and sprue material by implementing a regular review of the scrap and sprue material containers by local management (i.e. Head of Production, Managing Director etc.).

Separate conforming materials and quarantined materials visually and physically. Define a quarantine storage facility for non-conforming material in SAP. Ensure the SAP location of material matches its actual physical location and only quarantined materials are stored in the quarantine area. For oversized quarantined materials, clearly mark them visually when stored outside the quarantine room.
Ensure a timely disposal of approved scrap material. Train and inform Quality Inspectors about the requirements for a proper handling of quality errors.

Clean up the current quality case backlog for cases that GFPS Schaffhausen's can still benefit from. Close irrelevant cases accordingly. Inform Global Procurement about every quality issues for deliveries of third party suppliers. Escalate cases of non-responsiveness via Global Procurement.

Determine a dedicated person responsible for the annual ERM-reporting. Familiarize and train the person on the ERM-tool accordingly. Consider contacting the Divisional Risk Manager to gain insights on the proper handling of the tool. Ensure sufficient identification and assessment of local risks for the annual risk-reporting requirement by implementing a systematic approach. Input the gained information to the ERM-tool accordingly. Derive appropriate mitigating actions, responsibles and proper due dates for the implementation of the actions. Ensure a proper status update of the defined actions. To ensure completeness and accuracy of the ERM-report, implement a local review process before the final submission to the Division takes place.

Ensure the calculations of social and environmental KPIs are in line with the SIS reporting definitions. Establish processes to systematically identify, collect, report and reconcile data necessary to fulfill environmental reporting requirements in SIS.

Collect all relevant information from cost center responsibles during the annual standard cost calculation process. Derive appropriate production labor and machinery tariff from the consolidated planned manufacturing cost on center level. Update the consolidated data in SAP manually. Perform the standard cost calculation in SAP annually in accordance to DI 44. Consult Divisional Controlling to ensure correct execution of the standard cost calculation for 2024.

Implement a regularly (i.e. quarterly) performed analysis to identify balances with write-off potential (i.e. line items aged > 6 months). Ensure the results of the follow-up action are documented and releases are recorded accordingly.
Implement cross-departmental 5S audits or safety walks. Address observations in the daily shopfloor meeting and define responsible employees for corrective actions.

Implement a follow-up process on significant weight differences between both parties. In case of disagreements with the supplier, involve strategic procurement and negotiate a compromise for the differences. Consider regular onsite inspections on the weighing process at L&S. Inform strategic procurement frequently about material weight differences with the supplier.

Review the maintenance plan of 2022 and determine the overdue machines. Prioritize the identified machines in the current maintenance plan and adjust it accordingly. Inform the Production Planning department about the importance of the required service work. If service work cannot be considered due to the high volume of production orders, consider conducting the maintenance work on weekends. Review the current maintenance plan together with the Head of Production, and change from a time schedule to a more operational approach (amount produced on a machine).

Conduct required maintenance work on the molds before storing to free capacities in the long-range. Ensure that all employees work on the planned molds according to the daily schedule and the production plan. Train employees on the importance of a proper and timely documentation of conducted work in the checklists. Make sure the prioritization of the work load is aligned to the daily work schedule. Ensure a timely communication to the Logistics department if deadlines for the delivery of molds cannot be guaranteed. Compare on a regular basis the actual maintenance time with the planned maintenance time per mold to free capacities and increase efficiency in the maintenance process. Define appropriate KPI's on the shopfloor.

Determine the amount of affected parts and update the actual quantity in SAP. Consider contacting Divisional Controlling for the accurate recording and valuation of recovered spare parts in SAP. Include all available spare parts in the next inventory stock count.

Centralize the incoming goods procedure to the local "Magazin". Ensure that only the employees of the "Magazin" can accept and check the delivery to the corresponding order. Define an accurate storage area for material that requires the clarification of the local Procurement department.

Define a retention period for payroll records in accordance with the local legislation and CI 1026. Dispose the records that are no longer required for the purpose of the business activity. Imple-ment the remaining open action plans recommended by the external DPO.

Ensure acceptance and sign-off of GF's Code for Business Partners for all key suppliers / busi-ness partners. Alternatively, link GFMS' General Purchase Conditions (GPC) to the GFMS Ger-many homepage and reference to them on purchase orders or in emails when supplying goods and services.
Define and formalize measurable targets for the already ongoing sustainability initiatives. Track and assess their performance and derive lessons learned and future improvement potential.
Implement a follow-up tracking of the actions recommended by the third-party agent in 2022 (and for future cases). Ensure that evidences of the follow-up are documented accordingly.
Compile an overview for all waste management vendors and verify that the vendors have necessary certifications and permits for handling / recycling hazardous goods.

Agree with Divisional and Corporate Controlling on the assumptions and the exact parameters to calculate the provision for employee service awards. Record the calculated provision value in the financial statements accordingly. Consider updating the current employee handbook with the enti-tlement of such service award / anniversary payments and communicate this to all employees accordingly.
Reassess the methodology of the accrual calculation for maintenance services and align it with the accrual calculation for installations and trainings by excluding the margin from the accrued costs.

Maintain credit limits in SAP for all active customers with multiple delivery addresses according to the credit limit granted by Coface on individual customer account level. For cases where one "parent" customer can have multiple customer accounts with different delivery addresses ensure that the total approved insured credit limit will match the sum of assigned credit limits in SAP.
Consider sales transactions for which payments are not received before delivery in the credit risk exposure calculation and place STAR approval request accordingly where applicable

Prepare an ageing of the customer credit balances from the one-time customer account and in-clude it in the bad debt provision calculation where possible (i.e. only if it does not result in a deb-it balance on individual customer level). For future cases, do not use the one-time vendor ac-count for parking selected aged customer credit balances but account for such balances in the respective customer sub-ledger account.
Exclude insured balances from the calculation of the bad debt provision. For uninsured non-machine receivables overdue between 91-180 days and more than 180 days apply 50% and 100% provision ratios as required by the divisional policy. For uninsured machine-related receiv-ables overdue more than 90 days apply 5% provision ratios until the insurance coverage is lost

Revoke the right to maintain master data in the payroll system from the reviewer of the change log. Upon implementation of the new payroll system embed a workflow functionality or establish a log review by an employee who does not have master data maintenance access rights.

Define a questionnaire with a list of questions to be asked during exit interviews. Document the responses from the exit interviews, analyze the results, define action plans and implement cor-rective measures where applicable

Establish a periodic centralized review of the trainings completion and inform line managers in case employees did not complete their assigned training(s). Include a reminder concerning the onboarding trainings as part of the (mid-) probation period meeting's agenda.
Consequently collect customer signatures on acceptance protocols and document machine installations in set-up protocols.
Implement a regular (e.g. monthly) margin control on individual billable service level based on data available in the SAP ticketing / service order system.
Review the open service tickets for billable customer service potential. Create corresponding service orders where applicable or close service tickets accordingly.
Retrospectively correct the annual base salary increase for the Managing Director with the next payroll. Ensure that future annual base salary changes are timely implemented as communicated.
Closely follow up with AXA to collect the outstanding premium. Adapt year-end accounting process to ensure outstanding premiums are duly accrued to ensure visibility and further follow-up.
We recommend confirming receipt of indemnity with insured subsidiaries before reimbursing the fronting insurer.

The current IT asset register list must be reviewed and updated to ensure its accuracy and completeness. In future, the IT asset purchasing process should also be improved to make sure that every new purchased item can be timely captured in the IT asset list, for example, adding one confirmation step by the IT Specialist in the OA process. 
All relevant information must be recorded in the list, such as the purchased price, the purchased date and status (in use/retired).
目前的IT资产登记清单必须进行审查和更新，以确保其准确性和完整性。未来，IT资产购买流程也应改进，以确保每个新购买的项目都能及时记录在IT资产列表中，例如，在OA流程中增加一个由IT专员确认采购设备已登记在册的步骤。 
清单中必须记录所有相关信息，如购买价格、购买日期和状态（正在使用/已报废）。

It is suggested to add the share drive access check on the employee exit list to make sure that the access is removed timely. In the meantime, the share drive access matrix must be reviewed between IT and user departments to set up a more conservative access allocation, especially the R&D department. The access by R&D grouping should be established, and only the project leaders should be able to edit the files in the project folders and the members can be assigned with read access. 
建议在员工离职检查表中添加共享文件夹的访问权限和账号检查，以确保账号和权限被及时删除。同时，IT和用户部门之间应当共同审查共享文件夹的访问矩阵，以建立更保守的权限分配，特别是研发部门。按照研发小组分配的访问矩阵应该建立，只有项目负责人才能编辑项目文件夹中的文件，项目成员才能被分配读访问权限。

Collaborate with GFPS China Financial Controller to understand the HBII reporting requirements and correct the COGNOS HBII mapping methods for the identified accounts to avoid further mistakes.
与GFPS中国区财务负责人合作，了解外方报告要求，并对发现错误的的科目进行COGNOS 报表映射方法的修正，以避免进一步的错误。

Break down the aged GRNI balance or at least the key positions, understand the reasons for late invoices and clear them whenever possible.
Seek if read-only access to GRNI orders in the SRM system could be granted to the Buyers for regular review and analysis.
长期的货到票未到订单余额应当进行明细分析，或至少分析其中的关键交易，了解延迟发票的原因，并尽可能清除它们。
寻求是否可以授予采购专员在SRM系统中对货到票未到订单的只读访问权限，用以进行定期查看和具体分析。

Firstly, GF is suggested to draft and issue a formal explanation of how CAPEX Project is de-fined, and what kind of spare parts must be included in the credit application. As far as spare parts are sourced related and together with CAPEX investments, include them in the credit amount of the credit application and disclose them as “non-capitalization”. If the electronical parts are installed together with the assets for machine functionality, they should be capitalized as well. Secondly, the Purchasing and Finance department should strictly follow the standard seek approval from the appropriate level of management based on the total credit amount.
The Purchasing department should strengthen the vendor due diligence check to ensure that all bid requirements are filled out in correct figures.
首先，GF应当起草并发布正式的解释，说明CAPEX项目是如何定义的，以及投资额度申请中必须包括何种备件。只要备件是相关的，并与CAPEX 投资一起进行，应将其包括在投资额度申请的金额中，并将其披露为“非资本化部分”。如果电子部件与机器功能资产一起安装，它们也应该资本化。其次，采购部和财务部应当严格遵照此标准并根据投资总额寻求适当管理层的批准。
采购部加强供应商尽职调查，以确保所有投标要求都以正确的信息填写。

Add the corresponding controls of vendor bidding, selection and ordering process in the internal guideline to reinforce the importance of proper traceability and transparency of the whole purchasing process. For instance, the dedicated OA template for the bidding process should replace the current tooling purchase request template, which must be filled out by vendor quotation documents. 
The OA template should always be utilized to make sure that the key information and decision process are documented for future reference.
在内部政策中增加对供应商比价、选择和订购过程的相应控制，以加强整个采购过程的可追溯性和透明度。例如，用于招标过程的专用OA模板应该取代目前的工具采购申请模板，该模板必须由供应商的报价文件来填写。
此OA模板应在每一个采购活动中采用，以确保关键信息和决策过程被记录下来，供将来参考。

Procurement department should perform at least an annual evaluation of the key indirect suppliers, e.g., mold and tooling, based on their quality and delivery performance, price, and collaboration requirements and remain documentation for continuous supplier performance improvement.
In case of low-performed suppliers, ask them for corrective measures and follow up the implementation and seek cost reduction opportunities in the following year.
采购部门应至少每年对关键的间接供应商（如模具）进行一次评估，根据他们的质量和交货表现、价格和配合度，并为持续改进供应商的表现保留文件。
如果是表现不佳的供应商，要求他们采取纠正措施，并跟踪执行情况，在下一年寻求降低成本的机会。

A process should be established to make sure that the stock information is accurately reflected in NCC according to the actual status of physical stock. Once the goods are moved to the separated warehouse area, the system movement must be finished no later than end of the next working day. On a regular basis, the warehouse keeper should review the status of the stock and remind the responsible personnel to proceed for the follow-up actions.
应建立一个流程，以确保库存信息根据实物库存的实际状况准确地反映在NCC中。一旦货物被移动到可疑品防止区域，系统中的库存转移必须不晚于下一个工作日结束时完成。仓库管理员应定期审查库存状况，并提醒负责人员继续采取后续行动。

The scrapping authorization requirement should be re-addressed to the production staff responsible; the correction signature must be checked before executing the scrapping request. In the meantime, the value of non-conformity should be calculated and recorded on the Quality Exception Review and Feedback form to make sure that the value criteria can be verified.
报废产品的审批要求应重新发送给负责的生产人员；执行报废申请前必须检查正确的签批已经到位。同时，应计算不合格品的价值，并记录在《质量异常反馈及评审单》上，以确保金额标准能够得到验证。

An R&D project budgeting and controlling process should be established. Cost types should firstly be defined for a relatively accurate estimation of budget and incurred costs tracking. On a regular basis, the Project Manager must review the budget consumption status, and the significant gaps must be highlighted, analyzed and acted on. 
应该建立一个研发项目的预算和控制流程。首先应该定义成本类型，以便对预算和发生的费用进行相对准确的估计和跟踪。项目经理应当定期检查预算消耗情况，必须强调、分析和处理重大的差距。

Identify the spare parts critical for production and with relatively longer lead-time, set up reasonable safety stock levels for those parts, and raise replenishment requests accordingly. 
Set up a regular review of the safety stock levels to both mitigate the risks and optimize the stock levels.
识别对生产有重要意义且交货期相对较长的零部件，为这些零部件设定合理的安全库存水平，并应提出相应的采购申请。
定期核查备件的安全库存水平，以减轻风险并优化库存水平。

It is suggested to consider launching the equipment management module in MES to integrate the data collection process. Ideally, the equipment administrator only needs to enter data once, and then the KPI will automatically be calculated. If the MES management module is not implemented in the short term, a monthly reconciliation should be performed to make sure that all failures are timely captured, fixed, and potentially analyzed for improvement.
建议考虑启动MES中的设备管理模块来整合数据收集过程。理想情况下，设备管理员可以只输入一次数据，然后系统自动计算KPI。如果短期内不考虑使用MES管理模块，则应每月进行一次核对，以确保所有的故障都能被及时捕捉、修复，并有可能进行分析改进。

The OA workflow should be adapted into two versions respectively for Chinaust Utility piping entities and fitting & ball valve entities. In order to effectively determine the price compliance for non-end customers, the average sales price of external parties should be defined in more detail with respect to the "external parties" and the starting and ending point of the "same period" term. Moreover, this average price should be listed on or attached to this application in form of a file as the benchmark for determination. 
OA的审批工作流程应调整为两个版本，分别由亚大管道公司和管件/球阀公司使用。为有效确定非终端客户定价的合规性，应更详细地定义 "外部客户"和 "同期"这项规定的起止点，该平均价格应列在申请表上或以文件形式附在申请表中，作为判断基准。

We recommend putting the pricing approval workflow online for automatic recording of necessary information, such as dates and application number, so that proper reference could be established between pricing approval and the contracts signed for post review and reconciliation. In the following sales contract review workflow, the pricing approval should be referred to make sure that the approved prices are indeed applied.
建议将定价审批工作流程合并到线上流程以确保相关文件的系统性留存，如日期和申请编号，通过线上流程关联定价确定的相关邮件审批或截图等，期后可通过索引核实到最终定价。在后期销售合同审批工作流程中，关联定价审批，以确保批准的价格确实被应用。

Collaborate with GFPS China Finance Controller to understand the HBII reporting requirements and correct the COGNOS HBII mapping methods for the identified accounts to avoid further errors.
与GFPS的中国区相关财务负责任人进行沟通，加深HBII各项汇报科目的理解并对发现的错报项目进行纠正以避免重复发生。

For items not included on the annual price list, require the Buyer to provide new supporting documentation or update the pricelist to ensure proper invoice verification.
若有采购价格不在年度清单中维护的，采购员应当提供询价后确认的邮件，或者更新价格清单用以作发票核对。

Include all key commercial terms such as lead-time, pricing mechanism (if any), payment terms and method, quality data and certifications in the annual RFQ template for proper comparison and evaluation.
If the pricing mechanism could not be provided by the supplier and a monthly quotation process is unavoidable, retain the monthly quotes and approvals in a documented manner, such as by email.
在年度比质比价模板中添加重要的商业条款，例如交货时间、定价机制（若有）、付款周期和方式、质量数据和证书等，以便进行适当的比较和评估。
如果供应商无法提供定价机制，而使得每月的比价过程无法避免的，以文档或邮件的方式保留供应商的每月报价以及审核流程。

Ensure that every case that incurs quality costs (internal/external) is supported with analysis and corrective/preventive action, whether or not formal feedback is required.
必须确保每个带来质量成本（内部/外部）的事项都有分析和纠正/预防措施的支持，无论客户是否需要正式的反馈。

Document the pricing process as well as roles and responsibilities and interfaces with applicable functions. Communicate pricing results transparently and in a standardized way to all departments and functions from the plant(s) and others who supported and are affected by the specific pricing project.

Communicate the pricing definition to all applicable employees. Ensure that all GFCS entities use the available pricing tool in SAP as intended. Proactively investigate cases where few or no pricing results were reported such as for BU China. Verify initial pricing claim calculation values submitted to members from the Sales Service team independently from the respective KAM / Account Managers.
Collect potential pricing opportunities in the existing CRM and systematically classify, prioritize and follow-up on them.

Develop role type specific job descriptions for all existing roles within GFCS GS. Ensure all em-ployees review and sign their job description with their respective line manager. Retain the signed job description in their personnel file. Any subsequent role or responsibility change should lead to an updated job description being drafted and signed.
Consider to target KAMs and Sales Directors to relative shares of the realized pricing amounts from the initially calculated pricing claim value instead of specific amounts.

Align the categories defined in the strategy with those used in the CRM. Define targets per part category (product hierarchy level) and regularly monitor and review their achievement with sup-porting dashboards in the CRM. Consider to expand the current definition of project prioritization classification for measurable factors that are captured and available in CRM.

Harmonize direct reporting lines and meeting participation across the European and Chinese teams. Communicate these changes to all applicable employees. Document pre-feasibility meetings held in China and share the meeting minutes with all applicable employees.

Maintain key contractual information such as agreed production volumes, renewal clauses or other side agreements in a dedicated contract overview file (i.e. MS Excel or Access) or in ded-icated input fields in the CRM. Track customer (design) changes systematically in a commonly accessible tool (i.e. CRM or QSYS). Regularly review this information and take necessary ac-tion.

Include a disclaimer in the design change quotation template stating the right to claim the oc-curring internal (personnel) costs in case a change is not implemented. Decide on a case-by-case basis for each customer / entity whether the actual cost or a fix price should be charged.
Implement the already existing CRM solution at GFCS Leipzig and use is consequently to man-age the sales funnel.
Implement the ICS for the HU branch office including responsible process owners. Conduct annual ICS validation to ensure that internal controls are executed effectively.

Cooperate with Corporate Tax and subject matter experts to implement a suitable solution to minimize the permanent establishment and tax risks for operations in Romania and Bulgaria. Operations must be conducted in a compliant manner in all jurisdictions.
Keep track of the intermediary assessment dates to ensure the timely renewal.

Change the rights to disposal on the bank accounts of the HU branch office from single to dual authorization to ensure all types of transactions and instructions, whether offline or through E-banking, require dual approvals.

Regarding the slow moving provision for parts and consumables, consult with BU and Division Controlling to align on an appropriate solution. Slow moving provision for spindles on stock should be calculated manually, similar to the existing calculation for any stock machines. Calculate and book the unused holiday provision following the same methodology as GFMS PL.

Introduce credit limits for customer accounts based on customer credit rating and historical turnover. Investigate possible credit insurance coverage through COFACE and fulfil requirements to qualify for coverage.
Ensure that the bad debt write-off process involves those responsible according to the applicable DoA.

All third party supplier invoices should be verified for substance, validity and accuracy by the responsible manager before approving it by signing the invoice. Only approved invoices should be booked by the Chief Accountant.

Establish a local travel expense policy specifying limits for airfare and accommodation costs. Implement a process to ensure a proper and timely approval of the travel expense reports before the respective reimbursement is made.

Track the depreciation of renovations to the leased building for both statutory (10 years) and accounting (5 years) purposes. Adjust the useful life of the leasehold improvements. Ensure the application of the useful lifetime schedule of the GF Finance Manual.
Follow the guidelines provided by the Finance Manual and ensure the credit applications for CAPEX investments are approved prior to their execution.

Implement an approval process for credit notes by the department managers who should ensure that the reason is justified and in case of technical corrections, a new invoice is issued at the same as the credit note. In case an approval process is deemed infeasible, a monthly retrospective control should be performed on all credit notes issued before month-end closing to ensure appropriateness and issuance of new invoices.
Define the documents to be stored in the personnel files for new hires and departures. Prepare an entry and exit checklist in accordance with this list.

Reconcile the monthly salaries by line item with the detailed ERP payroll extract or with the document provided by the external payroll service provider before releasing payments. Investigate any discrepancies.

Increase efforts in ensuring FSEs complete the Setup protocol iPDFs timely after installation. An additional control could be implemented prior to the approval of the monthly travel expense claim of the FSE to verify if all iPDFs have been completed and sent.

Ensure a written order is received from the customer before rendering billable services. For customers that insist on PO numbers being included on invoices, an official PO should be obtained from the customer.
Configure the 3S software to automatically calculate and show the expected billing value for service interventions and enter the actual billed value into 3S in order to enable detection of potential billing errors in the same manner as GFMS PL.

At GFMS PL, implement an additional column in the operational warranty parts tracking sheet to record the date when the broken parts are returned to the local warehouse by the FSE or the customer in order to detect unreturned parts earlier. Ensure this tracking sheet is updated timely.
At the HU branch office, implement a proper tracking and control process for warranty parts re-turns from both an operational and a financial perspective.

For the reporting of waste material, consider to come up with an approximation of the actual weight of the disposed foam based on the number of filled containers to improve accuracy of the reported figures. To avoid future interpunctuation mistakes, implement a review of reported figures in SIS following the 4-eyes-principle. Ensure consistency in the reporting of headcount and FTE by reviewing its underlying calculations.
Consider an investment to ensure hazardous materials are stored safely in Calmar from both environmental and health & safety perspectives.
Apply a reasonable surcharge factor on the transfer pricing to achieve standard costs for traded goods on a landed basis.

Work together with the purchasing team to increase efforts on the follow-up of open items on the GR/IR account. Retain follow-up comments and justifications on items aged above 3 months if not cleared.

Stop the usage of the one-time customer account for sales orders. The account shall only be used for quoting to new customers. Actual sales orders should be booked on specific customer accounts. Resolve remaining open invoices on the one-time customer account as soon as possible.
Include specific wording in the sales bonus scheme that sales figures are based on actual collected sales. Finance should exclude unpaid invoices from the sales figures when calculating sales bonus.
Ensure all future asset scrapping adheres to the DoA approval requirements. Obtain retrospective approval for the scrapping booked in 2022.

Sign suitable contracts with key suppliers and subcontractors using the GFPS contract templates approved by Corporate Legal. For outsourced manufacturing of GF branded products, follow the approval requirements of the GFPS Delegation of Authorities.

Liaise with the GFPS Chief Procurement Officer regarding the necessity of the current practice. Consider stopping the practice of issuing blanket POs. Purchases should be made with the principle of Economic Order Quantity and shall not exceed an expected reach period of 120 days.
Consider requiring all POs to be released by an approver regardless of value or requiring all POs types to require a goods receipt by a second user.

Re-establish segregation of duties between picking and packing at the distribution center as soon as possible. Catch up on the picking backlog by voluntary overtime, if possible.
Start using the handheld scanners at least indoors at the Calmar plant.

Leverage the already available SAP Production module to include labor costs in the costing of locally pre-fabricated products and actuated valves through the creation of BOMs and routings. This shall enable margin transparency on such products.

Work with the GFPS SAP team to implement an approval workflow for all sales quotations and sales orders below a certain gross margin threshold (e.g. 15%). Such quotations or orders should require an approval by the inside sales manager in SAP before they can be generated.
Ensure the requested delivery date field on the sales order is entered according to the customer purchase order (as long as such date is in line with the previously communicated lead-time).
Conduct an overall review of BOMs and routings based on actual SAP data collected as well as production floor observations (e.g. via stopwatch).

Ensure at least all equipment requiring maintenance are entered into FIIX along with their maintenance frequency, even if the maintenance checklists are to be completed later once more resources become available. This will allow the maintenance plan to be generated and the completion of planned maintenance to be recorded in the system.

Formalize the management of spare parts at both plants with priority on critical machinery without backup redundancy. This should include definition of critical spare parts referencing manufacturer manuals, establishment of reasonable minimum stock of spare parts with long delivery lead-time and a proper stock monitoring and replenishment process.
Develop and apply a suitable non-destructive quality testing method for COOL-FIT pipes produced in Coteau-du-lac.

Clarify the remaining liabilities in terms of the two quality issues and, based on the current historical data, record the corresponding balance in the HBII financial report and conduct monthly or at least quarterly review of the balance.
Align with GFPS BU Asia responsible Finance Manager on the requirements of GFPS Divisional Guideline "Handling of Warranty Provisions" regarding how to determine the warranty provision in terms of special and general warranty cases.
理清两项质量问题还涉及的剩余索赔义务，根据当前的历史数据，在河北亚大汽车的外放财务报告中计提相应的余额，并对余额进行每月或至少每季度的审阅。
与GFPS亚太区的财务经理协调，按照GFPS事业部 "质量保证金的处理"要求，就如何确定特殊和一般质量索赔情况下的使用的条款进行沟通并达成一致。

The process and documentation requirements should be reinforced to all the buyers who are responsible for sending and collecting RFQs. Single source RFQ can only be initiated according to a specifically remarked application form, supported by the Notification of Designated Supplier with proper signatures from both the Product Manager and the Account Manager.
应向所有负责发送和收集询价单的采购专员加强宣贯流程和文件要求，指定询价只能根据特别注明的询价申请表进行，并有产品经理和客户经理签字的《供应商指定通知函》来支持。

Firstly, the purchasing department should deliver trainings to the suppliers and reinforce the requirement of the RFQ process. The suppliers should only be allowed to submit quotations on SRM within the required time period. If quotations change after initially submitted, the information must be changed on SRM as well.
When preparing for supplier selection application form, the buyers should extract the quotations from SRM and attach them with the application form, the approver must always reconcile the documents first to make sure that the information is correctly stated on the application form.
首先，采购部门应该对供应商进行培训，加强对询价流程的要求。只允许供应商在规定的时间内在SRM上提交报价单。如果报价在最初提交后发生变化，也必须在SRM上相应更改信息。
在准备定点定价审批表时，采购员应从SRM中下载报价单，并将其附在申请表后，审批人必须首先核对文件上信息的一致性，以确保申请表上的信息是正确的。

Firstly, it is suggested to stop using one SRM account to handle all purchase orders and create dedicated user accounts for all buyers. The buyers can place the orders and track the delivery status of their own responsible materials, reducing the unnecessary workload from communication within the Purchasing department. 
Secondly, the Purchasing department should reach out to SRM system administrator and get the access for the delivery monitor report and start using the system report for purchase order delivery tracking.
首先，建议停止使用一个SRM账户来处理所有的采购订单的做法，为所有的采购专员建立其专门的用户账3。采购专员可以直接下订单并跟踪他们自己负责的物料的交付状态，减少采购部门内部沟通带来的不必要的工作量。
其次，采购部门应与SRM系统管理员联系，获得导出订单交付监控报告的权限，并开始使用系统报告来跟踪采购订单的交付情况。

Conduct annual bidding and selection controls for the logistics vendors in terms of the key international transportation routes.
针对重点国际运输路线，对国际物流供应商进行年度比质比价和供应商选择审批流程控制。

Based on the financial data extracted from the NCC system, organize monthly joint meetings to monitor and analyze the products with not only low or negative margins but also those with deteriorating margins individually. 
Document the root causes, and define feasible improvement plans with dedicated responsible individuals and follow-up deadlines, so that all the actions could be followed up in a looped manner.
In case of those products with compromised margins as agreed in the original quotations offered to the customers and well understood as a strategic sales approach by the management, set up different target ranges from the other products to ensure the monthly analysis is targeted to those that could be improved and not only those in low margins vastly impacted by specific sales strategies.
根据从NCC系统中提取的财务数据，每月组织一次联席会议，不仅单独分析低利润和负利润的产品，也要分析毛利恶化的产品。
记录根本原因，并确定可行的改进计划，由专人负责，并规定跟进期限，以便所有行动都能循环跟进。
对于那些在提供给客户的原始报价中约定的、被管理层理解为战略销售方法的、利润率受到影响的产品，要设定与其他产品不同的目标范围，以确保每月的分析是针对那些可以改善的产品，而不仅仅是那些受特定销售策略影响的低利润产品。

Clear and consistent instructions and cost template should be internally defined and communicated to the Salespersons upon cost calculation and project approval. 
The instruction should clarify which cost factors needed to be included in the calculation and based on which methodologies, e.g., exchange rate reference method, annual increase in production costs, and cost changes in case of projects to be relocated to the Mexican plant, etc. for the upcoming projects.
When requesting for the project approvals, in case of simplifying or eliminating certain assumptions, justifications and follow-up measures should be documented in the application to avoid potential oversights or misunderstandings, increase cost transparency and provide warnings to the approvers.
在成本计算和项目批准时，应在内部定义明确和一致的指导信息和成本模板，并传达给销售人员。其中需要列明哪些成本因素需要纳入计算以及通过何种方法纳入计算，例如，汇率参考方法、制造成本的年度增长，以及项目生产搬迁至墨西哥工厂所涉及的各项成本变化等。
在申请项目审批时，如需要简化或取消某些成本估算项，应在申请中记录写明理由以及期后更进措施，以避免潜在的成本疏漏或误解，增加项目成本透明度，同时给审批的管理人员进行警示。

Reinforce the importance of timely following up the pending exceptions reported in the MES system to the concerned departments.
Perform monthly review on the pending interruption cases and close the ones that have already been solved in a timely manner to ensure correct status reporting in the system for monitoring and controlling.
加强对有关部门培训及时跟进MES系统中报告的未决例外事项的重要性。
每月对未决生产中断事项进行审查，并及时关闭已经解决的案件，以确保系统中的状态报告正确，以便进行监督和控制。

Firstly, the unsolved equipment failure reports should be identified and sorted out in terms of which are real pending cases, and which are actually closed but the maintenance staff forgot to close the ticket. For the pending ones, actions must be taken immediately to solve the problem. Secondly, investigation should be performed to understand why certain failure reports do not appear in the list of overviews and whether the same inconsistencies will persist in the new module. Finally, since the new system will also provide the function of machine failure list and equipment history card, if the data does not synchronize, a regular manual review is suggested to avoid omission of failure reports. 
首先，应该对未解决的设备故障报告进行识别和整理，确认哪些是真正的尚待解决问题，哪些是实际已经关闭但维修人员忘记关闭的事项。对于未解决的报告，必须立即采取行动加以解决。其次，应进行调查，了解为什么某些故障报告没有出现在概览列表中，以及在新模块中是否会持续存在同样的不一致。最后，由于新系统还将提供机器故障列表和设备历史卡的功能，如果系统没有自动的数据同步功能，建议定期进行人工审核，避免遗漏故障报告。

Relocate the heavy and high coils of pipe from the top shelf if the lower shelves are empty.
Reprint the block code and the rack labels, and place them in the appropriate locations to en-sure proper traceability and visibility to the Operators.
Launch the barcoding system for the stock management of the main warehouse for raw materi-als, semi-finished goods, and customer-consigned components to eliminate the error-prone manual tracking method.
Understand the labels placed on the customer's products by the original vendors and follow the signs on the material package for proper storage to ensure quality compliance.
Place covers over unpacked product packages or boxes to prevent any product contamination.
如果有较低的架子是空余的，将质量重且高的盘管管子卷从顶层架子上移开。
重新打印区块编号和货架标签，并将其放置在适当位置以确保可追溯性和操作人员的可见性。
为该主要的原材料、半成品和客户受托物资的库存启用条码物流管理系统，以淘汰容易出错的手工进出跟踪方法。
了解原供应商在客户受托产品上所贴标签的含义，并尽可能地按照包装上的标签警示来进行存放，以保证质量的合规性。
在已拆包的产品包装或盒子上放置遮盖物，以防止产品被污染。

Upon launching the new NCC ERP system, configure sales orders (with quantity but zero unit price) or production orders as a prerequisite to systematically control the delivery process and eliminate unauthorized over-deliveries. 
Add Logistics as one of the recipients of the OA approval on FoC deliveries and require product quantity as mandatory field in the application, to avoid information breakdown or errors in trans-ferring the information from CS to Logistics.
在NCC ERP系统上线时，设置销售订单（有数量但单价为零）或生产领用订单作为存货出库的前提条件，以系统性控制发货流程和消除未经授权的超额发货。若系统性的操作不可实行，对该特别类型的物料发货进行定期性审查，用以作为期后补充控制。
将物流部作为OA免费样件发货审批单据的接收方之一并且要求将产品数量作为申请必填项目，以避免信息中断或从客服到物流信息传输过程中的人为错误。

Follow up the application for the R&D project management system including providing inputs to the internal software developer on the specific needs and operational difficulties that the R&D team has currently been confronted with, e.g. distinguishing key projects from small projects with different management requirements (e.g. focusing on the key projects while simplifying the small projects), to ensure major milestone and task tracking could be feasible and targeted. 
Update the APQP document in real-time and retrospectively by adding the latest status and completion date in the form of a checklist so that timely follow-up can be monitored and alerted.
Regulate the disciplines for documenting project information in the PLM system, including pro-ject name and original material number.
跟进研发项目管理系统的申请，包括向内部软件设计员提供关于目前所面临的具体需求的投入，如区分大小项目追踪和记录的要求，(如小项目简化管理，重点项目准确管理等)，以确保重点项目的阶段和任务的追踪具有可操作性并且有针对性。
实时和回顾性地更新APQP文件，以检查表的形式回溯添加所有任务的最新状态和完成日期，以便对及时跟进进行监控和提醒。规范PLM系统中记录项目信息的规律包括项目名称和原始材料编号。

Establish a credit assessment guideline for Chinaust Automotive Business Segment, based on which assess credit limits per customer, and adjust them according to the inputs from the Sales, Finance, and management team. The assessed results could be further used for both the manual credit control and the future master data mass uploading to the NCC platform. 
In the transition period before NCC ERP implementation, conduct manual controls on risky customers (EV customers) based on the reassessed credit limits upon goods delivery per order, or set maximum order value per customer, above which reassessment should be performed and proper approval from the management team should be obtained before outbound delivery.
Upon NCC roll-out, set up customer credit limits in the master data for automatic credit controls. Whenever new customers are introduced between the annual reviews, credit limit of the customer should be individually assessed, approved, and added to the system before the first delivery.
为亚大汽车事业部制定一个信用评估指导，以此初步评估的每位客户的信用限额，结合销售、财务和管理层的意见进行调整，综合意见后形成的信用额可进一步用于作为现阶段手工控制的数据以及未来NCC上线后输入的数据源。
在NCC ERP上线前的过渡期，依据每个订单交付时重新评估的信用额度对风险高的客户（新能源客户）进行手动信用控制，或设定一个针对风险客户的最大订单价，超过该价值的订单发货前应进行针对该客户的信用评估，并获得管理团队的适当批准。
NCC上线后，在主数据中设置对应客户的信用，以进行自动信用控制。每当在年度信用评估间有引入新客户时，应单独评估、批准该新客户的信用额度，并在首次发货前将其添加到NCC系统中。

Collaborate with GFPS BU Asia Finance & Operation to better understand the HBII reporting requirements and correct the COGNOS HBII mapping methods for the identified accounts to avoid recurring reclassification mistakes in the future.
For the potential claim for the special warranty case, confirm the provision accuracy and whether the products are under warranty based on the supporting documents from Sales and Quality, and re-evaluate the balance whenever necessary.
与GFPS亚洲事业部财务和运营经理进行沟通，加深对HBII各类报告要求的理解，并纠正已支出的COGNOS HBII对应勾稽方法，避免期后重复发生该重分类错误。
针对特殊计提的潜在索赔款，确认计提额的准确性，以及产品是否在质保期内，对余额进重新评估并进行填列。

Discuss and clarify with GFPS BU Asia Finance & Operation the same QS accrual methodology applicable to other Chinaust Auto entities, e.g., set CNY 1.4 mio as the criteria for over-period QS amortization, clarify the time points for booking accruals and terminating accruals in different scenarios, e.g., upon Sales confirmation and Finance validation, and make financial adjustments whenever necessary.
Deliver training to all relevant departments like Sales to ensure that clear and accurate sales incentive information could be provided to Finance in a timely manner to easily differentiate quick-savings from other rebates and fix the accrual balance to allow for standardized and appropriate amortization over the life cycle of the project.
与GFPS亚洲财务运营经理讨论并明确适用于其他亚大汽车公司的捆绑返利的入账方法，例如将140万人民币作为单次捆绑返利计提的标准，明确不同条件下何时进行计提以及合适终止计提，如基于销售确认以及财务核实后，并在必要时对财报的影响进行调整。
对所有相关部门（如销售部）进行相关培训，以确保销售能够及时向财务部提供清晰准确的销售折让信息，以便于财务区分捆绑返利和其他折扣，并固定计提金额，以便在项目生命周期内进行标准化和适当的摊销。

In the next cycle of employee performance review, the HR department should work with the line managers of all high-potential employees to finish the review interviews. Meanwhile, individual training plans should be formed as well for effective motivation and development of the high potential. 
在下一个员工绩效评估周期，人力资源部门应与所有高潜力员工的部门经理合作，完成评估面谈。同时，为了有效激励和发展高潜力员工，也应制定个人培训计划。

It is suggested that the probation review could be initiated by department managers, on a regular basis, the HR department should send notifications to all departments for a timely check of ending probations, and based on the notice, the department managers could raise the applications for all the new hires about to pass probation within the department. 
建议员工转正申请可以由部门经理发起，定期由人力资源部门向所有部门发出通知，及时检查试用期结束情况，根据通知，部门经理可以为部门内所有即将转正的新员工提出OA申请。

The role and responsibility of SIS reporting should be reviewed and re-designed, responsibility for ensuring the completeness and accuracy of data must be assigned to individuals that provide the data, as an effective support to the SIS administrator. 
The quantity of re-grinded material should be regularly collected and reported to the administrator for data entry in SIS. 
Finance and Admin should work together to define a more accurate and complete definition of environmental costs to cover all items that should have been reported under the category. 
An internal review of all kinds of waste and respective disposal methods should be performed to make sure that SIS reporting captures all related expenses. 
Treatment or incineration of hazardous waste must be used instead of external recycling to report the treatment of hazardous waste, to be in line with the actual situation.
应检查和重新设计SIS数据报告的责任分配，保证数据的完整性和准确性的责任必须分配给提供数据的同事，对SIS系统管理员进行有效的支持。
应定期收集破碎回收材料的数量并向管理员报告，以便在SIS中输入数据。
财务和行政部门应共同对环境成本进行更准确和完整的定义以涵盖本应在该类别下报告的所有项。
应对所有种类的废品和各自的处理方法进行内部审查，以确保SIS报告能够捕捉到所有相关费用。
使用处理或焚烧危险废物，而不是外部回收的项目来报告危险废物处置的信息，以符合实际情况。

Change the reporting method of supplier quality issues from individual weekly or monthly re-ports to a holistic tracking list of all open and closed cases in a continuous method.
Follow up latest status of all key open items including the implementation of the internal and external action plans during the weekly meeting based on the tracking list to avoid any over-sight.
将供应商质量问题追踪的报告方法从单个的每周或每月报告形式改为以持续的方式对所有未结和已结案件进行整体跟踪。
根据持续跟踪的清单，在每周的会议上跟进所有关键的未结项目的最新状况，包括内部和外部的行动计划执行的情况，以避免任何疏忽。

The Finance department at Chinaust Shanghai Auto should work with the Chinaust Auto Business Segment to update the OA authorization workflow to be in line with the DoA. 
All retired assets must be reviewed and authorized sufficiently following the company policy. 
上海亚大汽车的财务部门应与亚大汽车事业部合作，更新OA审批流程，使之与DoA保持一致。
所有报废的资产必须按照公司政策进行充分的审查和授权。

Arrange joint meetings among the Business Segment stakeholders and the Sales departments of the Chinaust Auto entities in articulating the proper market strategy, quantitative pricing guidance, and customer classification methodology of the new energy storage business to systematically govern the overall sales strategy and execution requirements for the new market segment.
If as required by the new guideline, a customer is assigned to a certain tier or the project gross profit is less than the minimum requirement, a feasible and appropriate approval workflow should be established. The new policy and guidance should serve first as a supportive guide for Salespersons and then as an internal control process to be followed to avoid potential risks.
安排事业部门和亚大汽车各公司的销售部门举行联合会议，明确新能源存储业务的适当市场战略、量化的指导方针和客户分级方法，以系统化管理该新业务类别的整体销售战略和具体执行要求。
按照新制定的规范要求，若某客户被划归为某一等级或者该项目预计毛利低于最低毛利要求，则应制定可行和合适的审批方法。确保新政策和指导首先作为对销售人员的支持性指导文件，其次再是需要遵守的内部控制流程。

An approval workflow should be established for the repair and maintenance of molds. The process could be integrated into the OA platform and apply the authorization rule for other non-production materials/expenses.
应该为胎具的维修和保养建立一个审批工作流程。该流程可以整合到OA平台中，并与其他非生产材料/费用适用同样的审批规则。

Firstly, the status information must be correctly configured in the SRM system for the buyers to choose the right status for filtering. If applicable, the subsequent release of RFQ, the approval for vendor selection, and the entry of supplier data should be linked with each other to ensure automatic control of data consistency and the status of RFQ can be automatically changed as well when the process goes on the next steps.
首先，在SRM系统中必须正确配置询价单状态信息，以便采购员选择合适的状态进行筛选。如果可行的话，后续的RFQ发布、供应商的批准和供应商零件数据的录入应该相互关联，以确保自动控制数据的一致性，当流程进入下一个步骤时，RFQ的状态也可以自动改变。

The Procurement department and the material planning team are suggested to firstly actively reach out to the suppliers for negotiation of purchase orders with the remaining quantity to be delivered and form a clear picture as to how many orders (with amount) are under risk of disputes. Secondly, the Purchasing, Sales, and Finance departments should work together to evaluate the possibility of further consumption of the parts ordered but not delivered. For the parts that are identified as not needed indeed, compensations must be estimated and provided for as agreed with suppliers in the logistics agreement. 
If an order is modified due to customer reasons, potential payment commitments from the corresponding supplier should be collected for negotiation with the customer.
建议采购部门和物料计划小组首先积极与供应商联系，就有剩余交货量的采购订单进行商谈，并清楚了解有多少订单（含金额）存在争议的风险。其次，采购部、销售部和财务部应共同评估已下单但未交付的零部件未来消耗的可能性。对于那些被确认为不再需要的零件，必须按照与供应商在物流协议中的约定的补偿条款进行预估和记录。
若是由于客户原因导致的订单修改，则应收集对应的供应商处潜在的付款承诺情况，用以和客户进行协商谈判。
Ensure that tasks from job descriptions used as a basis for the job opening reconcile with the tasks agreed and annually assessed during the MyPD@GF process.

Define roles and responsibilities for contract tracking and management at GFPS Harvel. Re-establish the previously implemented contract tracking and management process by updating the Excel-based overview tracking file with all key criteria from all contractual agreements currently in place with GFPS Harvel's third parties.
Ensure that acknowledge statements are signed timely (i.e. latest by the end of the probation period). Add this topic to the existing employee entry checklist.

Draft an action plan to align the current server room condition with Division Instruction 8918. Review the planned actions with GFPS Risk Management and GFPS Global IT in Schaffhausen and implement these accordingly.

Remove granted access to non-GF email addresses immediately. Review the process with GF IT and implement a solution compliant with GF's Corporate Security Guideline for Introduction of Cloud Services such as Microsoft Teams / SharePoint.

Consequently use standard Incoterms in sales orders and corresponding invoices. Ensure that GFPS Harvel's GTCs are referred to on invoices. Implement a process to systematically identify shipments with critical Incoterms shipped before crucial cut-off dates. Ensure that revenue is recognized in the correct accounting period and based on the agreed upon Incoterms.
Increase efforts (i.e. initiate regular meetings) on the follow-up of aged open items on the GR/IR account and ensure a timelier clearing in the future.

Ensure that selected useful life periods are in line with the schedule from Division Instruction 7756. Document the selected useful life period by referencing it to the respective rules / useful life period selected from Division Instruction 7756.

Add the originally approved Capex amount to the existing Capex projects tracking file. Calculate the anticipated budget overruns in the file by comparing the original approved Capex amount with the total spend. Collect necessary approvals according to Delegation of Authorities requirements for Capex projects with overrun budgets (i.e. >10%).

Establish clear guidelines on supplier selection, including criteria for requestor selection and data requirements. Ensure that all RFQ related documentation is collected and analyzed by the Procurement department and readily available stored at a central location (i.e. in the Procurement department).
Ensure POs are preceded by PRs. Review user access rights and approval setup so that loopholes such as PO creators approving their own created POs are closed to ensure proper segregation of duties.
Introduce a periodic review of open POs and close inactive POs after a defined period of inactivity.

Prepare an annual supplier audit plan for 2023 and 2024. Schedule and complete the planned audits in joint efforts with Quality and Sustainability personnel. Communicate the results to the suppliers and follow-up on identified observations.

Re-negotiate the existing terms and conditions of the existing warehouse contract to ensure that inventory damages and loss will be insured / covered or discontinue the business relationship with the external warehouse provider.
Segregate incoming and outgoing areas in the warehouse. Install a scale and verify the weight for incoming goods consequently.
Remove the access rights to change POs for those employees having goods receipt access rights and vice versa. Periodically, review the current access rights in SAP to ensure no SoD conflicts exist.

Address the aforementioned observations in the shopfloor meeting and define responsible employees for corrective actions. Non-action by the responsible employee should be addressed specifically and immediately to ensure the employee understands that GF's Standards for Occupational Health & Safety and 5S are mandatory and not optional. Ensure that a minimum level 5S and fire protection are implemented in the external warehouse.

Define scrap rate reduction actions. Document defined actions accordingly with observation, fol-low-up action responsible and due date. Maintain a list of all defined actions in the share drive and make sure all concerned employees have access to the file. Whenever an action is completed, the respective person should update the status and the completion date. A periodic review should also be performed to identify and follow up on pending action plans.

Assess the suitability of the "Fixx" application versus the implementation of the SAP Preventive Maintenance module. Consequently use work orders for all sorts of maintenance activities. Develop an at-a-glance planning and fulfillment schedule for preventive maintenance activities. Analyze which maintenance activities have been performed during the last two years to ensure that eventual backlog activities are considered in the preventive maintenance plan and performed with priority. Include preventive maintenance slots in the production planning.

Restrict physical access to the spare parts location. Implement a comprehensive spare parts with-rawal process where withdrawals are entered in "Fixx". Complete the spare parts inventorization process and determine the corresponding value per spare part. Account for spare parts accordingly by applying an agreed on (i.e. with BU, Division and Corporate Controlling) threshold. Assess the suitability of the "Fixx" application versus the implementation of the SAP Preventive Maintenance module.
Have the system generated payroll changes report reviewed by a person not having any rights to change payroll data (i.e. the Managing Director).
Define a local DoA aligned to the Division DoA. Share the local DoA with the employees of GFMS CSC.

Define a responsible employee to independently review the manual journal entries (i.e. Head of SSC). Document a review process by preparing an extract of all manual journals for the review and retain the evidence of the review. Consider revoking the right to post manual journal entries from the Head of SSC.

Assess the cantonal tax requirements to register supplier invoices for claiming the VAT receivable. Based on the gained information, tailor a local GR/IR account handling guideline and define a GR/IR account review frequency. Consider contacting Corporate Controlling in case of uncertainties. Conduct a review of all line items in the GR/IR account and release aged items in accordance to local requirement.
Identify all recurring service invoices that do not follow the BIZValidator approval workflow. Remove the approval rights for all kind of invoices from the CSSC in BIZValidator.
