The Order Specialist should extract the sales order backlog report from NCC on a regular basis and follow up on the status. If certain sales order has clear confirmation that the remaining quantity will not be needed anymore, the order can be closed to avoid repeated work in future. The most updated status of each order should be documented and reviewed closely.
订单专员应定期从 NCC 导出未完成的销售订单清单并跟进状态。如果某些销售订单已明确确认不再需要剩余数量，则可关闭订单，以避免日后重复工作。每份订单的最新状态都应记录在案，并进行密切审查。

The NCC production order completion status should be reviewed and updated on a timely basis to make sure that the report is reliable for analysis. In the meantime, the completion timeliness should be taken into consideration as well, a target should be set and deviations must be identified for analysis and improvement actions.
应及时审查和更新 NCC 生产订单的完成情况，以确保分析报告的可靠性。同时，还应考虑完成的及时性，设定目标，并找出偏差，以便进行分析和采取改进措施。

Keep the original counting sheets for the monthly raw material stock take, the sheet should be accurately dated and signed. The adjustments of PE input figures should be made according to a consistent methodology and recorded with clear justification. 
The machine failures should be completely documented, especially major failures with significant failure hours. The failure rates for production lines need to be discussed during the monthly maintenance meeting in order to define proper actions.
保留每月原材料库存盘点的原始盘点单，盘点单应准确注明日期并签名。投入原材料数据的调整应按照一贯的方法进行，并记录在案，说明调整的理由。
应完整记录机器故障，特别是故障时间较长的重大故障。需要在每月的维护会议上讨论生产线的故障率，以便确定适当的行动。

Establish a combined overview of all contracts signed across all departments. Re-design the contract tracking list template to make a running contract tracking system. Make sure that the purchased material type, contract amount, payment term, payment method, cancelation and expiration date, potential covenants and whether the contract applies standard Chinaust contract template are included and filled in when conducting contract registration. 
重新设计合同登记台账模板，使之成为一个永续的合同跟踪体系。确保采购物资类型、合同金额、付款条件、付款方式和是否使用亚大合同模板等信息都包含在这个模板中，并在登记台账时完整填写。

The special warranty provision (amount and calculation logic) for urea pipes should be revisited together by Finance, Sales and Quality department. If the provision is to cover the warranty risks prior to the engineering change, it should be netted against the actual warranty costs incurred over the years following the provision until the end of the warranty period. If future risks still remain after the engineering change, the new warranty rate should be monitored and used for a rolling calculation to accurately reflect the actual risk.
财务、销售和质量部门应共同重新审查尿素管的特别准备金金额和计算逻辑。如果准备金是用于反映工程变更之前产品的售后风险，则应将其与准备金计提之后直至保修期结束的数年内实际发生的售后费用逐年进行抵消。如果工程变更后仍存在未来风险，则应计算新的售后索赔率并进行滚动计算，以尽可能准确反映实际风险。

Supplier account should be created where possible for the management of payment terms maximization and summary of expenses per supplier. Specifically, for the suppliers of non-production materials with annual framework contract, the designated supplier account must be created. In the meantime, the purchasing department should also try to negotiate with suppliers to reach more favorable payment terms.
在可能的情况下，应建立供应商账户，以便最大限度地管理付款条件和汇总每个供应 商的费用。具体来说，对于签订年度框架合同的非生产材料供应商，必须建立指定的供应商账 户。同时，采购部门还应试着与供应商谈判，以达成更优惠的付款条件。

Training on the reimbursement process should be organized and all employees should be required to comply with the company's reimbursement rules.
Review local business entertainment events reimbursement guideline if budget unit amount is reasonable for the business nature.
When approving reimbursement applications, the finance department should carefully review for any anomalies and request relevant evidence.
For reimbursement that uses fixed amount invoices, receipt is needed to indicate the actual expense.

应组织报销流程的培训，要求所有员工遵守公司的报销规定。
回顾招待费的规定，并评估餐标对于实际业务性质的合理性。
财务在审批报销时，应关注异常情况，并要求报销人提供相关证据。
对于使用固定金额票据的报销，应要求提供消费水单，以证明其实际招待花销金额。

Review the Procurement Planning Operational Guidelines and revise the terms in the guidelines if there are instances where the current mode of operation is not appropriate for the commercial vehicle business.
If current guideline still applicable for commercial vehicle business, update the planning excel spreadsheet and link calculation format with to all the relevant data sources such as lead-time, stock in-transit, material demand forecast, and lot size. Pre-set the calculation logic in MRP tool. Manual adjustments could be made on MRP calculation result while necessary but proper reason and justification are documented.
重新回顾采购计划操作指南，若当前的操作模式存在不合适商用车业务的情况，则对操作指南中的条款进行修改。
若当前操作指南仍适用于商用车业务情况，则更新当前的计划表，链接所有相关数据源（如交货时间、在途库存、材料需求预测和批量大小），预先设置好计算逻辑以计算需求。当需要时可以对物料需求计划计算计算结果进行修改，但应注明合适的原因及判断。

Firstly, the list of personnel with permission to enter the premise from the side gate should be reviewed and officially approved. Only necessary entrance should be allowed, for example, the entrance for goods movement. Secondly, an access control system (by badge, fingerprint or face id) should be implemented to ensure that each entrance is recorded, and only authorized personnel can enter from the side gate. Finally, the security team should exam all the surveillance cameras and make sure they all work to realize a complete and effective monitor of the whole plant.
首先，应审查并正式批准获准从侧门进入办公场所的人员名单，只允许必要的人员进入，如货物运输。其次，应实施门禁系统（通过门禁卡、指纹或人脸识别），确保每次外部人员进入都有记录，只有经授权的人员才能从侧门进入。最后，安全部门应检查所有监控摄像头，确保它们都能正常工作，以实现对整个工厂的全面有效监控。

Follow the Chinaust Automotive business segment DoA requirements by adhering to the approved bottom-line price and request the approvals on the OA platform before offering to customers. In case of exceptions, where the approved bottom line could not be met, after verbal approval, Sales should perform a regular review and identify cases where the quoted price is lower than the approved price and submit for official approval as soon as possible. 
Standardize the quotation tracking list and make sure that all quotations are recorded with sufficient information for exception identification. 
遵守亚大汽车事业部的 DoA 要求，根据已内部核准的底线价格报价，并在向客户确认价格前在 OA 平台上申请批准。对于无法达到内部核准价格的例外情况，市场部应当定期汇总低于内部核准价的情况，并尽快提交获取正式审批。
将报价台账标准化，确保所有的报价都有足够的信息记录，以便识别低于核定价格的情况。

Review the LPA plan and adjust the reporting frequency to align with the business needs.
Review application scope for LPA and routing verification. Conduct the LPA and routing verification according to requirement. 
All the safety related issue should be input into QMS system. Work with IT to simplify redundant offline and online tasks by reviewing the QMS's data export capabilities. This will increase efficiency and enable better tracking of security issue rectification.
开展分层审核 LPA。审查分层审核计划并调整报告频率，使其符合业务需求。
回顾LPA和工艺审核的范围，按要求执行LPA及工艺审核。
在QMS系统中录入所有安全问题。与 IT 部门合作研究QMS的数据导出功能，以简化需要同时进行的离线和在线工作。这将提高效率，更好地跟踪安全问题的整改情况。

Ensure the original production records are complete. All defective products produced, regardless of the cause, should be recorded in the original production records.
应保证生产原始记录的完整性。生产中的不良品不论产生原因，应全部记录在生产原始记录中。

Firstly, if it has been decided that this external maintenance service is to be terminated, an official contract termination notice should be sent to avoid potential legal disputes. Secondly, the process to ensure sufficient evidence of external R&M service should be established. Each activity should be supported by a service report signed by both the external technician and internal maintenance staff with clear information such as initiator, approver (to decide if internal resource can already meet the needs), type of activity, date, service hours. Finally, the external expenses should be summarized on a regular basis and analyzed to identify potential resource misuse. 

首先，如果公司决定终止这项外部维护服务，应发出正式的合同终止通知，以避免潜在的法律纠纷；其次，应制定程序，确保外部维保服务有充分的支持性材料。每次服务都应附有一份由外部技术人员和内部维保员工共同签署确认的服务报告，其中应包含明确的信息，如服务需求发起人、批准人（以确定内部资源是否已能满足需求）、服务活动类型、日期、服务时间。最后，应定期汇总和分析外部支出，以发现潜在的资源滥用。

Add completion progress to action plans in monthly quality meeting reports to better trace the status of action plans. If any issues arise, action plans can be promptly updated or supplemented.
在质量月会报告中，增加行动方案的完成情况，以更好地对行动方案进行跟踪。若在执行中遇到问题，可以及时对方案进行修改或补充。

Review the Inbound Inspection Record template to include required inspection points and locations for recording test results. 
Retain the original test results for all products that require testing.
重新检查入场检验记录模板，增加必须的检查点和检验结果记录位置。
保留所有需要检测的产品的原始测试结果。

Understand the category definition and data collection method of the above errors and use the correct methods for quarterly and annual SIS data reporting in 2024.
Inform all three branches for non-ERP data collection based on the same format and summarize the collected data in an overview for reconciliation and reporting.
In case of confusion, contact the GFPS SIS Officer for clarification.
理解上述错误的类别定义和数据收集方法，并使用正确的方法进行2024季度和年度的SIS数据的报填报。
按照相同的格式通知所有三个分公司构进行非ERP能够抓取的SIS数据收集，并将收集到的数据汇总，以便进行核对和报告。
如有任何不确认的问题，联系GFPS SIS的负责人进行咨询。

Apply for the CAPEX credits for the VOC control or ventilation equipment, and dust-free forming machines to ensure proper air circulation in the work area as well as local environmental regulations.
Provide personal protective equipment to employees in their working areas, such as face-masks, to reduce employee exposure and inhalation of any harmful dust.
Reinforce the requirements on safety shoes for the employees exposed to potential risks such as warehousing staff.
为VOC控制或通风设备以及无尘成型机申请资本性支出额度，以确保工作区空气流通及遵守当地的环境法规。在工作区为员工提供个人防护设备，如口罩，以减少员工接触和吸入有害粉尘。
向面临潜在风险的员工（如仓储人员）强调穿戴安全鞋的要求。

Collaborate with GFPS BU Asia Finance & Operation to better understand the HBII reporting requirements and correct the COGNOS HBII mapping methods for the identified cases to avoid recurring issues in the future.
For the special warranty provision case, align with Chinaust Langfang Auto for correct reporting as well as inter-company offsetting on the consolidated level.
与GFPS亚洲事业部财务运营经理进行沟通，加深对HBII各类报告要求的理解，并纠正已支出的COGNOS HBII对应勾稽方法，避免期后发生重复错误。
针对特殊计提的潜在索赔款，和亚大舒畅汽车确认计报表科目汇报和关联方对账的准确性。

Perform regular reconciliation checks between the two reporting data sources to identify potential manual mistakes and ensure better data quality.
定期对两个报告的数据源进行核对检查，以发现潜在的人工错误，提高数据质量。

For regular purchases of indirect materials with long-term suppliers, such as the identified supplier for mold and tooling, define a standard RFQ template, where bidding items should be filled out and sent to the qualified supplier for bidding at the same time and within the same quotation deadline. 
Upon receiving the quotations, cost comparison should be calculated accordingly with weight or estimated annual purchase volume considered to provide transparent and meaningful cost benefits to the management for vendor decision.
对于与长期供应商进行的间接材料定期采购，例如已确定的模具和工具供应商，应定义一个标准的询价模板，填写投标项目，并在同一时间和同一报价期限内发送给合格的供应商以进行投标。
在收到报价单后，应根据重量或估计的年采购量计算相应的成本比较，为管理层提供透明和有用的成本效益信息，以便选择供应商。

Ensure blind counting method is ensured at all warehouses including the spare part warehouses at both plants during stock counting procedures.
在盘点时，确保所有仓库（包括两家工厂的备件仓库）采用盲盘的方法。

Arrange a joint meeting among the concerned departments including Quality and Production to discuss the current practice of the internal NC management process including the definition and classification of NCs, roles, and responsibilities for potential improvements and clarification.
Modify the current guidance and internal control descriptions to standardize the process and deliver training to relevant employees to better follow the requirements.
安排相关部门（包括质量部和生产部）召开联席会议，讨论内部不合格品管理流程的现行做法，包括不合格品的定义方法和分类，及进行潜在的改进和澄清的角色和职责。
修改现行指南和内部控制说明，使流程标准化，并对相关员工进行培训，使其更好地遵守要求。

Extract the list of materials to be inspected from the NCC system on a daily basis, based on which all the inspection work could be documented by adding additional columns, including sample size and measurement results, to replace the current one-page document by each receipt, to ensure completeness and avoid potential oversight.
Based on the current labor resources and the quality requirements according to the customer requirements, qualification needs and vendor inspection history, review and adjust the current sampling methodology if needed.
For the externally purchased components, where drawings are available and corresponding measurements are required, use the PLM centralized database for data handover and avoid other channels for "inspection card" distribution.
每天从 NCC 系统中提取需要检查的材料清单。在此基础上，通过增加额外的栏目，包括样本大小和测量结果，记录所有检查工作，以取代目前每份收据一页的文件，确保完整性，避免潜在的疏漏。
根据客户要求、资质需求和供应商检验历史，基于当前的劳动力资源和质量要求，回顾当前抽样方法并在必要时进行调整。
对于外购件，如果有图纸并需要进行相应的测量，则应使用 PLM 中央数据库进行数据交接，避免通过其他渠道分发”入厂检验卡“。

Clarify and rectify all remaining potential issues with using Ding Ding time recording as the sole source of payroll calculation. As long as both Ding Ding timesheets and the manual timesheets are used in parallel, a full reconciliation should be performed.
澄清并纠正将钉钉工时记录作为工资计算唯一来源的所有遗留的潜在问题。只要同时使用钉钉考勤表和手工考勤表，就应进行全面核对。

Ensure the applicable headcount approval is in place before actual hiring of new employees.
确保在实际聘用新员工之前，获得新增员工人数审批。

Ensure bonus calculation can be reconciled with the underlying performance scoring system. Any additional adjustments both to the scoring or to the final bonus amount should be accompanied by clear explanations to maintain transparency.
确保奖金计算与基本的绩效评分系统相一致。对评分或最终奖金数额的任何额外调整都应附有明确的解释，以保证透明度。

Implement a reconciliation process to ensure social securities debited on the company bank account match the values in the payroll file. Any discrepancies should be timely investigated and rectified.
实施核对程序，确保公司银行账户中的社会保险扣款与薪资档案中的数值相符。任何差异都应及时调查和纠正。

Based on the latest organization chart between subsidiary and branches, update the internal controls accordingly for both the guideline and the OA approval workflows.
For the OA applications, set up automatic links between the checkboxes and the input quantity or at least set up the checkboxes as mandatory fields.
根据子公司和分公司之间的最新组织结构，更新相应内部控制手册和对应的 OA 审批工作流程。
对于 OA 申请单，自动配置按照输入数量触发相关勾选项，或至少将复选框的设为必选项。

Improve electronic equipment management to ensure completeness and accuracy of infor-mation. There should be a supporting for tracking scraping equipment, and the status of scrap should be updated in a timely manner (e.g., pending request, approved, processed, etc.). For computers of employees who have left company, the status of the person responsible should be updated in a timely manner when the computer is transferred to ensure clear responsibility. For computer systems that are no longer supported by Microsoft, upgrade the system, or re-place the computers in a timely manner to avoid data security issues caused by security vul-nerabilities.
完善电子设备的管理，保证信息的完整性和准确性。设备报废的跟踪应有依据，并且及时更新报废的状态（如：待申请、已审批、已处理等）。对于离职人员的电脑，应及时在电脑转交时即更新负责人状态，使责任明晰。对于已不被微软支持的电脑系统，及时升级系统或更换电脑，以避免安全漏洞导致的数据安全问题。

Delivery training and awareness to the concerned employees in the invoice validation control process on how to verify the items upon details or invoice receipts and change the current offline and manual validation process to system-enforced solutions to increase efficiency and effectiveness.
Double verification on the agreed payment terms before payments to the service providers and other indirect service suppliers.
向在服务发票验证控制流程中的相关员工提供培训，使其了解如何在收到明细和发票时验证其中各类项目，并将目前的人工验证流程改为系统强制性的控制，以提高效率和增加有效性。
在收到给外包服务提供商和其他间接服务的发票之前，对商定的付款期限进行双重验证。

It is recommended that fixed asset count be based on fixed asset ledgers to avoid inefficiencies in counts caused by blind count and errors caused by transcription. Distinguish between fixed assets and low value consumables in the numbering of physical assets.
Any discrepancies found in the count should be reflected in the fixed asset count report, which should be analyzed and explained.
All items on the fixed asset register should be included in the count plan, and any exception should be explained.
建议根据固定资产台账进行固定资产盘点，避免由盲盘导致的盘点效率低下和抄写导致的错误。可以在实物资产的编号上区分固定资产和低值易耗品。
对于盘点中发现的差异，都应在盘点报告中体现，并对其进行分析和说明。
在制定计划盘点时，应囊括所有固定资产卡片上的资产，若有特殊原因需要排除在此次计划中，应予以说明。

Use consistent quotation requirements for suppliers in the bidding process.
Upon vender bidding and comparison, ensure that all the quotations are valid and up-to-date to ensure the bidding effectiveness and impartiality.
在比质比价过程中，对报价供应商应使用一贯的要求进行比价， 且确保所有报价都是有效和最新的，以保证投标的有效性和公正性。

With regard to the materials system-wise consumed but physically held in the specific warehouse, define the appropriate responsibilities for physical management, either by a warehouse keeper or by the users of the materials in the Engineering department.
Implement the same 5S rules for the stock management of the warehouse, incorrect labels should be removed and replaced with clear and correct ones, materials unpacked and placed on the ground should be collected in proper boxes or shelves.
For materials that are still useful, keep a tracking list of materials stored in the warehouse to facilitate identification of material codes, quantities, and batches for future traceability.
对于这些系统中已耗用但实物仍存放在特定仓库中的材料，应明确由仓库管理员或技术部 门的材料使用者负责实物管理。
对该部分存货同样执行 5S 管理方式，错误的标签应清除并更换为清晰、正确的标签，未包装且放置在地面上的材料应收集到适当的箱子内或货架上。
对于那些识别出来仍有用的材料，应保留一份清单在仓库中用以记录材料的流转，同时便于识别材料代码，数量和批号，供日后追溯。

Cover all inventory in the inventory count, including consignment inventory. Communicate with the warehouse suppliers on inventory confirmation methods during contract signing. If a physical inventory count cannot be performed, a formal confirmation of inventory details should be issued by the warehouse. Visit the third party warehouses at least once a year to confirm on inventory status and warehouse status to ensure that the inventory is properly stocked.
在库存盘点中涵盖所有库存，包括寄售库存。在签订合同时与仓库沟通库存确认方法。如果无法进行实物库存盘点，应由仓库出具正式的库存明细确认书。每年至少访问一次第三方仓库，确认库存状况和仓库状态，确保库存妥当。

The contract should be signed in a timely manner, clarifying the responsibilities and obligations of both parties, and including terms such as stock count and reconciliation methods.
The creation of WMS delivery addresses should be supported by appropriate processes, such as warehousing agreements.
及时签订合同，明确合同双方的责任与义务，并包含例如盘点、对账方式的条款。

Strengthen the 5S management process by monitoring the open cases in the current Ding Ding portal and timely close the cases after completion and validation of effectiveness.
Reconcile the cases in the Ding Ding portal and the offline tracking list to ensure that all cases are followed up, and provide training to relevant employees on how to report 5S cases in the Ding Ding portal.
加强 5S 管理流程，监控当前钉钉平台中的未结项，并在完成和验证有效性后及时更新状态。
核对钉钉平台和线下的月度清单，确保所有案例都得到跟进，并对相关员工进行培训，使其了解如何在钉钉平台中上报 5S 案例。

Eliminate the deficiencies identified on site and deliver training to the responsible employees with signed attendance.
Regular review controls on safety and health compliance should be implemented to detect and eliminate potential issues and risks.
纠正现场发现的安全缺陷，并对相应员工进行培训并签到。
定期审查安全与健康相关的控制，以及时发现并消除潜在的问题和风险。

Review the list of equipment in use be reorganized. After the PM plan is established each year, the plan should be updated as new equipment is added.
Perform maintenance according to the PM plan. If there are special circumstances that require an adjustment, the plan should be adjusted in advance to ensure a certain maintenance frequency.
Keep maintenance records to ensure traceability.
建议重新梳理使用中的设备清单。在每年制定预防性维保计划后，如有新增加的设备投入使用，应及时更新计划。
按照预防性维保计划进行维保。如有特殊情况需要调整的，也应提前调整计划，以保证一定的维保频率。
保留维保记录以保证可追溯性。

Update equipment master data timely and correctly. A guideline should be developed to standard-ize the master data management process.
Establish equipment borrow process as with the development of centralized managed in Chinaust Shanghai Auto, more and more equipment is being borrowed between branch companies. Trace-able documents should be kept during borrowing equipment.
Confirm and close the completed maintenance orders in time.
及时、正确地更新设备主数据。应建立一个制度文件以规范主数据管理流程。
建立设备借用流程。因为随着上海亚大汽车一体化管理的发展，在分公司之间会有越来越多的设备借用。应确保设备在借用过程中有可追溯的资料。

Reinforce the stocktaking controls of tooling, molds, and prototypes, from internal procedure, count planning, execution to documentation and reporting. 
In terms of coverage, define the count method in the planning, e.g. cycle count or full-scope count and retain all the supporting documents. In terms of count results, proper reporting and analysis should be documented to ensure timely corrections are made, the overview is up-to-date and reliable and the count differences are analyzed and mitigated with follow-up actions.
Consider to transfer the offline tracking method to online, e.g. MES platform or Ding Ding portal with changes logs and automatic approval workflows to increase transparency and efficiencies and eliminate manual errors and oversights.
加强对检具和模具库存盘点的控制，包括内部流程，盘点计划、执行和记录等方面。
在盘点范围方面，应在计划中确定盘点方法，如永续盘点或全盘，并保留相应文件。就盘点结果而言，应适当记录分析和报告结果，以确保对清单及时进行更正，从而确保清单是最新且可靠的，并对盘点差异进行分析并采取后续改进行动。
考虑将现下的清单统计方法转为线上系统的方法，如通过MES平台或钉钉平台，使得变更有记录和审批流程自动，以提高透明度增加效率，避免人为错误和疏忽。

Conduct joint discussions among concerned departments to review the quality instruction, taking into account potential risks to product quality, current workload, and labor capacity.
Provide training to concerned employees on the updated instruction and conduct regular review controls to avoid potential oversights.
在考虑到产品质量潜在风险、当前工作量和人员配置的情况下，与相关部门共同讨论现行进料检验要求的可行性和有效性。
为相关员工提供有关最新进料检验的培训，并定期进行审查控制，以避免潜在的疏忽。

Perform the reference check based on the employment contact provided by the employee. If it is too time-consuming to conduct a reference check for front-line employees, it should at least be conducted for all management positions.
HR and employees should use a checklist to confirm distribution or sign-off of required documents.
Complete onboarding training in a timely manner so that new employees do not miss required training due to centralized training schedule.
Update employee leaving checklists to reflect current management processes. HR should review and sign all leaving checklists. 
根据员工提供的雇佣关系进行背调。若对一线员工实施过于占用时间，则至少应对所有管理岗人员进行背调。
人事和员工应根据检查表对必要资料的分发或签收进行确认。
及时完成入职培训，避免因为集中培训计划的缘故导致新入职员工错过必要的培训。
更新员工离职清单以符合当前的管理流程。人事应对所有离职员工的清单进行签字确认。

Management shall take actions to address the gaps in the vulnerability management process by prioritizing the resolution of all critical and high-rated vulnerabilities and integrating the systems currently not covered by the process. This proactive approach will strengthen the organization's overall cyber security posture and ensure comprehensive protection against potential threats.

Management shall restore the two non-functioning video cameras in order to provide continuous surveillance and monitoring of security zones, allowing security personnel to observe and respond to any suspicious activity in real time. This enables a proactive approach to security, helping to prevent incidents before they occur.
Security personnel should be trained to promptly report any faults.

Management shall review and regularly update the documentation for the backup tools, ensuring that it accurately reflects the current configuration, features, and best practices. This can help maintain operational efficiency, improve security and compliance posture, and enhance the organization's overall disaster recovery preparedness.

Management shall take prompt action to address the detected vulnerabilities. All missing application and OS patches should be promptly installed on the servers. These patches are crucial for addressing vulnerabilities and improving the overall security of the systems. A comprehensive review of the installed software should be performed to determine if they are truly necessary for the functioning of the servers. Unnecessary software should be removed to reduce the attack surface and minimize potential vulnera-bilities.

Management shall review the AD priviledge accounts by assigning privileges based on job roles and responsibilities, in order to better manage the risk of insider threats and unauthorized actions within the network. Access privileges should be regularly reviewed and the principle of least privilege enforced to ensure that users only have the permissions necessary to perform their specific job functions.

Management shall reconfigure the network setup to ensure that the CCTV cameras are not directly connected to the office network and are instead connected to the dedicated network established for the CCTV systems. This segregation prevents potential security breaches and unauthorized access to the office network through the cameras.
It is advisable to enforce secure communication protocols such as Hypertext Transfer Protocol Secure (HTTPS) to encrypt the data transmitted between the administrative interface and the cameras. This ensures the confidentiality and integrity of administrative interactions.
Management shall take immediate actions to enforce password changes, implement strong password policies, and mitigate the security risks posed by default passwords across the assessed devices.

Management shall take Immediate action to address the presence of unsupported and vulnerable operating systems within the production environment, as these systems pose significant risks to the availability, confidentiality, and integrity of the IT systems. A secure and compliant IT infrastructure should be established and maintained to mitigate these risks.

Management shall isolate the production network from the corporate network. This can be achieved by implementing appropriate network segmentation, access controls, and security measures to safeguard the integrity and confidentiality of the production systems and data.

Management shall configure the network profiles to disallow simultaneous wired and wireless connections. This can be done by setting policies or configurations that enforce the use of only one network connection at a time.

Management shall consider installing multi-criteria fire detection systems in the die-casting environment to bolster and ensure more resilient and dependable fire detection capabilities. This is especially critical in production environments where the risk of fire hazards may be heightened. The installation of a fire detection system is a fundamental component of risk management and can significantly diminish the potential impact of a fire on both personnel and property.

Management shall ensure that UPS rooms are free from flammable materials and comply with relevant safety standards and guidelines. The protective panels should be placed on the open manhole. Network switches should be housed in secure cabinets or enclosures that provide protection from physical damage, unauthorized access, and environmental hazards.

Management shall implement a Network Access Control system to enforce security policies and validate the health and compliance of devices before granting them access to the corporate network. Additionally, it is recommended to implement a device registration process where unknown devices need to be registered and authorized before accessing the corporate network. This could involve the installation of a security certificate or the use of device-specific credentials for authentication.

Management shall enforce proper access controls, implement strong authentication mechanisms, regularly monitor and audit access to backup and application files, and encrypt sensitive data to maintain its confidentiality and integrity.

Review the requirements of CI 1077, including its annex and implementation guide. Document the Data Protection inventory. Submit the evidence of the documentation to GF’s DPO. Align with GF’s DPO on the status of compliance with CI 1077.

Deduct VAT from invoices before recording the value of environmental and social figures. Con-tact the Corporate Sustainability department to discuss and implement corrections. Align with the Human Resources department on classification of training expenses as EHS and non-EHS. Cre-ate a centralized repository for supporting documents related to monthly SIS reported figures.

Revise the methodology for inventory value adjustment calculations. Identify parts that require provision based on both the range of coverage and NRV calculations. Use only the highest value between the two methods for the value adjustment.

Define a quarter-end process of evaluating and recognizing a provision for impending losses. Identify products that are sold below the manufacturing costs. Extract open and confirmed sales orders for these products. Determine the future losses resulting from fulfilling these orders. Record the necessary provision for these products.

Revise the calculation of the bonus provision on a quarterly basis. Use the most updated infor-mation about employees and company performance. Report the provision to the Finance depart-ment for accounting purposes.

Apply asset tags to all existing assets in order to link them to the corresponding asset recorded in the fixed assets register. Define a periodic asset counting procedure and execute the first full counting before the year-end closing of 2024. Produce adequate documentation supporting the count results. Analyze the counting results and address and resolve all differences. Make corre-sponding adjustments in the fixed assets register.
Start depreciation of the asset #948. Adjust missing depreciation related to the asset 948 retroac-tively.

Together with the relevant departments classify each supplier. Conduct a supplier risk assess-ment using the available risk management tool. Review the suppliers that have direct impact on the customer quality and escalate these suppliers to the central divisional Purchasing department for risk assessment and supplier evaluation.

Define a process for quarterly stock balance reconciliation with external processors. Analyze and explain any differences in stock. Document and retain the reconciliation and analysis. At the year-end, analyze the value of stock and based on materiality and previously identified differences, determine whether participation in the stock count is necessary.

Define a process of centralizing annual stock counting results. Define an investigation threshold for differences identified. Investigate the differences exceeding the threshold and document the root cause analysis. Implement corrective actions to prevent future differences. Create and main-tain a tracker of spare parts that cannot be recorded in SivlerLake. Maintain the tracker up to date by recording spare part movements in and out of the spare parts warehouse. Conduct a training for shift leaders on the process of spare parts withdrawals recording. Establish a process where at least two shift-leaders have to be present upon withdrawing spare parts. Otherwise, redefine the process so that only one employee, responsible for the spare -parts warehouse, handles all the withdrawals, and revoke shift leaders’ access to the spare -parts warehouse.

Separate in SilverLake stock adjustments resulting from the rolling / annual stock count differ-ences and those due to recording actual quantities in the system. Define a threshold for inves-tigating stock differences for finished goods, spare parts, consumables and work-in-progress. Conduct a root-cause analysis and document the rationale for differences above the estab-lished threshold for both rolling stock counts and full stock counts. Derive suitable measures and implement corresponding corrective actions. Align the proper classification of the stock-count differences with Corporate Controlling. Correctly classify the differences in the RPB 7 and RPB 8 reporting.

Define internally a monetary threshold for participation at the customer’s annual stock count. In case the value of customer consignment stock exceeds the threshold conduct a stock taking and verify physical existence of the stock. Document the participation at the stock count and conduct root cause analysis in case differences are identified.
Implement the double signature rule for any new or updated drawings. Ensure any new drawings or significantly updated drawings comply with the applicable ISO GPS standards.

Implement a standard visit report that should be completed as a mandatory document following each customer visit performed by the PM. All completed visit reports should be stored in a central file location accessible by the PM team.

For software projects, implement strong governance committees for adequate oversight of the project progression. Escalate any major deviations in software projects to the senior manage-ment in order to resolve any potential roadblocks. Clearly define and document a minimum via-ble product and minimum marketable product. Approve any major deviations from the definition as part of the governance committees.
Assign and monitor activities that GFMS’ CSC needs to perform in the MO Activity SharePoint. Timely follow up on any outstanding activities to close the gap in the current process.

In future machine platform projects, the starting series should always be for the entry-level ma-chine   and maintain market positioning throughout project duration. Fulfillment of the URS should always consider the product manufacturing cost. Challenge the URS portions that do not correspond to the machine’s market positioning or might cause difficulties in achieving the target manufacturing cost. Additional performance and features that might change ma-chine’s market positioning should be implemented as a separate project.

Prior to the start of projects define strictly the minimum viable product (MVP) and hours to be completed for each task and user story in order to reach the MVP. Analyze deviations between the budgeted hours and actual hours required during the sprint reviews. Define interdependencies between user stories and tasks to avoid potential bottlenecks.

For projects with long duration and delays implement a process of revision of the steps already completed to verify if any update is required. Reinforce the message among the project team on importance of project key documents retention on project specific SharePoint. Periodically verify that the required project steps have started and completed on time. Create a template for assessment of critical suppliers.

Implement a process to calculate upcoming costs based on the remaining tasks in the resource management tool for the project phase. Consider those costs in conjunction with the costs already incurred (booked on SAP WBS) to compile the full picture of the cost forecast for each project phase.

In collaboration with the BU Controller review the current PEM’s template and consider incorpo-rating a line for cash flows from tax credits and governmental financial support as part of the total R&D project costs. Revise the current NPD’s requirements related to review, update and valida-tion of PEM. Consider advancing PEM requirement to prototype development (gate 4) and proto-type manufacturing (gate 5) phases. Update the methodology of calculating manufacturing costs for the purpose of PEM and incorporate the actual manufacturing costs already at the prototype development phase.
Exclude expected governmental subsidies from the budget R&D expense L720 in the calculation of R&D hourly cost rate in order to achieve a more representative project cost calculation.
Follow the ICS in performing the reviews on manual journal entries at each closing. Ensure supporting documents are duly retained.
Categorize business-critical positions requiring succession in the near future. Identify possible deputies and successors and develop training plans for adequate knowledge transfer.

Perform an analysis comparing local (i.e. UK and Ireland) applicable records retention periods and those prescribed in Corporate Instruction 1026. Depending on the differences identified, decide whether developing a local records retention policy derived from the results of the aforementioned comparison is necessary or not.

Ensure that supporting evidences will be maintained during the next assessment of intermediaries. Review the current intermediary tracking for data consistency and update inconsistent or missing information. Reinforce the importance of signing Compliance Agreements and Distributorship Agreements for intermediaries. In case of intermediaries' reluctance to sign Compliance Agreements and Distributorship Agreements, address this topic with GF's Compliance Officer to find a suitable solution.
Calculate the vacation accrual based on carried forward vacation days and accrue for it accordingly.

Establish a written guideline on how to use the OTV account. Such a guideline shall encompass when vendors with reoccurring payments should be managed through a dedicated vendor account and consider a maximum monetary threshold for OTV transactions.
Ensure all available contracts are accessible to Purchasing responsibles to ensure a proper monitoring.

Establish a robust and centralized local Purchasing organization handling direct and indirect purchases. Ensure the sourcing of all goods and services is managed through SAP, using the purchase requisition functionality and approval as well as the standard purchase order template. Align the delivery dates with the suppliers to ensure an adequate delivery monitoring. Maintain a list of major local suppliers as required by the Division instruction 8774 "Supplier Assessment & Development".

Analyze the stock difference occurring in cycle counts of recent years in detail and investigate what root causes might result in these discrepancies. Focus on the adjustments of stock differences with higher values first to understand if certain processes have systematic flaws since small adjustments might only correct human counting mistakes. Derive suitable measures and implement corresponding corrective actions. Ensure the discrepancies are communicated and approved accordingly.
Implement an adequate storage strategy for materials with expiry dates.
Add a reference to GFPS' Standard Terms and Conditions in the customer quotations and invoices.

Document the existing quotation checklist consequently for each project calculation. Implement the 4-eyes-principle for reviewing project calculations (at least above a certain project volume threshold). Have the customer quotation text and wording reviewed by Corporate Legal and implement suggestions accordingly. Monitor scrap rates for off-site manufacturing projects and analyze the root causes for it. Monitor the win/loss ratio for off-site manufacturing quotes.
Ensure correct GL allocation of external spending, to ensure items are reported in the correct Cognos lines.

Consider replacing the manual PR approval forms with the SAP PR function, saving time and ensuring a proper approval trail. Alternatively upload the respective paper forms in SAP. For production materials, leverage the MRP function to optimize production demands and raw material inventory. Ensure that the necessary inputs for the MRP system are accurate and up-to-date, including, maintaining detailed purchase and sales orders information, ensuring updates to delivery dates are reflected in SAP as soon as possible, timely and accurately record inventory movements (receipts, issues, returns). Regularly review the MRP inputs to ensure alignment with actual market conditions and project probabilities.
Ensure confirmed delivery dates are reflected in the corresponding PO lines in SAP. Leverage the data to ensure lead times in the purchasing info record master are accurate.

On a regular basis, quarterly or annually, the lead time for each material should be compared with the actual delivery cycle of the respective purchase orders. In the case of stable deliveries with apparent shortening or stretching of the lead time, the lead time maintained in the purchasing info record should be updated to ensure more accurate material planning and supplier delivery performance evaluation.

Each month after the slow moving review report is sent out, the SCM department should follow up with the sales department and document the proposed actions to reduce obsolete stock. Actions should also be closely monitored and followed up to ensure timely completion. In addition, it is also suggested to include pipe products into the regular slow moving review as well.

Summarize and determine a list of key performance indicators for warehousing and logistic service providers and have them agreed upon in the service contracts. Establish a regular performance evaluation process. Data during daily transactions should be properly collected, summarized, and utilized to form a quantified result. 
Actions should also be taken according to the evaluation result, such as initiating price re-negotiation for logistics services.

On a regular basis, the Quality team should export the material inspection strategy list and identify the materials with missing inspection strategy. In the meantime, if certain materials are decided to be excluded from the inspection, the communication and approval records should be obtained and properly filed for future reference.

Quality department and Supply Chain Management should work together to perform a regular review of the stock under block status. The review is firstly to make sure that the company has taken proper action to get or issue credit notes, and also to have a timely decision on the further proceeding of physical stock.
It is also suggested that the Quality department be involved in the decision to release or 
scrap blocked materials.

The HR department should get in contact with the supplier of the local HR management system and review the system logic to capture leave days and calculate the leave balance. On a regular basis, the HR Supervisor should export the leave report and make an analysis to identify potential mistakes.

The HR department is suggested to make a monthly overtime tracking and review to identify excessive worktime by extracting data from the HR system. For identified cases, the supervisor for the employee should be contacted and informed of the situation, actions should be defined to reduce or balance the workload.
Review the controls in the ICS and update the description, applicability, responsible persons and testing evidence, etc. and updated the ICS details in the coming 2024 review process.

Establish a consistent approach with clarified roles and responsibilities among the concerned departments to identify, collect and report sustainability figures necessary for the SIS reporting requirements,.
In case of questions, reach out to GF Corporate Sustainability or GFCS Sustainability teams for clarification and support.
Improve the data quality and ensure a proper audit trail by retaining all the supporting evidence and at-a-glance reconciliation for retrospective review, audit and analysis.
Implement four-eyes principle controls in reporting the SIS figures to eliminate potential manual errors and improve traceability of the data sources.

Ensure that roles and responsibilities have been clarified within the operational teams to address identified safety issues within a reasonable timeframe with continuous corrective actions and to prevent recurrence in the future through preventive measures such as regular supervision and audits.
Provide training to employees to reinforce the importance of complying with GF safety standards and regularly raise awareness among department managers to establish the control environment.

Raise CAPEX application for proper storage of hazardous materials and hazardous waste to ensure that all of them are stored in dedicated facilities in line with the GF internal rules and Chinese regulations.
Label appropriate warning signs and MSDS within the area, PPE and first aid facilities to prevent internal employee or external service providers from any injuries.
Add environmental protection equipment such as e.g. binding agent, duct sealing devices, speed bumps to the storage locations.
Increase employee safety awareness by deliver regular training to concerned employees and avoid storing substances near hazardous waste storage area.

Arrange joint meeting among Controller, Customer Services and SAP Specialist in clarifying the calculation logic of the impending loss provision.
Before the posting the provision according to the system-generated result, double confirm with the Customer Services regarding the budget quantity and the forecast quantity (call-off).
In terms of the ramp-up parts, contact Divisional Controlling and SAP Specialist to align the process of remarking the parts and logic for proper provision calculation according to the directive.

In case of vague definitions or unclear statements in the divisional directives, contact the concerned divisional stakeholders for clarification and support.
Ensure timely capitalization of equipment in accordance with GFCS directive.
Add internal controls by the Purchasing department to ensure that the vendor business license is reviewed and qualified before commencing any new business with existing vendors.

Set up 5S management process to ensure compliance and continuous improvement including regular and documented 5S audits, roles and responsibilities, training and employee reward program (KVP).
Improve proper forklift driving and parking practices and, if necessary, add guardrails to the corners of vulnerable factory walls.
For non-conformities found during the production process, use a standard color tag to retain the original records of production details to ensure timely handling and the correct follow-up actions.
Repaint the pedestrian walkway remarks on the floor for better alert purpose.
Retain the basis for calculations to ensure traceability of results.

Store employee files in an orderly and complete manner in the employee file folder. If the file is a scanned electronic copy that needs to be signed by a Suzhou colleague, it should be printed and kept after obtaining a complete signature.
Execute effective enrty tests to enhance employee safety awareness.

Evaluate and re-plan the plant warehousing arrangement.
Ensure that materials are stored in place with the correct storage condition.
For the temporary storage of WIP stocks in different workstation statuses, proper measures should be taken and actions should be taken within a reasonable timeframe.

Review and adjust the sample size calculation logic set up in the QSYS portal to eliminate the error-prone manual work and increase work efficiency for the Incoming Inspector, as well as to ensure completeness and accuracy in inspection records.
Centralize the inspection records in the QSYS Portal to ensure the documentation integrity and effectiveness.
Management shall integrate the defined MBOs in HR system, formalize yearly discussion on GFMS CIO’s MBOs  and clarify the content and scope of technical matter dotted line reporting.

Corporate IT shall define and agree MBOs for dotted line reports to ensure effective management, goal alignment, accountability, performance evaluation, motivation, professional development, and fostering a collaborative work environment within the organization. Communication regarding reporting-specific content contained in policy CI1064 should be strengthened.

Management shall improve asset management practices to ensure accurate tracking, utilization, and maintenance of IT devices within the organization. Addressing these issues will enhance operational efficiency, security, and compliance in the IT infrastructure of GFMS.

Management shall enforce and provide training to users on the correct utilization of access control measures. Source code files should be safeguarded and stored in dedicated repositories that undergo regular monitoring. To maintain the confidentiality and integrity of sensitive data, encryption should be implemented.

Management shall complete the incomplete procedures, develop the missing fiber network loss procedure, and ensure all documentation includes up-to-date revision dates for clarity and accountability. Regular reviews and updates of the BCP are essential to maintain its relevance and effectiveness in safeguarding business operations during unforeseen events.

Management shall take immediate action and address these default credential vulnerabilities by changing the default passwords to unique and strong ones for each peripheral device following the complexity criteria explained in the GF password guidelines.

Management shall improve the AD management and ensure data accuracy. It is recommended to address the incomplete or missing information in user accounts, such as department, job title, and office fields, to maintain accurate user profiles.

Management shall investigate the reason of the communication issue to ensure that all devices, including the newly acquired HP laptops, are effectively protected against malware, ransomware, and other advanced threats. This will significantly enhance the resilience and security of the endpoint environment within the GF network.
Management shall implement network segmentation in order to reduce the attack surface, contain breaches, and improve overall network security in the warehouse and the office environments.

Management shall remove flammable materials from the server room, secure the switch cabinets with proper doors, relocate the hub for managing the wifi network inside the cabinet, label all cables, and ensure that facility rooms are kept locked to maintain security standards.

Management shall take prompt action to address the detected vulnerabilities. The servers running outdated and unsupported operating systems (OS) such as VMware ESXi 5.5, Windows Server 2008 and Windows Server 2012 should be decommissioned immediately. These obsolete systems pose significant security risks and should be replaced with supported and updated OS versions. All missing application and OS patches should be promptly installed on the servers. These patches are crucial for addressing vulnerabilities and improving the overall security of the systems. A comprehensive review of the installed software should be performed to determine if they are truly necessary for the functioning of the servers. Unnecessary software should be removed to reduce the attack surface and minimize potential vulnerabilities.

Management shall ensure that the visitor registration systems are properly maintained, functional, and regularly monitored to mitigate security, compliance, accountability, emergency preparedness, and damage to the overall reputation of the organization.

Management shall revise the Fiori password policies to adhere to industry best practices. Passwords should align with the GF Password Guideline, mandating a minimum length of ten characters, a mix of upper- and lower-case letters, at least one number, and expiry every 90 days. Enabling the second authentication factor as a compulsory measure for accessing the HR system is recommended to enhance security and mitigate the vulnerabilities associated with weak passwords.
Any relevant misconfigurations should be addressed with the vendor, initiating the necessary corrective actions and ensuring confirmation upon the successful resolution.

Management shall establish a comprehensive and well-documented patching process that outlines the procedures for testing, applying, and tracking patches on the 20 workstations in the production environment. This documentation should include step-by-step instructions, timelines, responsibilities, and guidelines for patch management. A Patching Register that records details of all patches applied, including the date, type of patch, workstation affected, and any relevant notes should be created and maintained, including the date, type of patch, workstation affected, and any relevant notes. This register serves as a valuable reference for tracking patching activities and auditing purposes.

Management shall resolve asset management discrepancies and enhance asset management practices to guarantee precise tracking, optimal utilization, and effective maintenance of IT devices across the organization. By addressing these issues, operational efficiency, security, and compliance within the IT infrastructure of GFPS will be significantly improved.

Management shall implement the following corrective measures:
-Create a clear and detailed notification calling workflow that outlines the steps to be taken in the event of a disaster. 
-Implement a regular schedule for testing the Disaster Recovery Plan and documenting the outcomes of these tests.
-Review and update external contact information to ensure completeness and accuracy.
-Create documentation for Veeam Backup & Replication that covers the backup process, configuration settings, schedules, monitoring procedures, and troubleshooting guidelines.

Division IT shall iperform a feasibility analysis for a SAP fallback solution to assess the practicality, viability, and effectiveness of introducing such a solution in the GFPS production environments. This analysis should encompass scope definition, business requirements, risk and technical assessments, cost analysis, resource evaluation, and a proposed implementation plan. The analysis will have to consider the integration of the solution with the SAP trans/4mation project. The result of the analysis and its recommendations should be communicated to GFPS division management for review and consideration regarding implementation.

Management shall isolate the production network from the corporate network. This can be achieved by implementing appropriate network segmentation, firewalls, and access controls. Internet access for production devices should be restricted. Network segmentation should be implemented for the servers and other critical systems.
Corporate IT shall finalize the implementation of mLAN 2.0 to deliver the required enabling technology, establishing a standard for network segregation and segmentation across the entities.

Management shall remove unnecessary and non-essential software applications from production workstations to reduce clutter, enhance system performance, and minimize security risks. Regular software reviews should be conducted to identify and address any unauthorized or non-standard applications that may compromise system integrity and security. The non standard administrator user should be deactivated.
Management shall implement proper access controls, implement strong authentication mechanisms and regularly monitor the access to departmental folders to protect sensitive data effectively.

Management shall take prompt action to address the detected vulnerabilities. All missing application and OS patches should be promptly installed on the servers. These patches are crucial for addressing vulnerabilities and improving the overall security of the systems. A comprehensive review of the installed software should be performed to determine if they are truly necessary for the functioning of the servers. Unnecessary software should be removed to reduce the attack surface and minimize potential vulnerabilities

Management shall enhance AD management and uphold data accuracy by addressing incomplete or missing information in user accounts, including department, job title, and office fields, to maintain accurate user profiles.

Management shall install fire stops and emergency lights in the office server room to enhance safety measures. It is essential to remove flammable and storage materials to reduce the risk of fire hazards and comply with safety regulations. Furthermore, network cabling should be organized and color-coded according to the GF Infrastructure Standard color definition in all server rooms. A strict lock and key policy must be implemented for the electrical panels in the office area to ensure they are securely closed at all times. It is crucial to remind responsible personnel about the significance of safeguarding keys and not leaving them unattended.
Management shall change the system passwords following the complexity criteria explained in the GF password guidelines.
Management shall inform the vendor regarding the relevant misconfiguration, initiate the process to fix them and obtain a confirmation upon the final resolution.
Management shall install the USB HD webcams with autofocus on each workstation, positioning them on top of the main monitor as specified in the standard.

Once the CAPEX budget is established, monitor the project expenditure and advancement in a vigilant approach including timely updating the information on the tracking list.
In case of any cost overruns detected, request approvals and carry out adjustment measures as necessary to optimize outcomes.
一旦确定了资本支出预算，就要以警惕的态度监控项目支出和推进情况，包括及时更新跟踪清单上的信息。如果发现任何成本超支，应请求批准并采取必要的调整措施，以优化结果。

Discuss with the SRM vendor the possibility of custom fields on the platform to quote the ancillary costs. If this is not possible due to system limitations, require suppliers to upload the aggregated unit price with all relevant costs in their quotes, and train relevant purchasing staff to manually provide all relevant details when requesting approvals on the OA platform.
与SRM系统供应商讨论是否有可能在SRM平台上添加设置自定义字段，让供应商报价辅助费用。
如果因系统限制而无法实现，则应要求供应商在报价中上传包含所有相关费用的综合单价，并培训相关采购人员在 OA 平台上申请审批时手动输入所有报价相关明细信息。

Deactivate the unused warehouse locations in the WMS. Update and organize the warehouse locations in the WMS in a timely manner. Check the system setting of the warehouse locations. Preset FIFO strategy for EOP storage location in WMS.
停用 WMS 中不使用的仓库位置。及时更新和整理 WMS 中的仓库位置。检查仓库位置的系统设置。在 WMS 中为 EOP 存储位置预设先进先出策略。

Labeling or physical segregation should be done for stock in external storage. 
Remove obsolete location labels promptly. 
Follow inventory count guidelines and inventory gains should be handled properly. 
Store scrapped special equipment properly according to national regulations.
应为外部存储的存货贴标签或进行物理隔离。及时清除过时的地点标签。
遵循库存盘点准则，妥善处理盘盈库存。按照国家相关规定存储废弃的特种设备。

Retain the supporting documentation for safety stock to ensure the traceability and accuracy of the calculation. Update the guidelines with the development of the business.
保留安全库存计算依据，确保可追溯性和计算的准确性。随着业务的发展更新指南。

Monthly evaluate the logistics providers in a documented manner and use them as a reference for the annual evaluation. 
Perform monthly logistics cost analysis manually before the system goes live.
每月对物流供应商进行评估，并将结果记录在案，作为年度评估的参考。
在系统启用前，手动进行每月物流成本分析。

Update the new routing master data upon approval in all concerned systems including the Yida application to ensure the effectiveness of the monitoring process performed on a regular basis.
Upon launch of the MES systems in the coming future, review the routing master data to ensure they are all up to date before inputting them in the new MES system, which might further inter-face with the other systems.
在所有相关系统（包括宜搭应用程序）中及时更新经批准的工时主数据，以确保定期执行的效率控制过程的有效性。在未来上线MES系统时，在将工时主数据输入新的 MES 系统（该系统可能与其他系统有进一步的接口）之前，应审查路由主数据，以确保它们都是最新的。

Review APS master data and update in APS in a timely manner. Changes to master data should be documented and approved according to policy. For the rapidly evolving information systems, a regular review of system fields should be established to avoid blank or incorrect display information.
检查APS主数据并及时在系统中更新。对主数据的更改应记录在案，并根据规定进行审批。对于快速发展的信息系统，应定期检查系统字段，以避免显示空白或错误信息。

Establish an internal procedure for tooling and molds inventory, including planning, execution and documentation aspects.
Count sheets should be retained as evidence of quarterly inventory control, count date and signatures of those performing and supervising the count should be signed and archived.
建立工具和模具库存的内部程序，包括计划、执行和文档方面。盘点表作为季度库存控制的证据应予以保留，盘点日期以及执行和监督盘点人员的签名应予以签署并存档。

Familiarize with the corporate procedures for handling a cyber attack. For this, follow the in-structions within the CIRB preparation documentation. Print and communicate internally the CIRB documents containing all local, divisional, and corporate contact information and store them in a secure location. In case of uncertainties, consult Corporate IT for support.
Create an overview of the local and corporate retention requirements per document type. Dispose of the documents with expired retention periods.
Formalize a monthly bank reconciliation and define a responsible employee, who is not involved in bank transactions, to review the reconciliation. Retain the evidence of the review.

Establish and follow a stock counting procedure that respects crucial stock count methodologies, such as blind count. Define thresholds for stock differences approval prior to the adjustment being posted and include these in the local DoA.
Collect the proof of delivery from the appointed freight forwarders and utilize it as a basis for issuing the invoice.

Consider conducting a comprehensive compliance review with the assistance of legal counsel to ensure adherence to the overtime regulations. Implement a robust overtime management system to accurately track and compensate overtime hours, either through additional pay or time off. Build accruals for overtime to enhance transparency and prepare the company to meet its obligations towards its employees.

Management shall install the USB HD webcams with autofocus on each workstation, positioning them on top of the main monitor as specified in the standard. The workstations that lack the required two monitors should be upgraded. Additionally, the network cabling colors should adhere to the GF Infrastructure Standard color definition. Following a standardized color scheme helps in identifying and troubleshooting net-work connections quickly and accurately.

Management shall enhance asset management practices to guarantee precise tracking, utilization, and maintenance of IT devices within the organization. Resolving these issues will bolster operational efficiency, security, and compliance within the IT infrastructure of GFPS.

Management shall maintain up-to-date network documentation, including network diagrams. Regular reviews and updates to network diagrams should be performed to ensure that they accurately reflect the current state of the network, enabling IT staff to work more effectively, enhance security, maintain compliance, and support future growth and changes in the network infrastructure.

Management shall ensure that the status of resolved incidents is promptly updated in the Service Now ticketing system. This can be achieved by implementing a process where the local IT team is required to close out resolved incidents in the system as soon as the issue is resolved. Training material provided by the Corporate IT should be used to ensure that team members understand the correct procedures for closing out incidents and updating statuses in the ticketing system. When needed, additional dedicated training on the use of Service Now should be requested.

Management shall create a comprehensive Disaster Recovery Plan that incorporates essential elements for efficient recovery in the event of a disruption or disaster. This involves defining recovery requirements for business applications, setting clear criteria for activating the DR plan, documenting thorough recovery procedures, and ensuring the secure and suitable storage of data backups.

Management shall store the backup server in a distinct location, positioned at a sufficient distance from the primary servers. By doing so, this practice guarantees that in the event of a disaster affecting the primary server room, the backups will remain secure and easily accessible for recovery operations.

Management shall lock high voltage switchgear to prevent accidental contact with live electrical parts, reducing the risk of electrical shocks, fires, and other safety hazards. 
Network switches and routers should be maintained in locked cabinets to ensure the security, physical protection, environmental control, cable management, compliance, and access control of network infrastructure components within GF.
Management shall change the system passwords following the complexity criteria explained in the GF password guidelines.

Management shall upgrade servers running outdated and unsupported operating systems such as Windows Server 2008, Windows Server 2012, SuSE Enterprise 11, and Windows Server 2016 to supported and secure versions or decommission them. Critical and important security updates for Windows Servers, Microsoft Office, and SQL Server should be applied immediately to mitigate known vulnerabilities and reduce the risk of exploitation. It should be ensured that all servers, including those hosting legacy applications, have the GF Corporate antivirus software installed to protect against viruses and malware.

Management shall enhance AD management practices and uphold data accuracy. It is reccomended to rectify incomplete or missing information in user accounts, including department, job title, description and office fields, in order to uphold precise user profiles.

Management shall disable the unauthorized Wi-Fi network using only the networks provided by Corporate GF. Additionally, employee awareness and education on the risks of connecting to non-standard Wi-Fi networks should be emphasized to promote responsible network usage within the corporate environment.

Management shall enable MFA for all users accessing the HR system. This additional layer of security will help mitigate the risk of unauthorized access, even if passwords are compromised. Users should be educated on the importance of MFA and how to set it up on their accounts to protect their sensitive data within the system.

The HR Manager should perform a review of all current job descriptions and update where needed, the employees should sign the updated job descriptions as the official agreement to it. In addition, the substitutes of key positions should be defined and documented, based on which trainings should be arranged and followed up on.

The pricing matrix for rental machine repairs should be reviewed and adjusted for a more detailed split by repair activities. Hourly rate should be determined by the most frequent repair activities with the estimated completion time. The pricing of repairs should always and consistently refer to this pricing methodology. Ideally, a service report is expected to be established for each repair order, as well as summarized and analyzed on a regular basis for potential adjustment of the pricing.

The basis for fixed asset capitalization should be the acceptance report instead of delivery notes, especially for complex machines and systems that requires installation. The standard should be fully communicated and agreed between Finance and Production department.

The Supply Chain department and Service department should make sure to follow the standard purchasing process for purchasing activities. For services, either purchasing contract or purchase order must be in place to ensure that general terms and conditions are agreed in a formal manner and the purchase is properly approved according to the delegation of authorities.
Review and adjust the link to the GPCs in the purchase order template to ensure that suppliers and service providers have the opportunity to read and accordingly accept the GPCs.

In collaboration with Global GFPS Logistics, implement the SAP bin management system to ensure an efficient and accurate stock management, allowing a systematic FIFO consumption strategy. Perform a full stock count at year end, including all items that fall under GFMY stock.

Restrict physical access to the spare parts location or implement a detective control of unauthorized access. Improve the spare parts inventory process including proper documentation and ensure the highest value and/or critical items are identified as such. Ensure that future movements of the spare parts are timely recorded in the spare parts management system to always reflect the actual spare parts inventory.

The removal of personal information should be listed as a check point of the exist procedure. The HR system supplier must be informed on a timely basis to remove the face recognition and fingerprint information.

Document the feasibility verification, ensuring the 4-eyes-principle. Perform a regular cost monitoring of the project throughout the complete project phase. Track the performed OSM changes in one central overview for all projects. Have the customer quotation text and wording reviewed by Corporate Legal and implement suggestions accordingly. Implement KPI's to monitor the overall performance .

The current responsibility allocations should be revisited to identify potentials for synergy and simplification. Following the review of responsibilities, the HR department should perform a complete review of the job descriptions together with the Managing Director and identify the outdated ones for update and require the employee to re-sign. In addition, the updated responsibilities of departments should be clearly defined in a documented manner such as process flows to reduce the complexity for employees to follow and keep track of changes.

For customers or materials with a stable sales forecast, hold a joint meeting among the Supply Chain department and all concerned stakeholders to discuss possible solutions for the MRP runs driven by both quantity and lead-time for optimize the supply chain process. For example, first define the sales delivery date internally and reconsider the current ratio between the safety stock levels and the lead-time-dependent material deliveries. 
Based on the discussion results, update the lead time confirmed with the vendors in the system for MRP runs and reduce the safety stock levels whenever possible without being  exposed to potential material shortages.

Organize joint meetings between the "Operation" and "Business" supply chain teams, as well as the SAP IT support to streamline the method for stock analysis, including the reference database and the key index or benchmark used to determine further analysis and actions.
After clarification, perform the analysis based on the agreed methodology and retain all supporting documentation as regular control evidence.

The selection criteria of customers to be included in the annual customer satisfaction survey must be transparent and consistent to ensure the reliability of survey results. While determining the selection criteria, annual sales revenue should be a factor that must be considered, exceptions should be documented and explained.

Not closing maintenance notifications in the system may not ensure that each maintenance activity has been confirmed and documented. At the same time, a large number of unclosed maintenance notifications may prevent the PM module from alerting the appropriate personnel in a timely manner to validate the repair work.
Timely record the daily maintenance practice in +QDIP and SAP PM module. Review the maintenance record in daily meeting to ensure that maintenance related issues are followed up timely.

Clarify the roles and responsibilities between the Quality Control and the Quality Assurance functions as well as the management reporting lines between operation and business for quality controls to ensure effective collaboration and sufficient communication.
Establish controls for the review of SAP material quality master data to resolve identified and potential differences between WIS documents and SAP system data in terms of inspection requirements and sample size.

Define a standard timeframe for usage decision to be made and establish internal controls on regular review of aged inspection lots and quality notifications to ensure actions such as vendor complaints are taken and followed up in a timely manner.

Develop a formalized business case to evaluate the alternative use of the underutilized extrusion lines, taking into account the additional storage space required. Clean out the R&D warehouse and implement measures to ensure organized and clean storage areas are maintained.
Define a full stock count procedure. Perform a full stock count before year end, ensuring inventory is accurate. Consider performing the full stock count based on floor-to-sheet only.
Ensure approvals are obtained before adjustments are confirmed in SAP. Consider implementing a workflow approval process in accordance with the requirements defined in the DoA.
Assess and verify the accuracy of BOMs. Define a standard model and update BOMs accordingly, considering real scrap levels and material consumptions.
Consequently calculate and report the production KPIs in line with the requirements prescribed in Division Working Instruction "OPS KPI Scorecard"

Incorporate the production reports information into the already existing Excel tracking file (Easton). Reconcile production data and information entered into SAP regularly, follow-up on identified differences and make corrections in SAP where deemed necessary.

Ensure that machine technicians closely monitor machines in their start-up phases. Ideally, the machine technician should stay at the machine during the entire start-up phase until the products meet the re-quired quality level.

Document critical information concerning the use of 100% virgin and 100% reworked material production process on product level for extrusion in Easton. Consider the already used master card approach from Little Rock. Complete required training and roll out the master cards accordingly. Ensure that master cards are present at injection-molding machines at all times as intended.
Define key quality performance indicators, including, but not limited to rejection pieces per million, customer and supplier complaints. Define cost of quality and capture quality cost accordingly.
Develop test plans for third party supplier raw materials and own-blended compounds and regrind material. Execute test plans accordingly and document the results.

Re-assess the effectiveness of quality controls in place to ensure that non-conforming parts will be identified whereas conforming parts will not be scrapped. Train machine operators and quality depart-ment members accordingly.

Implement preventive inventory procedures such as withdrawal and return processes for inspection tools. Alternatively, implement detective procedures such as metal scanners at the facilities entrance/exit.

Develop and agree a clear set of rules how to treat customer invitations and entertainment ex-penses together with GF’s Head of Corporate Compliance. Communicate the new set of rules to all employees concerned. Ensure detective review controls such as a critical search term hit re-port from the current expense reimbursement application “Concur” are effectively in place. Cases of deviations from the set of rules are identified (i.e. during the expense reimbursement review process) and shall be escalated accordingly. Consider enrolling back office accounting clerks to the Anti-Bribery and Anti-Corruption Compliance eLearnings.

Include agents in the current intermediaries tracking file. Perform the missing Annex 1 assessment for existing agents with priority. Add Annex 1 and Annex 2 coverage information in the current tracking file to increase transparency. Reinforce the importance of timely fulfilling CI 1061 requirements. In case of intermediaries' reluctance to sign Compliance Agreements, address this topic with GF's Head of Corporate Compliance to find a suitable solution.

Consider assigning the SIS reporting responsibility to one person only supplemented by a second person’s review (i.e. 4-eyes principle). Develop a comprehensive overview (i.e. Excel) and a corresponding folder structure on the local share drive or MS Teams to collect, compile and consolidate all reportable social and environmental relevant data in a single place. Ensure that the audit trail from reported KPIs to supporting evidence (i.e. invoices) is in place and implement a referencing methodology. Make sure already available internal work order information will be used. Assess the possibility to contract a different landfill and recycling waste management vendor who will be able to provide accurate and easy to access data supporting GF’s SIS reporting requirements.

Monitor the implementation status for cross-site safety audit’s corrective measures closely. Share the overdue status of the follow-up reporting with appropriate levels such as site Management regularly.
Reconcile the currently not considered cash and cash equivalent general ledger accounts regularly.

Consider making use of the optional NPI allowance offered in Divisional Instruction 3440 to lower the overall stock provision. Implement a dedicated field in SAP to track the local market introduction date to ease the determination of NPI items and their corresponding stock provision value.
Increase efforts (i.e. initiate regular meetings) on the follow-up of aged open items on the GR/IR account and ensure a timelier clearing in the future.
Perform a full count to ensure all fixed assets are recorded in SAP and implement a periodic (i.e. every 3 years) counting procedure.

Remind employees of current DoA approval thresholds and levels concerning credit notes and FOC deliveries. Ensure that requirements from DoA concerning credit notes and FOC deliveries are complied with.
Have the system-generated payroll change report reviewed by someone who does not have the rights to change payroll data or adjust admin rights in the payroll system.

Investigate alternative solutions, e.g., dual switch redundancy setup to reduce dependency on single hardware. Consider using cloud based solutions, e.g., OneDrive for shared files that are available from the GF IT environment.

Ensure specific documentation for each case of extraordinary cost accrual on machine projects and special warranty provision. Wherever possible, attach the supporting calculation and documentation to the journal entry booking in SAP.
Ensure the reasons for purchase decisions following an RFQ process are clearly documented.
Implement a storage area for NCM materials that is physically separated from the storage areas used for other materials.
Conduct a full annual stock taking of items stored at the external warehouse location ahead of each year-end closing.
Ensure safety stock settings are timely updated after each review discussion. Purchase requisitions generated via MRP to replenish safety stock should be processed as timely as possible.
Update the standard routing times during the budget process of 2024. Ensure they align with the actual completion times recorded over recent periods.
Retrospectively compute the on time shipping KPI of machines already shipped in 2024 and continue the tracking and monitoring going forward.

Review the remaining aged items on the missing parts list to ensure parts still needed have actually been purchased, received and issued to the corresponding production or service order. Maintain this list up to date to ensure its effectiveness.
Review aged open PI tickets in the Ticketing Tool with the respective task owners. Ensure they are updated according to the actual resolution progress.

Management shall repair the non-functioning video camera to ensure uninterrupted surveillance and monitoring of security zones. This will enable security personnel to promptly detect and respond to any suspicious activity in real time, fostering a proactive security strategy that aims to prevent incidents before they happen.

Management shall update the Disaster Recovery Plan to include essential information such as insurance details, a list of external suppliers, and their contact information. It should be ensured that this information is easily accessible and regularly reviewed for accuracy.

Management shall take prompt action to address the detected vulnerabilities. All missing application and OS patches should be promptly installed on the servers. These patches are crucial for addressing vulnerabilities and improving the overall security of the systems.
