Review all aged CIP account balances and determine whether they should be capitalized, impaired, or written off. Regularly monitor CIP balances to prevent excessive accumulation of aged balances. Ensure capitalization decisions are properly recorded with justifications, asset details and references to supporting documentation. Require all relevant stakeholders (Finance, Operations, and Management) to participate in and document asset capitalization approvals.

Implement a standardized quotation comparison matrix with clear evaluation criteria to ensure transparency, consistency, and optimal vendor selection in the procurement process. Establish a defined threshold for obtaining and comparing multiple quotations. Implement controls to ensure that all POs are reviewed and approved by at least two independent individuals. Configure the procurement module in Oracle to prevent self-approval and enforce dual authorization for POs above a defined threshold. Establish a process to systematically track shipments against order confirmations. Follow up on the late deliveries with the vendor. Ensure regular updates from suppliers on delivery status and require confirmations upon dispatch.

Investigate the stock discrepancies identified during the sample count and determine their root causes. Conduct a full year-end stock count for raw materials, ensuring proper documentation and retention of stock count records. Assess the feasibility of implementing an ERP-supported FIFO and FEFO consumption strategy for raw materials to enhance inventory accuracy and efficiency.
Expand the already existing margin analysis for order level detail. Perform a margin analysis on project level taking all cost and rebates in consideration after a prefabrication project is finished.
Systematically assess the claim resolutions for rejected claims and ensure timely invoicing of the customer.
Implement a formal change management process for BOMs and routings with documented reviews and consent from all relevant departments.
Implement quality control measures for non-HDPE raw materials, including inspection and expiry tracking to ensure compliance and prevent contamination or use of expired materials.
Calibrate all tools with overdue calibration dates. Implement preventive inventory procedures such as withdrawal and return processes for inspection tools.

Formally document the succession planning. Include deputy roles in job descriptions and the organizational chart to ensure clear role distribution, reduce key-person dependency, and enhance process resilience.
Ensure internal controls are clearly assigned to local employees and provide targeted training to enhance awareness, accountability, and effective execution.

Establish a detailed tracking file that records all ongoing litigation, its potential financial impact, and whether or not a provision has been recorded. Keep this file up to date. Incorporate clear rules, such as the FSC and local entity process, information flow and approval authority, into the already existing Guidelines For Customer Credit Management.

Introduce a  documented 4-eyes principle for bonus and provision calculations exceeding a predefined threshold. Ensure an independent review before approval and document the review process to enhance traceability.

Implement a closing checklist for local closing activities to ensure that all required tasks are completed consistently and accurately. This checklist should follow best practices, such as the format used by the FSC in Finland and should be reviewed and updated regularly to maintain its effectiveness.

Develop a policy that restricts the use of the Caixa account to necessary payments that cannot be handled by the FSC's centralized payment operations team. Review and update invoicing templates to eliminate Caixa bank account details. All incoming customer payments and third party disbursements should be redirected to the SEB account to ensure centralized payment operations and treasury control.

Implement a written agreement for salary advances, ensuring employees formally acknowledge the amount received, the purpose, and any repayment terms. This will strengthen accountability, reduce the risk of disputes, and provide a clear record for both the company and the employee.

Calculate the correct provision for unused vacation balances, including social security costs, at least for key cutoff dates such as year-end and half-year close. Record the necessary accruals accordingly.
Use the template for long-service award published on Corporate Controlling’s page (We@GF) to calculate the provision for employee service awards annual as of 30. September each year. Record the calculated provision value in the financial statements accordingly.
Ensure that a system-generated overtime report from ADP is available for key financial reporting dates, such as year-end and semi-annual closings, and make appropriate accruals as needed.

Expand the already existing margin analysis for project and order level detail and compare the total estimated project volume to the actual invoicing for the completed project ("closed" status in Salesforce). If the total invoiced amount is much less than the original estimate, investigate whether the originally grated discounts were justified and could be claimed back.
Implement preventive margin controls at the sales order level and perform root cause analysis on the lowest-margin transactions (i.e. 10 lowest margin transactions) on a regular basis.
Standardize payment terms to the defined standard payment term and reduce the current number of 24 significantly.
Perform credit checks before final customer confirmation and update the GTC to explicitly state that shipments are subject to a creditworthiness check.

Implement a 4-eyes principle for the final reconciliation of the ADP payroll proposals and input files on GFBFS Spain level before the payroll is submitted for disbursement to the Payments Operations team in the FSC. Integrate a system-generated ADP master data changes report into the payroll review process. Restrict HR personnel from modifying their own payroll master data, either through system controls or independent review and approval of the system-generated ADP master data changes report. Ensure that the biannual reconciliation between Workday and ADP is conducted and document the review process.
Establish a formal succession planning process and ensure that job responsibilities are documented and acknowledged either within Workday or through signed job descriptions.

Implement a standardized action tracking (e.g., excel) for management meetings, encompassing designated responsible persons, specified deadlines, and regular status updates, thereby ensuring accountability and the timely execution of decisions.
Ensure internal controls are clearly assigned to local employees and provide targeted training to enhance awareness, accountability, and effective execution.

All supplier agreements should be formalized, duly signed and reviewed for consistency with the division's general terms and conditions of purchase. Establish a systematic approach to centralize the monitoring of all local supplier contracts. This process should include a compre-hensive contract overview list that captures key contract elements (e.g., scope, term, monetary value, notice periods, and renewal dates). In addition, contracts should include a reference to the GF Code of Business Partners to ensure that suppliers adhere to the Group's compliance and ethical standards. Regular reviews of contracts are also recommended as part of ongoing supplier governance. Implement pricelists with third-party providers to enable accurate invoice reconciliation. Store a digital copy of the contracts on Contractzen, as requested by the divi-sional contract policy.

Implement a closing checklist for local closing activities to ensure that all required tasks are completed consistently and accurately. This checklist should follow best practices, such as the format used by the FSC in Finland and should be reviewed and updated regularly to maintain its effectiveness.

Engage with BECM to obtain a complete and updated list of all current signatories and e-banking users, including their access levels and authority. Formally request the removal of all former employees and confirm that dual signatory controls are enforced. Ensure that internal records are aligned with the bank’s records and implement periodic reviews to maintain ongo-ing accuracy.

Together with Corporate Controlling and GFPS, align the accounting treatment for machine rental equipment with the requirements outlined in the GF Finance Manual and ensure consistent application across all GFBFS entities. Assess the impact of prior transactions to determine whether any corrective adjustments are necessary.

Update the approval template to reflect the correct threshold of T EUR 100 and incorporate a mandatory approval line for the General Manager. Ensure the revised process is communicated and consistently applied across all relevant entities in scope of the FSC.

Review and update Incoterms in the customer master data to match those in the general terms and conditions of sales. Implement a periodic review control to ensure ongoing alignment between contractual terms and system data. Consider optimizing incoterms  during sales negotiations with customers.

Include a GDPR-compliant data protection clause in all employment contracts for new hires. Distribute a separate privacy notice to all existing employees covering GDPR Article 13 infor-mation. Collect and retain signed acknowledgments of receipt for all privacy notices issued. Review and update all HR documentation templates to ensure ongoing GDPR compliance.

Review and adjust the payroll process to ensure that preparation, review, and approval respon-sibilities are segregated, through implementing an additional formal review and approval step by a second appropriate employee prior to finalizing payroll. Request the payroll provider to deliver finalized payment files in a secure, non-editable format to prevent unauthorized modifi-cation. Mark all payroll-related emails as confidential and password-protected. Request a pay-roll. Request and review a monthly payroll changes report from the provider to ensure timely detection of errors.

Timely OS Version Upgrade. Adhere to the established timeline for replacing Home Edition operating systems with Enterprise Edition versions across all devices.
Optimize the IT device management process so that IT can be aware of newly added equipment and can add to the 360 Enterprise Cloud backend system in a timely manner. Alternatively, automated scanning tools (e.g., periodic MAC address scanning) can be used to identify unregistered devices and add them to the platform management timely.
及时升级操作系统。根据计划及时将家庭版操作系统更换为企业版操作系统。
优化IT设备的管理流程，使IT能够及时了解到公司内增加的设备，并及时将其添加进360企业云的后台系统。或可通过部署自动化的扫描工具（如MAC地址定期扫描），识别未注册设备，并及时纳入平台管理。

Install physical locks on all server cabinets, with access restricted to authorized IT personnel. Re-evaluate the location and layout of the storage and server room, and prioritize moving the storage to a separate area. If relocation is not possible in the short term, install a physical barrier (such as a fence or independent access control) in the server room to ensure that the storage access path does not pass through the core equipment. If the server room cannot be separated from the warehouse entrance in the short term, maintain visitor logs and add surveillance. If budget allows, electronic access control can be added to control access. Hire a professional organization to assess the structural risk of wall cracks, perform reinforcement and repair based on the report's findings, and conduct regular inspections of server room walls and environmental indicators such as temperature and humidity.
为所有服务器机柜加装物理锁具，仅授权IT人员持有访问权限。重新评估仓库与服务器机房的位置布局，优先将仓库迁移至独立区域。若短期内无法搬迁，则在服务器机房内设置物理隔离带（如围栏或独立门禁），确保仓库访问路径不经过核心设备。若服务器机房与仓库入口短时间内无法分离，应记录访客台账并增加监控。如预算允许，可增加电子门禁，以控制进入的权限。联系专业机构评估墙体裂缝的结构风险，根据报告结果进行加固修补，并定期检查机房墙体及温湿度等环境指标。

Implement a disaster recovery plan. Establish a mechanism for verifying server shared disk backups, and periodically review and document server backups.
建立灾难恢复计划。建立服务器共享盘备份验证机制，定期对服务器的备份情况进行检查，并留存其记录。

Contact the vendor to upgrade the system to an HTTPS protocol. If the system is about to be replaced and the upgrade service is no longer available, discuss additional controls with the vendor in the interim to control data security risks.
联系供应商将系统升级到HTTPS协议。如系统即将被替换，不再提供升级服务，则在此期间应与供应商商讨补充控制措施，以控制数据安全风险。

Re-train employees who will be entering data into SRM. Ensure four-eye-principle during data entry. Fill in the data according to the operating instructions issued by the group.
再次对将数据录入SRM系统的员工进行培训。在录入数据过程中确保四眼原则。根据集团下发的操作指南对数据进行录入。

Chinaust Wuhan Branch should establish a comprehensive DCN price management framework that includes: 1. Implementing a formalized approval process with mandatory documentation requirements for all DCN-related price adjustments; 2. Developing integrated profitability monitoring that combines both part-level and project-level margin analysis; and 3. Instituting standardized procedures to investigate and address root causes when margin variances exceed tolerance thresholds. This holistic approach will ensure proper price authorization, enhance visibility into true project profitability, and drive continuous improvement in margin management.
武汉亚大汽车应当建立完整的DCN价格管理机制，具体包括：实施规范的DCN价格调整审批流程并要求完整保存审批文件；开发整合零部件与项目双维度的利润监控体系；制定当利润率偏差超出容忍阈值时的标准化根本原因分析与整改流程。通过这种系统性的改进方案，既能确保价格调整的合规审批，又能提升项目真实盈利能力的可视度，最终实现利润率管理的持续优化。

Chinaust Wuhan Branch should implement comprehensive price maintenance controls by: establishing mandatory timelines for SOP price updates post-agreement; utilizing NCC's dual-price functionality to properly track temporary and formal prices during transition periods; redesigning the order-invoice reconciliation process to preserve original pricing data; and assigning clear accountability for price data maintenance. These measures would strengthen financial controls while improving operational efficiency during extended pre-SOP phases.
武汉亚大汽车应建立全面的价格维护控制措施：制定SOP协议签署后价格更新的时限；利用NCC系统的双重价格功能妥善管理过渡期的临时价格和正式价格；重新设计订单-发票核对流程以保留原始价格数据；并明确价格数据维护的责任归属。这些措施将加强财务控制，同时提高较长SOP前阶段的操作效率。

Re-label the entrance to avoid misunderstanding. Keep the flammable storage cabinet locked and only audtorized personnel could access to the cabinet. Conduct spot check for fire extinguishers in time. Check the reasons for missing footage of surveillance cameras and repair as soon as possible.
重新标注入口的标识以避免误解。可燃物储存柜应保持上锁，只有经过授权的人可以打开。及时对灭火器进行点检。检查监控摄像头没有画面的原因并尽快修理。

Chinaust Wuhan Branch should strengthen its outsourcing controls by ensuring that all products sent for external processing are covered under a signed contract with agreed pricing before production begins. A formal process should be established to review and update outsourcing contracts periodically, ensuring they include all relevant products and pricing terms. Additionally, the company should implement a pre-approval mechanism to verify that no products are outsourced without a valid contract in place. These measures will enhance cost control, mitigate legal and financial risks, and ensure compliance with internal policies.
武汉亚大汽车应全面加强外协加工管控，确保所有外协产品在生产启动前均签订包含明确价格条款的书面合同。同时，公司需建立定期评审机制，动态更新外协合同内容，确保其完整涵盖所有外协产品及对应价格条款。通过实施这些措施，公司将有效控制外协成本，降低法律及财务风险，并确保符合内部政策要求。

Chinaust Wuhan Branch should enhance the accuracy and transparency of its KPI reporting by ensuring that all non-conforming products, including reworked items, are accurately recorded and incorporated into the PPM calculations. A standardized procedure for documenting rework activities should be established to improve traceability and accountability. Furthermore, a root cause analysis should be conducted to identify and address the recurring quality issues within the forming process, followed by the implementation of corrective actions to mitigate future occurrences. These measures will strengthen production performance monitoring, improve product quality, and support data-driven decision-making.
武汉亚大汽车应通过确保所有不合格产品（包括返工产品）被准确记录并纳入PPM计算，来提高KPI报告的准确性和透明度。应建立标准化的返工记录程序，以提升可追溯性和责任划分。此外，应开展根本原因分析，识别并解决成型工序中反复出现的质量问题，并实施纠正措施以减少未来问题的发生。这些措施将加强生产绩效监控，提升产品质量，并支持数据驱动的决策。

Establish an electronic or physical inventory ledger for the storage cabinet, clearly documenting item names, quantities, storage dates, personnel responsible for check-out/return, and intended use.
为储物柜建立电子或纸质台账，明确记录物品名称、数量、存放时间、领用/归还人员及用途。

Improve communication between Production and Quality departments. Products that have not been withdrawn from GP12 process should be conducted inspection in a timely manner and record accordingly. For products that need to be withdrawn, the Technical department should formally notify the Quality department.加强制造和质量部门的沟通，未退出GP12的产品应及时进行GP12的检验。对于需要退出的产品，技术部应通过正式的方式通知质量部。

Fully document supplier quality issues and analyse and track them in a timely manner. For suppliers whose quality issue cause financial loss to the company, record the amount of the claim and track the progress of the claim in a timely manner.
完整地记录供应商质量问题，并及时分析和跟踪。对于其质量问题导致公司造成经济损失的供应商，记录其需要索赔的金额，并及时跟踪索赔处理的进度。

Install a suitable emergency response kit in the dangerous goods warehouse at the designated location. Install drip pans on all floor surfaces where liquid containers may be stored.
在指定地点的危险品仓库安装合适的应急包。在可能存放液体容器的所有地面上安装滴水盘。

Prioritize the upgrades of the outdated Windows operating systems and request sufficient budget for end-of-life systems and other IT equipment (e.g. new servers for long-term backups).
Maintain a complete IT asset inventory from a security perspective to include all IT hardware and enforce regular audits.
Enroll all devices in the 360 Security platform and mandate password controls.
Deliver training to the concerned users to share data on the secure platform with access and version controls.
Address server room deficiencies including smoke detection system, spill prevention and temperature control.

Enforce system-enforced dual-approval controls for credit draft transfers via the two platforms if functionality-wise possible.
If system-enforced control cannot be implemented on the platforms, assign an independent Finance employee to validate the high-value transactions and month-end balances on a regular basis in a documented manner.
Update the internal controls to mandate segregation of duties and periodic platform access reviews.
在平台功能允许的情况下，在两个平台上增加票据转账系统强制的双重审批控制。
如果无法在平台上实施系统强制控制，则指派一名独立的财务员工以有记录的核准方式定期验证票据大额交易和月末余额。
更新内部控制，规定职责分离和定期平台访问审查的控制。

Collaborate with IT to reconfigure the NCC system to automatically assign a “zero credit limit” (e.g. credit limit as "CNY 1") to all new and one-time customer accounts, with a system block on deliveries until prepayment is confirmed.
Implement a system integration between payment receipts (e.g., bank statements) and sales orders to enable real-time prepayment verification, reducing manual intervention.
If the system-enforced validation on prepayment cannot be realized per customer, the offline validation needs to be processed and documented on shared drive to avoid potential data loss or compliance issues on the WeChat platform.
与IT部门合作，重新配置NCC系统，为所有新客户和一次性客户账户分配 “零信用度”（例如，信用额度为 “人民币 1 元”），并在确认预付款之前系统阻止发货流程。
在付款收据（如银行对账单）和销售订单之间实施系统的控制整合，以实现预付款实时验证，减少人工干预。
如果无法实现系统性的强制预付款验证环节，则需在系统设置零信用额度的情况下，线下通过共享盘等方式进行记录，以避免微信平台上潜在的数据丢失或合规风险。

Consider implementing the PO approval workflow process in NCC for the purchase of inventory items.
The open PO report should be reviewed by a manager on a monthly basis to identify all aged open POs and ensure follow-up actions are taken and documented.
考虑在 NCC 中实施线上采购订单审批流程。
采购经理应每月全面审查未结定购单报告，并关注所有账龄较长的未结定购单，确保采取后续跟踪行动并记录在案。

Ensure all storage locations are included in the physical counting process. In case the stock counting team cannot visit any specific location due to exceptional circumstances, such cases should be documented with justifications instead of simply producing a counting sheet to make it look like as if counting did take place.
确保所有存储地点都纳入实物盘点流程。如果库存盘点小组因特殊情况无法访问任何特定地点，则应书面记录这种情况并说明理由，而不是简单地制作一张盘点表，让人看起来像盘点工作确实进行了。

Implement a documented approval process for stock adjustments as required by the applicable DoA, e.g. via the OA platform. Ensure stock adjustments are made using the specific movement type matching the underlying reason to enable subsequent reconciliation of adjustments made with the documented approvals.
根据DoA的要求，对库存调整实施文件化的审批流程，例如通过 OA 平台。确保使用与实际原因相匹配的科目进行库存调整，以便随后能够和审批记录进行匹对。

Ensure booking to inventory match as closely as possible the physical receipt of incoming goods. The only tolerable delayed bookings to the subsequent month would be those arriving after the month end closing cut-off date. Ideally a system control should be introduced in NCC to prevent the possibility to manually influence the date of goods receipt booking versus the physical arrival date.
确保库存入账时间尽可能与实际到货时间相符。唯一可容忍的下月延迟入账情况是在月底结算截止日期之后到货的货物。理想情况下，应在 NCC 中引入系统控制，以防止人为影响到货入账时间。

Formalize the pricing and sales discount policies between the Chinaust Automotive and Utility Business Segments, with proper documentation.
Implement OA-driven discount workflows with digital audit trails before sales quotation offered, and enforce SoD control by separating the pricing creation from review or approval.
Migrate all project data to NAS with access and version controls and reinforce the importance of real-time NCC inputs with physical inventory updates
Implement monthly post-margin analyses for all projects, with reporting to management in case of major gaps identified to timely adjust the costing errors or initiate operational improvements.

Collaborate with Chinaust Utility Business Segment in rolling out production planning module in NCC to replace the current manual process on the spreadsheets, at least for the mature and commonly-used products in the gas and water distribution business.
If not possible to launch the automatic NCC methods, the master data in the offline spreadsheet determining the production planning process needs to be regularly updated with proper audit trail.
和亚大市政事业部讨论，使用 NCC 生产计划模块来取代目前电子表格上的手动生产计划流程，至少对于燃气和给水业务中成熟和通用的产品进行测试。
如果无法完全上线NCC排产的方法，则需要定期更新线下电子表格中决定生产计划流程的主数据，并进行适当的跟踪核查。

Replace the current BOM requests through WeChat with a traceable sharing platform or online drive; 
Enforce dual-layer review by Quality & Technology department and implement the existing validation control embedded in the NCC ERP system to ensure data accuracy.
以可追溯的方式如共享平台或内网共享盘的形式取代目前通过微信提出的 BOM 修改或创建申请； 
由质量和技术部门执行双层审查控制，并实施 NCC ERP 系统中现有的验证环节，以确保数据录入的准确性。

Implement NCC system enforced controls on incoming material quality release. Goods receipt booking to free stock should not be possible before qualifying quality test results are available.
Review the current setup and process for inbound quality inspection for materials used for energy storage products. Ensure inspections are duly performed and results are systematically documented and retained.
对来料质量放行实施 NCC 系统控制。在获得合格的入厂检测结果之前，不得将货物在NCC上转至合格品仓库。
审查用于储能产品的材料入厂质量检验的流程。确保执行入厂检查，并系统地记录和保留检查结果。

Implement a process for central collection of measurement tools due for recalibration. 
Calibration sticker should be affixed to the measurement tools directly and operators should be trained to always check the calibration date on the sticker prior to using the tool.
实施集中收集应重新校准的测量工具的流程。
校准贴纸应直接贴在测量工具上，培训操作员在使用工具前必须检查贴纸上的校准日期。

Understand the category definition and data collection method of the aforementioned errors and use the correct methods for the 2025 annual SIS data reporting. In case of any confusion, con-sult the GFPS SIS person responsible before finalizing the 2025 SIS annual reporting. Maintain the calculation basis for the reporting. Set a calculation formula to conduct efficient reporting.
理解上述错误的类别定义和数据收集方法，并使用正确的方法进行2025年度SIS数据的报填报。如有任何不确认的问题，在关闭2025年SIS年报前联系GPSP的SIS负责人进行咨询。保留计算依据。可以设置计算公式以更高效地完成填报。

When an employee joins, leaves, or transfers from the company, the user rights in the ERP system should be changed in a timely manner. When the job responsibilities are changed for certain employees, the ERP user rights should also be changed accordingly. During the hando-ver period of two employees, employees should use their own account to carry out the process in ERP.
员工入职、离职或调离公司时，应及时更改NCC的用户权限。当某些员工的工作职责发生变化时，NCC的用户权限也应随之改变。在两名员工交接期间，员工应使用自己的账户在NCC中执行流程。

The access to server should only be limited to authorized people. The status of server backup should be reviewed, and the validation test should be done regularly to ensure the effective-ness of backup.
Conduct server maintenance at least once a year and the maintenance report should be col-lected and documented from the vendor.
Disable the Admin user rights for all the employees except for the IT Specialist and implement regular sample reviews on employees' PC to ensure proper software controls. 
Reconcile the Windows licenses and remark the versions with the corresponding PC.
服务器只能由授权人员访问。应定期检查服务器备份情况并进行验证测试，以确保备份的有效性
每年至少进行一次服务器维护，并从供应商处收集和记录维护报告。
除IT专员外，禁用员工的管理员用户权限，并定期对员工的个人电脑进行抽样审查，以确保适当的软件控制。
核对 Windows 许可证，并在相应的 PC 上注明版本。

Update user accounts in e-banking in a timely manner when there is a change in personnel. Delete duplicate and redundant accounts.
在有人员变动时，及时更新网银中的账号权限。删除重复或多余的账号。

NCC has already created the master data of "one-time vendor". For vendors with infrequent transactions and small amounts, their transactions can be recorded under the "one-time ven-dor" vendor code and grouped under the "account payable" account.
NCC中已有创建好的“一次性供应商”主数据。对于交易频次低、单次金额较小的供应商，其交易可以使用“一次性供应商”这个供应商编号进行记账，并归集于“供应商应付”科目进行核算。

Provide training to employees that the goods receipt posting should be only made after receiv-ing quality inspection result. Quality staff should issue outbound quality inspection report timely.
对员工进行培训，使其认识到只有在收到质量检验结果后才能进行收货。质量人员应及时出具出库质量检验报告。

Proper cost analysis and price approval should be performed in accordance with the <Utility Internal Control Manual> to ensure that the different perspectives that affect price at the time of bidding has been fully considered.
A perpetual project management ledger can be created on an annual basis to visualize the bid status, bidding progress and results of the project. At the same time, the reasons for bid failures can be analyzed and recorded in the ledger. This also improves traceability and efficiency.
应根据内控手册，在报价之前经过恰当的毛利测算及价格审批，以确保在报价时。各种影响价格的因素经过了充分考虑。
可以以年为单位建立永续的项目管理台账，使项目的投标状态、过程进度及结果可视化。同时可以在台账中分析并记录投标失败的原因。这样也能够提升工作的可追溯性及效率。

Improve safety awareness training for employees to ensure their safety in the workplace. Strengthening the management of hazardous materials, hazardous waste, flammable and ex-plosive materials that can only be accessed by authorized personnel. Ensure that firefighting equipment is in working condition and is checked regularly. Prohibit installing non-conforming internet cables in the factory. Check high voltage cabinets, which should be locked in time after maintenance. Keep the floor clean and repair facilities for storing plastic particles in time. Store the finished goods in the warehouse. If temporary storage in open areas is needed, protection should be implemented. Put the raw materials that have been picked for production in the spec-ified area and label them clearly.
加强员工的安全意识培训，确保员工工作中的安全。加强危险品、危废品、易燃易爆品的管理，只有授权人员能够接触。应确保消防设施的正常工作，并按时进行点检。避免在低空区域安装非合规的网络光纤。检查高压电柜，在维修结束后应及时上锁。保持地面清洁，及时维修存放塑料颗粒的设施。尽量将产成品存放于库房内，在库房不够用需要临时露天存放时，应做好防护措施，防止管材损坏。将已生产领用的原材料放在规定区域，并贴好标签。

Record the use of regrind PE particles in accordance with local regulations: the use of produc-tion order numbers should be recorded in detail and checked regularly. The type and quantity of regrind PE particles should be recorded in accordance with the actual situation so as to truly reflect the inventory of regrind PE particles.
按照当地的规定记录破碎塑料粒子的使用情况：应详细记录使用工单号，并定期进行检查。应按照实际情况记录破碎塑料粒子的牌号及数量，以真实反映破碎塑料粒子的库存。

All equipment in use should be included in the annual PM program. Depending on the actual workload, the maintenance program can be set up separately or together with the production line.
Review the PM record format to ensure completeness and validity of the records and to en-hance work efficiency.
使用中的设备应纳入年度PM计划。根据实际工作量，维护计划可单独制定，也可与生产线一起制定。
审查PM记录格式，确保记录的完整性和有效性，并提高工作效率

Review spare parts in inventory and identify parts in use or to be scrapped. If still usable, enter data into NCC regardless of frequency of use. If they cannot be used, scrap them in a timely manner. Complete spare parts list and usage should be recorded in NCC.
NCC and physical spare parts should be reconciled during stock counts.
审查库存备件，确定正在使用或即将报废的备件。如果仍可使用，无论使用频率如何，都将数据输入NCC。如果无法使用，应及时报废。完整的备件清单和使用情况应记录在NCC中。
在盘点库存时，NCC和实际备件应账实一致。

Review and check the accuracy, completeness and one-to-one correspondence with material codes of the inspection plan settings in MES system. Inspection plans no longer used should be timely deactivated in the system. 
梳理并检查当前MES系统中检验方案设置的准确性、完整性、是否与物料一一对应。对于不再使用的检验方案，及时在系统中设置停用。

Train employees to use the MES system. Communicate with warehouse staff to establish a point in time to confirm the material receipt or outbound of goods in the NCC, such as receiving an alert that the MES inspection is complete. Eliminate manual errors and inefficiencies.
Regularly check the status of inspection tickets in the MES system and find out the reasons and solve the problems for inspection tickets that are not completed on time and with abnormal status.
培训员工使用MES系统。与仓库员工沟通，确定一个固定的时间点来在NCC中进行收货或出库，如收到MES检验完成的提示。以避免人工错误，以及低效率。
定期检查MES系统中检验单的情况，对于未及时完成、状态异常的检验单，及时找到原因并解决。
Follow the ICS in performing reviews on all manual journal entries at each closing. Ensure supporting documents are duly retained.

Reconcile expected amounts of insurance premiums with actual incoming payments received from the fronting insurer. Payment memos should only serve as a reference document but actual figures to be reconciled should be those received on the bank account. Over- or underpayments should lead to timely follow-up and an appropriate provision/accrual at period ends.
Follow up with HDI again regarding the missing supporting documentation for the Q2 2024 INEO claim costs. Take actions to recover the overcharged Italian VAT from HDI.

Management shall clarify the IT budget scope between the local and regional stakeholders with instructions delivered to the concerned employees. Methodology and supporting documents for the fiscal budget should be explanatory and retained. Completeness and accuracy of the local IT budgets should be reviewed as a standard control point.

Define a local patching process that includes the procedures for testing, deploying, and monitoring patches on the six workstations within the production and storage environment. 
This local process should include detailed instructions, timelines, assigned roles and responsibilities, and best practices for patch management. 
Establish a patch register to meticulously document all patches applied, including the date, patch type, affected workstation, and any pertinent details. This registry serves as a critical resource for monitoring patching activities and facilitates audit traceability.

Management shall transition the two workstations from Windows Home Edition to either Windows Pro or Enterprise editions to ensure compliance with security and functionality standards. Check with the vendors of the production equipment should be performed to ensure that future workstation installations will include appropriate versions of the operating system.

Management shall enhance asset management practices to guarantee precise tracking, utilization, and maintenance of IT devices within the organization. Resolving these issues will bolster operational efficiency, security, and compliance within the IT infrastructure of GFPS.

Corporate IT shall collaborate with the DXC service provider to rectify the information gaps and ensure they provide complete and accurate data about the servers they manage. Detailed SOPs should be developed for server asset management, including protocols for updating in-formation and handling changes to server status or ownership. Asset owners for each server should be designated to ensure accountability and proper management of the assets. The in-correct user last logon should be investigated and rectified date records for the  comput-ers/workstations in the CMDB to ensure accurate tracking of usage.

GF Corporate shall designate an official “representative” according to Art. 53 PIPL within GFPS China who is responsible for overseeing personal information protection in compliance with PIPL. Their role and responsibilities should be clearly defined in a job description. Clear reporting lines should be set up for the “representative” and DPAs to ensure they can effectively communicate with the Group DPO and escalate issues as necessary. China based legal experts in PIPL data protection should be consulted to review compliance strategies and ensure that the organization meets all regulatory obligations.

Management shall nominate Data Protection Agents (DPAs) for the GFPS entities in China as mandated by Corporate Instruction 1077. It should be ensured that these DPAs understand their roles in the context of personal data protection. A clear job description should be developed and documented for the designated representative, outlining their responsibilities regarding personal information protection.

Management shall create a robust training program focused on the Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL) and best practices for data handling. This program should be tailored to the specific roles and responsibilities of employees. Training on data protection should be mandatory for all employees, ensuring that they understand the principles of PIPL, their responsibilities regarding personal information, and the implications of mishandling data. Employee completion of training should be tracked and training materials should be regularly reviewed and updated to reflect changes in PIPL.

Management shall implement a process to secure separate, informed consent from all Chinese employees regarding the transfer of their personal information to overseas parties. This should include clear communication regarding the purpose, methods, types of information, and their rights under PIPL. Detailed documentation of consent obtained from employees should be maintained including the information provided to them, and agreements established for cross-border data transfers.

GF Corporate shall develop and implement a cross-border data transfer agreement that complies with the standard template issued by the Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC). This agreement should outline the obligations of all parties involved in the data transfer.

Management shall update the GF diagram to include more comprehensive information about devices, connections, and configurations to ensure that all critical components are represented clearly. Relevant IP address ranges should be included in the GF diagram to facilitate better network management, monitoring, and security measures. This will aid in tracking devices and managing traffic. A regular review process should be established for the network diagrams to ensure they are kept up-to-date with any changes in the network infrastructure. This should include periodic audits to verify accuracy and completeness.

Management shall create a documented process for requesting, modifying, and revoking user access to the WMS. This should include clear guidelines on who can initiate requests and who is responsible for approval. The GF ticketing system, ServiceNow, should be utilized to manage all user authorization requests. This will ensure that all requests are tracked, logged, and can be easily audited.

Management shall update and refine the existing incident response plan to ensure it addresses personal data breaches adequately. Roles and responsibilities of the incident response team in case of persona data breach, should be clearly defined including the Data Protection Officer (DPO) and other relevant stakeholders involvement. Regular training sessions and tabletop exercises should be conducted for the incident response team to ensure preparedness and familiarity with the updated incident response plan.

Management shall investigate and resolve the technical issue preventing users from reopening tickets. This may involve coordinating with the IT development team to ensure the link is functional. Establish a monitoring process to track the reopening of tickets should be established to ensure that similar issues do not occur in the future. A feedback mechanism should be created for users to report any further issues with the ticketing system, ensuring their concerns are heard and addressed promptly. Additional training should be provided to the support team on the incident management process and the importance of ensuring that users can easily reopen tickets when needed.

Management shall update or replace the identified non-DXC workstations with standard ones under the IT department responsibilities. Admin rights used on the workstations should be removed with a more robust IT management system in place for all the production workstations, including regular updates, security patches, access control policies, and monitoring mechanisms to ensure the security and stability of the production and warehousing environment.

Management shall ensure that all electrical panels are equipped with functioning locks and that they are secured when not in use. Access to electrical panels should be limited to authorized personnel only, and a protocol for who can unlock and access these panels should be established. A routine inspection schedule should be implemented to check the status of electrical panels, ensuring they are locked and in good condition. A training sessions should be conducted for employees on the importance of electrical safety, proper panel maintenance, and the risks associated with leaving panels unlocked.

Management shall transition all departments, especially those handling sensitive information, to WeChat Corporate Edition to enhance security and communication control. Clear policies should be developed and enforced regarding the use of communication tools for business purposes, emphasizing the use of approved platforms. Training for employees should be provided on the importance of using secure communication tools and the risks associated with personal messaging apps for business use. Provisioning of secure mobile devices should be considered to employees to facilitate the use of WeChat Corporate Edition and enhance security.

Management shall reconfigure the network setup to ensure that the CCTV cameras are not directly connected to the office network and are instead connected to the dedicated network established for the CCTV systems. This segregation prevents potential security breaches and unauthorized access to the office network through the cameras.
It is advisable to enforce secure communication protocols such as Hypertext Transfer Protocol Secure (HTTPS) to encrypt the data transmitted between the administrative interface and the cameras. This ensures the confidentiality and integrity of administrative interactions.

Management shall install the important security updates for Microsoft .NET to address the identified vulnerabilities. Regularly check should be performed for updates to keep all software current. The outdated Apache Tomcat (version 8.5.59) should be updated to a supported version. This will ensure access to security patches and support from the vendor.

Management shall assess the feasibility of relocating the operational servers from the Shanghai Kangqiao office to the new server room in Yangzhou. This includes evaluating logistical considerations, downtime, and costs associated with the move.
If relocation is not viable, a structured plan for decommissioning the servers at the Kangqiao office should be developed. This should include data migration to new systems, ensuring that all critical data and applications are securely transferred. A thorough assessment of the infrastructure in the Yangzhou server room should be conducted to ensure it can support the operational needs of the servers being relocated.

Management shall investigate and resolve the communication issues for the nine workstations not connecting to the CrowdStrike Falcon platform. It should be ensured that all endpoints are properly configured to communicate with the antivirus monitoring service and the Crowdstrike agent is installed. For the warehouse terminal with the WCS application, local IT should identify and resolve any conflicts between the application and the antivirus solution. This may involve configuring exceptions or adjusting settings.

Management shall improve the management process for Active Directory to ensure data accuracy for both GFPS China and Chinaust employees. This includes establishing a robust communication process between GFPS and the Chinaust Group upon employee exits. A routine review of employee AD information should be implemented to promptly address and clean up accounts after departures. This should include verifying and correcting account status, department affiliation, job title, and office address to maintain precise user profiles.

Management should disable the non-compliant Wi-Fi network and bridge setup, ensuring that only corporate-provided networks are utilized. Employee awareness should be raised about the risks associated with connecting to non-standard Wi-Fi networks to promote responsible network usage within the corporate environment. As an interim measure before the office relocation, the complexity of the current Wi-Fi password should be enanched to a minimum of 12 characters, incorporating special characters.
Division IT shall inform the global vendor regarding the relevant misconfiguration, initiate the process to fix them and obtain a confirmation upon the final resolution.

Management shall develop and communicate clear data retention and deletion policies to comply with regulations and protect employee privacy. Any relevant misconfigurations should be addressed with the local vendor, initiating the neces-sary corrective actions and ensuring confirmation upon the successful resolution.

Management shall establish a process requiring the IT department's involvement in all technical evaluations of production contracts. This ensures that security and compliance standards are met before any agreements are finalized. Clear communication protocols should be established between departments (e.g., IT, procurement, operations) to facilitate information sharing and collaboration during the contract evaluation process.

Management shall improve asset management practices to ensure accurate tracking, utilization, and maintenance of IT devices within the organization. Addressing these issues will enhance operational efficiency, security, and compliance in the IT infrastructure of GFBFS.

Management shall conduct a comprehensive review of the BCP to ensure it reflects current operations, technologies, and potential risks. A high-level overview should be included detailing the plan's purpose, scope, and objectives. A comprehensive IT disaster recovery plan should be developed that includes backup procedures, recovery time objectives (RTOs), and clear guidelines for restoring IT systems and data.
Define criteria for declaring an IT disruption and invoking the DRP. A communication strategy should be created that includes internal and external stakeholder communication during a crisis. Regular testing of the BCP and DRP should be established through drills and simulations. Recovery strategies should be developed for potential scenarios such as prolonged outages or cyberattacks, ensuring the organization can adapt to various disruptions. BCP and DRP should be distributed to all employees and stakeholders, with clear instructions on how to access and implement the plans.

Management shall review all active service accounts to determine their purpose and assign responsible individuals for each account. A process to regularly audit service accounts should be implemented to ensure they are used appropriately. A thorough review of all employee records should be conducted to fill in missing job titles, office locations, and departmental information. A process should be implemented to ensure that new employee records are completed accurately upon onboarding. The AD system should be updated to include accurate reporting manager information for all employees and correct division Information.

Managment shall ensure that all networking and electrical equipment cabinets are locked and secured. The high voltage switchgear unit should be immediately locked. All network cables should be organized and secured  using proper cable management systems, such as ties, trays, or channels, to prevent tangling and improve airflow. A maintenance schedule to regularly check and manage cable organization should be created. Relevant cables should be labelled clearly to indicate their purpose and connections. Colored coded cables should be used to differentiate types of connections, which will facilitate easier identification during maintenance.

Management shall replace outdated operating systems  with supported versions to ensure security patches and updates are regularly applied. Upgrade of hardware components and machines should be evaluated. Administrative rights should be restricted to only those necessary for specific roles. Non-standard antivirus should be replaced with approved, regularly updated antivirus software. All workstations should be integrated into the organization's IT management systems for better monitoring, updates, and compliance tracking.

Management shall physically disconnect the powered-off servers from the network and ensure they are properly decommissioned according to IT policies to prevent unauthorized access. A secure data wiping should be performed on all decommissioned servers to remove any sensitive information. This should follow industry-standard data destruction methods to ensure that data cannot be recovered. The decommissioned servers should be safely removed from the server room. It should be ensured that they are disposed of or recycled according to environmental regulations and organizational policies.

Management shall isolate the production network from the corporate network. This can be achieved by implementing appropriate network segmentation, firewalls, and access controls. Internet access for production devices should be restricted. Network segmentation should be implemented for the servers and other critical systems.

Division IT shall deploy the comprehensive Operational Technology (OT) setup adopted in BFS at Sissach. This includes implementing the standard design for network isolation and the security solutions necessary for continuous monitoring of the OT network. The setup will integrate sensors with the security monitoring system to enhance visibility, along with an Intrusion Detection and Prevention System (IDPS) to monitor network traffic for suspicious activity and potential threats. This proactive approach will enable real-time detection and response to security incidents.

Management shall immediately update the default administrative passwords on all identified printing systems to strong, unique passwords that comply with GF password policies. Remote access to the administrative interfaces of printing systems should be restricted to only those who absolutely need it. Network segmentation should be considered to isolate printing systems from other critical systems. This can help contain potential breaches and limit the impact on the overall network.

Management shall upgrade all servers running outdated and unsupported operating systems to their latest supported versions to ensure ongoing vendor support and security updates. All missing critical cumulative security updates for Windows Servers and any other relevant updates for all OS and MS Office applications should be installed to patch known vulnerabilities. The identified critical servicing stack vulnerabilities  should be remediated to prevent exploitation that could allow malicious software installation.

Management shall investigate the reason of the communication issue to ensure that all devices, including theproduction workstations, are effectively protected against malware, ransomware, and other advanced threats. This will significantly enhance the resilience and security of the endpoint environment within the GF network.

Management shall review and revise access controls for all database backups and application folders. Limit access to only those users who require it for their roles.
A principle of least privilege should be implemented, ensuring users have only the permissions necessary to perform their job functions. Access for third-party vendors and external users should be evaluated and managed. It should be ensured they have only the necessary permissions and their activity should be monitored.

Management shall disable physical ports (e.g., USB, serial) that are not needed for daily operations while allowing only necessary devices to be connected. Software that is not necessary for business operations should be Identified and uninstalled. Active services and protocols should be checked, and disable those that are not essential for operations.

Establish a formal IT asset management process, including a centralized register that documents all hardware specifications, warranty periods, and maintenance histories. 
Collaborate with the IT Specialist of Chinaust Changchun Auto to implement specific monitoring tools for system-enforced controls, such as restricting administrative privileges to essential personnel, implementing role-based access controls, tracking software installations and enforcing approval workflows for downloads, and implementing mandatory password policies, including periodic change and complexity requirements.
Ensure that firewall protection is enabled on all devices and conduct regular security scans to identify vulnerabilities.
建立正式的IT设备管理流程，包括集中记录所有设备的规格、保修期和维护历史。
与长春亚大汽车的IT专员合作，落实系统强制控制的特定设备和软件的监控工具，如限制必要人员的管理员权限、实施基于角色的访问控制、跟踪软件安装情况并执行下载审批工作流程、实施强制性的密码政策，包括定期更改和复杂性要求。
确保在所有设备上启用防火墙保护，并定期进行安全扫描以发现可能的漏洞。

For network isolation and Wi-Fi security management, segment networks using VLANs or firewalls and enforce quarterly Wi-Fi password changes with unique credentials.
Screen the current network and peripheral devices and reset the user password to eliminate potential unauthorized access.
For the shared drive in use, transition to HTTPS protocols and conduct vulnerability scans.
Relocate the server to a dedicated, access-controlled facility with climate control, fire suppression, UPS, and entry logs; remove flammable materials and restrict access to authorized IT staff.
为实现网络分隔和 Wi-Fi 安全管理，可使用 VLAN 或防火墙划分网络，并强制执行每季度一次的 Wi-Fi 密码更改。
筛查当前网络和外围设备，重置用户密码，消除潜在的未经授权访问。
对于正在使用的共享盘，过渡到HTTPS协议，并进行漏洞扫描。
将服务器放置在专用的、有访问控制的机房中，并配备温度控制、灭火装置、UPS 和记录访问日志；移除机房内的易燃材料，并限制唯有相关授权的IT员工方可访问。

Collaborate with the GFPS BU Asia Finance team to clarify the treatment of intercompany pen-alties and other non-operational income and expenses, by understanding the nature of ac-counts "818 Income from corporate companies" and "826 Charges from corporate companies". 
Strengthen the intercompany reconciliation procedures for automatic and effective elimination of internal transactions during consolidation.

加强公司间的对账程序，以便在合并期间自动有效地抵消内部交易。

如管理层决定不实施系统控制，则应改进每月应收账款逾期分析，要求进行详细和有记录的分析，并在月度会议期间将罚金和押金与应收账款分开分析。

Establish a regular reconciliation check between Production and Finance department to ensure asset completeness and capitalization timeliness.

Document the updates and validation controls, such as calculation trails to enhance transparency and reliability.
基于SRM平台数据，包括由长春亚大汽车确认的交付周期主数据，以及基于历史订单的实际交付周期，进行MRP表格中交付周期的定期更新和验证。
记录更新和验证的控制过程如计算逻辑，以提高手工数据的透明度和可靠性。

Segregate the cost calculation and pricing responsibilities, by assigning the Finance department to independently provide or validate cost inputs to sales people prior to management approval.
Include Finance department in the OA approval or notification workflow for proper oversight and validation.
将成本计算和定价职责分开，由财务部门负责在管理层批准前向销售人员提供项目成本报价或验证销售的成本输入。
将财务纳入OA批准或通知工作流程，以进行适当监督和核对。

Segregate responsibilities for customer and supplier complaint management (SQE) to ensure focused attention and reduce workload pressure on a single individual.

Perform periodic reviews of the complaint database by reconciliating the independent data sources, especially the customer online platform to ensure data integrity and action implementation.
将客户和供应商投诉管理的职责分开，以确保相关控制的集中关注，减少单人的工作量压力。
维护的手工电子表格中设置必填字段，包括材料代码、客户名称、负责人员方以及财务影响，提高准确性和完整性。
通过核对独立数据源，尤其是客户在线平台，对投诉数据清单进行定期审查，以确保数据的完整性和相关整改措施的执行。

Implement a formal, documented approval process for base salary and performance base adjustments, requiring sign-off from HR Manager the MD, which could be used as the confirmed master data for the monthly payroll preparation.
对基本工资和绩效基数调整实施正式的、有记录的审批程序，要求人事经理和总经理的签批留档，并可将其作为编制月度工资单的经确认的主数据。

Management shall establish internal procedures to ensure IT involvement in the business application procurement process, even when ownership and subsequent management of the application do not fall under the IT department. During procurement, technical requirements should be assessed to mitigate potential risks and ensure alignment with security and operational standards.

Management shall establish a systematic process for reviewing, updating, and approving the DPM. Periodic reviews of the DPM should be performed to ensure it remains current and compli-ant. All relevant comments and changes should be integrated and approved before finalization. The manual should be labelled with the correct, latest version number. All revisions should be tracked with clear version control and update dates.

Management shall evaluate the current software in use and consider replacing it with new, sup-ported solutions. If internally developed software is still deemed necessary, it must be developed and documented in accordance with corporate standards to ensure compliance. For externally sourced software, technical documentation should be retained for future maintenance and sup-port. Mandatory documentation standards should be established for all new and existing applica-tions, including design, architecture, security measures, deployment procedures, and mainte-nance plans. When key personnel leave, it should be required comprehensive handovers and documentation updates to preserve institutional knowledge.

Management shall improve asset management practices by establishing a regular review process to ensure accurate tracking, utilization, and maintenance of IT assets within the organization. Ad-dressing these issues will enhance operational efficiency, security, and compliance in the IT infrastructure.

Management shall develop a comprehensive training program focused on PIPL and best practic-es for data handling. This program should be tailored to the specific roles and responsibilities of employees. PIPL training must be mandatory for all staff to ensure they understand the law's principles, their responsibilities concerning personal information, and the consequences of mis-handling data. Training completion should be tracked, and materials should be regularly reviewed and updated to reflect any changes in PIPL and the completeness of ISAT participation. For new employees, it should be ensured that ISAT is conducted within six weeks of joining the company.  All employees with email addresses should complete the annual ISAT within the designated timeframe.

Management should review and update the records retention policy to ensure compliance with the PIPL. Retention periods should be aligned with legal requirements and business needs. Clear procedures should be established for data collection, storage, access, retention, and secure destruction. Automatic or manual review processes should be ensured to identify data eligible for deletion.

Corporate legal shall review and revise the GF Records Retention instruction regarding personal information to align with current legislation. Periodic reviews of GF Records Retention instruc-tions (CI 1026) should be scheduled to ensure they stay compliant with evolving laws and regulations.

Management shall ensure that the area around fire extinguishers is kept clear and unobstructed. The locations of fire extinguishers should be rearranged to ensure they are easily accessible from outside server rooms and other critical areas. Employees should be trained not to block or obstruct fire safety equipment. Regular spot checks should be conducted to verify accessibility and proper maintenance. Sturdy locks should be installed on all network cabinets and ensure they are always locked when not attended. Regularly inspect and maintain locks to prevent breakage.

Division IT shall conduct periodic reviews and follow-ups on the ticketing system to ensure that tickets are resolved in a timely manner. If an action is no longer needed, relevant users should be contacted to confirm and close the ticket.

Management shall improve AD management practices and maintain data accuracy. It is advised to correct any incomplete or missing information in user accounts, such as department, job title, description, city, and office fields, to ensure accurate user profiles are maintained.

Management shall install the CrowdStrike Falcon endpoint protection agent on all servers, work-stations, and devices identified as lacking the software, including the two Windows servers, VMware servers, the laptop, and the nine non-standard workstations. A comprehensive review of all devices within the organization should be performed to identify any other endpoints without the CrowdStrike agent and ensure full coverage. IT processes should be enforced requiring the installation of CrowdStrike agents on all new and existing devices, including those used in pro-duction, quality, and security areas.

Management shall replace or upgrade outdated operating systems with supported versions. A roadmap should be created to phase out unsupported hardware and software. Budget for necessary upgrades should be foreseen to ensure timely replacement and maintain security posture. Unnecessary administrative rights should be removed from users and limit privileges to only what is necessary. Default accounts** like "Administrator" should be disabled or renamed and enforce strong, unique passwords following GF standards should be enforced.

Management shall develop and enforce a comprehensive login and authentication policy that mandates changing temporary or default credentials after first use following GF password com-plexity requirements (length, character types, etc.) to ensure strong authentication. The adminis-trative interface of the Comhigher Serial IO device should be password-protected. Default pass-words should be verified and changed on all devices, including the HP MFP, and unique, strong passwords should be set for each device.

Management shall isolate the production network and the CCTV system from the corporate net-work. This can be achieved by implementing appropriate network segmentation, firewalls, and access controls. Internet access for production devices should be restricted. Network segmenta-tion should be implemented for the servers and other critical systems.

Management shall enforce proper access controls, implement strong authentication mecha-nisms, regularly monitor and audit access to backup and application files, and encrypt sensitive data to maintain its confidentiality and integrity.

Management shall migrate Windows Server 2012 and Windows 7 workstations systems to sup-ported versions. Systems that cannot be upgraded should be decommissioned and replaced with supported hardware and software. All the latest security updates should be installed for all sys-tems, especially for Microsoft Office, .NET Framework, SQL Server, and browsers. Any unsup-ported or non-compliant software should be removed to minimize security risks.

Management shall immediately inform the Helios Portal vendor of the detailed security assess-ment findings. A prioritized remediation plan should be developed based on risk severity. It should be ensured that all third-party libraries, especially outdated JavaScript libraries, are updat-ed to the latest secure versions. Application code should be reviewed to eliminate SQL injection and path traversal vulnerabilities. All sensitive data, including PII, should be securely stored and transmitted only using encryption.

GFPS Australia DG goods are primarily 1 LT tins of Class 3 Flammable (90%), Class 4.1 Flammable solids (5%), Class 8 Corrosive (4%) and small quantities of Class 6 Toxic (1%). In HBII (K08), for future cases from 2025 onwards, we will report intercompany warranty charges/income in IC lines, i.e. Changchun as fee recipient reports the income under “818 Income from corporate subsidiaries”, and Chinaust Langfang Shuchang as expense bearer reports expenses under “826 Charges from corporate subsidiaries”, to ensure proper inter-company elimination.
在外方利润表（K08）中，对于2025 年及以后的类似情形，关联方之间的质保费用/收入将填报在关联方行项，即长春亚大作为费用收取方，将收入计入818 In-come from corporate subsidiaries，廊坊舒畅作为费用承担方，将质保费用计入826 Charges from corporate subsidiaries，确保关联方交易的抵消。

对目前未结采购订单进行清查，分析延迟交付原因。6月中旬将前期未及时交付单据处理完成。

Revise the inventory management policy based on the Chinaust Group's policy. Specify that all warehouses must be included in each stocktaking and clarify the tasks, responsible persons, and deadlines for stocktaking issues.
根据集团盘点制度重新修订分公司库房盘点管理制度文件，明确每次盘点范围为分公司所有库房，明确盘点任务和责任人以及盘点问题关闭时间节点。

change_comment: To remediate the findings no.1 and no.2 of the internal audit focusing on Corporate Instruction 1061 at GFPS BU EMEA a project was launched with the participation of one GFIA team member and the Corporate Compliance Officer. The project focuses on setting up a pragmatic and risk oriented approach to assess the intermediaries of individual companies. The approach shall then be incorporated into CI 1061 and result in a new and amended annex 1. It shall also provide a monitoring capability that can be used by every individual company. The current plan is to conclude the project by April 2023.

To remediate the findings no.1 and no.2 of the internal audit focusing on Corporate Instruction 1061 at GFPS BU EMEA a project was launched with the participation of one GFIA team member and the Corporate Compliance Officer. The project focuses on setting up a pragmatic and risk oriented approach to assess the intermediaries of individual companies. The approach shall then be incorporated into CI 1061 and result in a new and amended annex 1. It shall also provide a monitoring capability that can be used by every individual company. The current plan is to conclude the project by April 2023.

Internal Audit verified the documents provided, the overall controls on spare parts have been dramatically improved. Although the following two actions were not systematically followed as recommended, certain mitigation plans have reduced the potential risks identified:

No long lead-time ever happened since then, limited to 4 hours including manual labor maintenance hours. The current feedback was that: 
2. Stock take of spare parts: although till Nov. 2021, no full count ever performed, but continuous sample count noted with both supervision and count person signed.

Counting sheets for the onsite stock take was evidenced with no deviation noted.
Stock take performer is the Chinaust ZZ warehousing staff and the stock take reviewer is the Chinaust ZZ SCM Manager.

As per the explanation provided, "The document that have been uploaded incorporates both the BU and company level DoAs.", which goes to the min. level of Department Managers as "First Line Managers (FLM)".
Meanwhile, Internal Audit highlights the differences identified for example, Points 4.6, 4.7 and 4.8, where A&R were identified for both BU and Division levels. As explained, this is a more stringent authorization control implemented by BU China, ”for 4.6, 4.7 and 4.8 points, both local PUR approval and HQ approval are required, because now GFCS HQ has taken back the authority of each plant a bit, so the centralization will be a bit more. However, for China, the differences in culture and the distance in between, so the local authority in China will be a bit bigger, because the Chinese team will understand the actual situation of the supply chain better. " That is why both Divisional approval should also be discussed and approved together with GFCS BU China management together.

Documents were evidenced for GFCS China Purchasing actions, thus finding closed:
1. QEV requirement is reduced to 100T CNY, where at least 2 quotations are needed for the QEV process, referring to Purchasing Process Guideline VA180801, Rev.16, Clause 18.05.01
2. Both Purchasing Process Guideline VA180801 and Purchase Order Procedure AA1908007 are applicable for TTMC purchasing activities.
3. Purchase order under single-sourced vendor case, should be approved with rational documented in the SAP PO Text part, referring to Purchase Order Procedure AA1908007, Rev.06, Clause 12.2.02.03 b)
4. Freelancers are prohibited, referring to Purchasing Process Guideline VA180801, Rev.16, Clause 18.03.10.

During a follow-up audit, the situation of the inventory differences was reviewed again. GFPS Signet performs a continuous cycle count and in addition a YE full stock count. Both still result in frequent differences that have not been explained yet and require more detailed analysis. Head of IA suggested to continue the approach of both count methodologies in parallel to ensure a realistic reflection of stock quantities prevent wrong results of the MRP.
IA will close the IA finding now but will create a future note on the audit universe element and in detail review the situation in the course of the next audit. The focus will be on the analysis of root causes for these count differences and to what changes this might have led or needs to lead.

The SAP Finance responsible for all three divisions confirmed in the Email meeting memo that it is possible to transfer a significant part of payments that are today processed manually into the typical standard SAP payment process. MRP calculation sheet has been updated with lead-time set up in the algorithm and check automatically in the column AK - an indicator of "whether to place order". The comparison is made by the stock on hand plus stock in transit/inspection with production demand with consideration of actual lead-time.
In terms of the safety stock levels, high or low stock levels are set based on actual production demand in the coming one or two weeks (set up in sheet "components demand basic data sheet"). The relevant descriptions have been amended in the Procurement Operation Guideline.
Check during site in the next audit on real PO placed compared to the MRP EXCEL running results to see if the complex algorithm actually meets the needs of the production planning and if any shortage of materials ocurred.

New local guideline on records retention aligns with the Corporate Instruction 1026, especially on the identified deficiencies like commercial, financial, and technical documents:
- Commercial contracts: 12 years as required in CI 1026, and the same in new local guideline.
- Financial documents: 11 years as required in CI 1026 (legal required plus one year), and 30 years in new local guideline.
- Technical documents: 30 years as required in CI 1026, and the same in new local guideline.
- Quality Management System (QMS) required documents: 6 years as required in CI 1026 (legal required plus one year), and 15 years in new local guideline.
Aforementioned items have been verified and thus the audit finding is closed, while others are still subject to be tested in the next audit.

As per the documents provided and the process described corrective actions have been taken, including the thorough review on the SAP master data 
1, Reviewed and corrected incoming inspections flag in SAP, especially invalid inspection settings in SAP.
- Totally 1'544 items of materials which phase out, canceled inspection flag.
- Canceled inspection flag for the materials which not in inspection matrix's and also have no non-conformities in recent months.
- For the materials which have no supplier information in SAP, keep inspection flag. Usually, they are belong to project materials, full dimension inspection will be implemented in IGI .
- Maintained "Inspection Matrix" based on current requirements. (See attachment 1)
2, Use Teams to transmit SAP adjustment requirement for each inspection flag setting. (See attachment 2 & 3)
3, Re-defined working method of inspection result records. For normal sample inspection, the results will be recorded in SAP to replace off-line excel file(See attachment 4); For special inspection requirements, such as 4800 return order, will record results on receipt, to guarantee each 4800 parts meet criteria the receipt will be archived in IGI area. (See attachment 5)
4, LG will support to download inspection setting flag which in SAP for all 4800 regularly, thus wrong or missing flag will be identified in time. (See attachment 6)

Please review the actions and provide suggestions, thanks a lot!

During on-site follow-up, below actions had been verified:
- Separate SIS account has been created for Kunshan
- The mistakes had been corrected for 2023 annual SIS reporting.

Internal Audit also reviewed with local management about the external interim audit result regarding 2023 year-end revenue recognition, no points for Kunshan were raised on this topic. (As confirmed by the Financial Controller and SSC Manager)

During on-site follow-up, we reviewed the work papers of FG and WIP inventory valuation made for 2312 yearend closing. 
- Prototypes were excluded as instructed in the policy.
- No manual adjustments were made on the SAP generated reports. 
- Minor deviation: for the impending loss provision, some sales price info were missing with no impact on the final provision. The Financial Controller has informed the Sales Service team to update the sales price accordingly.

During on-site follow-up, we confirmed that no Payment Day changes were made for transactions other than MTZ after Aug 2023. The change of MTZ payment days was initiated by Sales Service and approved by Sales, Finance and GM.

During on-site follow up, we checked the AR bad debt provision details and individual adjustments were not made for any transactions except for the overdue MTZ of FAW-VW. The AR aging was NOT adjusted in Cognos report but truthfully reflecting the actual aging structure.

3. Run ETMA parts again for those still as ETAL but to be reclassified to ETMA

Current Situation
Network segmentation has been done in the MLAN Project
There is still the gap of segregating the networks
Tisax Audits need to have this segregation
Other Third Party Audits (Intel, BMW ec.)
Internal Audits also requested this segregation
No IT / OT separation
Currently every Client in the GF Network, no matter in which network they are can talk to each other (printer, server, clients, production machines and so on)
This causes a high risk in case a security incident that is spread out in one location
Which means, 1 bad Client can potentially bring down a whole site
Sites that asking for a LAN-Firewall

SAP Specialist published the new instruction on cross-month deliveries, and as per the internal control described by the local Controller, review on the Dec. delivery list is reviewed by both Finance and SCM an adjustments identified will be adjusted. One sample delivery note for tooling sales is provided, overseas customs claimed in December 2023, while delivery and revenue booked in Feb. 2024. In addition, GFIA reviewed the oversea deliveries to the US (Tesla Texas) in December 2023 from the Dec. delivery list, and the sales order (2432200) turned to be FCA (rev. recog. upon handover to logistics vendor), and revenue recognized in 2023 (seems reasonable). 
Therefore, full compliance requires larger sample size for verification and should be done in the next on-site audit. The Audit Finding was currently closed after the supporting documentation was reviewed by GF Internal Audit.

Hi Lorenzo

finally, I'm back to office.

This topic is somewhat delicate and I think we need to treat it with 2 perspectives:
•	specific "GFMS-finding": we'll do no follow-up on that topic due to the changed situation (divestment)
•	general situation "Rest of GF": we're planning (confidential) a holistic new approach for an integrated "One IT". This planning is part of an overarching initiative, led by Mads. In short words, the objective is to remove the divisional barriers within IT by implementing a single, overarching IT organization.
As answer to the audit finding, I would provide:
"The finding is being overtaken by the structural adjustment of the GF organisation that has since taken place and is therefore obsolete. The divestment of the GFMS division removes any organisational reporting line.
At the same time, plans are afoot to establish a uniform IT organisation for the whole of GF that will eliminate the division-related boundaries between the central IT teams. These plans are part of a larger initiative that will address the organisational impact of the acquisition of Uponor and the divestment of GFMS & GFCS."
Please let me know if that's ok and we can close the finding.

best

Uwe

Freundliche Grüsse / Kind regards,
Uwe Kühne

From: Salmela, Kari <kari.salmela@uponor.com> 
Sent: Monday, 27 January 2025 07:58
To: Gritti, Lorenzo <lorenzo.gritti@georgfischer.com>
Subject: GDPR vulnerability

Here’s the commentary from the developers.

Main Reasoning for actual failures where named in my report from 12.12.2024 and were all resolved on permanent level:
1. Technical defect on cookie for Pardot forms which was resovled on 27th of Nov. 
2. Microsoft Clarity GTM tags which were not active due to automated creation, topic has been solved and process adjustments will be caried out in the future
3. Marketing cookies on NA pages were not set due to responsibility changes - settings were adjusted and training to new colleague done
4. Customer service forms code was not properly implemented from usercentrics to Kentico, all forms have now proper service code implementation

Long term outcome:
•	The cookie banners via usercentrics tool worked always properly and informs customers on detailed level about every cookie. 
•	The process is handled centrally to ensure proper usage in the future.
•	Due to central process no local unidentified cookies can come up. 
•	Tracking is handled also centrally to ensure that only accepted cookies are tracked. This was always the case, exception are above mentioned topics which were now permanently solved
•	Regular analysis of new uncategorized cookies is enabled via one responsible for European websites and one for NA websites and thus ensured that central proper processes are carried out to set up events and cookie tracking properly. 
•	Proper training for Kentico users for forms has been integrated to training program and Confluence documentation. 

--Kari
